name: Gary Sinise
subject: The National Memorial Day Parade is back
body:
This year, I’m honored to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C.

| | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c665088%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=JlAbPaPz%2fBYCEQRCJhIJKA&sysid=1)
---
Fellow American, It’s Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like _Apollo 13 _and _The Green Mile _or the CBS television series _CSI NY_ -- but it was in 1994 and playing the role of Lt. Dan in _Forrest Gump,_ that my life changed and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders. **This year, I’m honored to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C.** The National Memorial Day Parade is an event like no other ... and this year, the American Veterans Center is bringing it BACK in full force, with 5,000+ participants marching down Constitution Avenue before a crowd of 250,000+ in-person, as well as T.V. broadcast that reaches 100 million households around the country. [**Fellow American, the National Memorial Day Parade is PRIMARILY FUNDED by private contributions, including from generous Americans like you. Will you help chip in today to help support the Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, or more?**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c665089%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=P%2bLaZnJ8fXJJ4bwE7Wz23A&sysid=1)
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c665080%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=WyFeglHmsxGt1w3fKxSatA&sysid=1)
---
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c665088%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=JlAbPaPz%2fBYCEQRCJhIJKA&sysid=1)
---
When the American Veterans Center first called me 18 years ago and invited me to the National Memorial Day Parade, I was honored to join the event to remember our fallen heroes. The American Veterans Center revived the Parade in 2005 after it had been dormant for nearly 70 years. And this year, they’re bringing the Parade back better than ever. Every American should be proud that generations of our brave servicemen and servicewomen, from the last of our “Greatest Generation” heroes of World War II to our veterans from Afghanistan and Iraq, will get the public thanks for their service that they deserve this year. But I know that the defenders and families of the fallen who will join me in the National Memorial Day Parade will be thinking of their friends and loved ones who made the ultimate sacrifice for our country -- the brave Americans we honor on Memorial Day. **Sadly, our country is losing hundreds of World War II veterans each day, so the mission of the National Memorial Day Parade is _more important now than ever_ -- as this year’s event may be the LAST opportunity for our WWII heroes to commemorate their friends who never came home.** [**Please make your most generous contribution of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, to support the National Memorial Day Parade and make it the tribute that our nation’s heroes deserve.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c665081%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=dmMtrbRINXAjgVaf%2bPpugw&sysid=1)
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c665080%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=WyFeglHmsxGt1w3fKxSatA&sysid=1)
---
The National Memorial Day Parade costs a fraction of other major public events to put on each year. In fact, the entire parade costs about as much as just THREE balloons in the Macy’s Thanksgiving Day Parade or TWO floats in the Rose Bowl Parade! _That means that every dollar that’s contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for this important event._ Your support of the American Veterans Center not only helps the Parade, but also supports great programs like:
* Recording hundreds of oral histories of veterans from World War II to today before we lose these stories forever.

* Holding our National Youth Summit which allows young students a chance to hear firsthand from veterans from WWII, Korea, and Vietnam.

* Producing veteran-focused T.V. documentaries and specials that remind Americans of the price of our freedom.

[**Please join me in support of the National Memorial Day Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, or more right now.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c665082%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=8urn%2bot%2fkg7o0tqPA%2fF9QA&sysid=1) But no matter how much you can give to this important cause, I want to ask something additional of you.

On Memorial Day -- this year and every year -- please join me in honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms. Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in D.C. Visit a local veterans’ cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country. _I believe while we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, we can always do a little more._ Fellow American, thank you for your support of America's heroes, and please -- [**if you're able, make a gift to help fund the National Memorial Day Parade right now.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c665083%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=MF6Sink1vKqa4ia1c4Y0%2fg&sysid=1)
---
Sincerely,

Gary Sinise
Honorary Grand Marshal
National Memorial Day Parade
---
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c665088%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=JlAbPaPz%2fBYCEQRCJhIJKA&sysid=1)
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c665080%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=WyFeglHmsxGt1w3fKxSatA&sysid=1)
---
The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. (C) American Veterans Center
1100 N. Glebe Road Suite 910, Arlington, VA 22201
---

_[**unsubscribe**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c665084%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=hpheZZKoUlhw7HsAcA9jeA&sysid=1)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c665095%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=zUtXhHjdqhhJmddcV2c%2fFw&sysid=1)_
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c1911%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=dhCFDvySSPU%2fCqUiA%2boYcg&sysid=1)

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: We stand to lose too much if we don’t reach this goal
body:
| | | | | [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e_s17_main_cobrandedemail_c3)
---|---|---

| | Friend, we have a problem and need your help to solve it: We thought donations would skyrocket when we announced our Earth Day giving opportunity given the dire state of our planet -- but we're falling short of our goal, and we're running out of time to protect our endangered species, the lands they rely on, and our only Earth before the clock strikes midnight. **There are only 73 Southern Resident orcas left in the world, 40% of our insect pollinators are on the brink of extinction, wolf pups are being dynamited in their dens \-- and they don't have much time. That's why a generous group of donors has agreed to match every gift, dollar for dollar, up to $180,000 -- but only until midnight TONIGHT. [Please, will you make your $27 gift right now while our Earth Day match opportunity is still available? We're a grassroots organization -- and we can't prepare for the hard fights ahead without you, Friend.](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1735077?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) ** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [$27 donation + $27 match = $54 impact](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1735078?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
| | [$50 donation + $50 match = $100 impact](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1735079?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
| | [$100 donation + $100 match = $200 impact](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1735080?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
| | [Double another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1735081?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
We hate having to ask, but remember what could be lost if we fall short -- it's the reason we set such an ambitious Earth Day goal. Already, Southern Resident orcas are struggling to survive -- **grieving, starving, and at greater risk every day.** Disastrous megaprojects are being planned in the lands where endangered species roam, **risking their very survival.** And wild pollinators are **disappearing rapidly,** with bee-toxic neonics being a key culprit -- and all this for the sake of private profit.
Friends of the Earth exists to STOP those outcomes before they happen, prevent existing dangers from getting any worse, and protect our planet -- and we're part of the world's largest grassroots environmental network because of it. But we can't continue our work unless you make your membership gift of $27 or more to help us raise what it takes to win -- because we're still falling dangerously short of our Earth Day goal, and there are only 14 hours left before it's over.
**Please, with time running out and everything on the line, we're counting on you to help us reach our goal before the clock strikes midnight. **
[**Our Earth has never needed a friend like you or us more: Please, before midnight tonight, give every dollar you can in honor of Earth Day while you can make double the impact to help Friends of the Earth continue fighting.**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1735082?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
[DONATE](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1735083?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Regards,
Erich Pica
President,
Friends of the Earth **
|

clean_body: | | | | | ---|---|--- | | Friend, we have a problem and need your help to solve it: We thought donations would skyrocket when we announced our Earth Day giving opportunity given the dire state of our planet -- but we're falling short of our goal, and we're running out of time to protect our endangered species, the lands they rely on, and our only Earth before the clock strikes midnight. There are only 73 Southern Resident orcas left in the world, 40% of our insect pollinators are on the brink of extinction, wolf pups are being dynamited in their dens \-- and they don't have much time. That's why a generous group of donors has agreed to match every gift, dollar for dollar, up to $180,000 -- but only until midnight TONIGHT. == If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | == | | == | | == | | == We hate having to ask, but remember what could be lost if we fall short -- it's the reason we set such an ambitious Earth Day goal. Already, Southern Resident orcas are struggling to survive -- grieving, starving, and at greater risk every day. Disastrous megaprojects are being planned in the lands where endangered species roam, risking their very survival. And wild pollinators are disappearing rapidly, with bee-toxic neonics being a key culprit -- and all this for the sake of private profit. Friends of the Earth exists to STOP those outcomes before they happen, prevent existing dangers from getting any worse, and protect our planet -- and we're part of the world's largest grassroots environmental network because of it. But we can't continue our work unless you make your membership gift of $27 or more to help us raise what it takes to win -- because we're still falling dangerously short of our Earth Day goal, and there are only 14 hours left before it's over. Please, with time running out and everything on the line, we're counting on you to help us reach our goal before the clock strikes midnight. == == Regards, Erich Pica President, Friends of the Earth | Contact Us: Friends of the Earth U.S. Washington, D.C. | Berkeley, CA 1-877-843-8687

| | Fellow conservative, I'm Maria Elvira Salazar, and I'm proudly serving the people of South Florida in Congress and working to bring Sunshine State freedom to the capitol in Washington.
**[As one of Congress ' biggest voices against socialism, I'm a top target for the Left in 2024, and I need your help to fight back and defend our Florida freedom in Florida and across this great nation.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=62207f577e774438b38f09c8eb0e6ae5&_e=xNfvJmKFyVkPDAEz5aBR77cBhNZrqFdMluFr76NdAXRjyBZgfC9q2-_f7FZpx2f06yT4m3B7NuSIj3XEyH3gp3hQ9HxfU3VWdv-Yfvl0HwDX5crSFb0nQSpcJWvAUzZt8NJ-XYMqj2igFMuRI_ssnZMB3uvag6jg5GCQGfuWquglrROpXfjj2MSLACCkF6jnEmVd7REaBPlVmtRPtLN_BzJOK89x_sKJSlwthpSEUp5vFvGapfa3HvQkYMSUTcbpfK9869TsJWhVzMX-9QV3zpjwqrQDjkUY78NuJEvPU9tLuCK7Rd9n-_QhvPeZpTwHjBx-rKl1k4JvYGRGgsxtrVe4HqO9chtjWTGPKEddQ3rOBfSLJ5cLi67zuO6x0X2D7n9IfJJhkZwxk8gbRBbybQ%3D%3D)**
But first, let me tell you a little bit about myself.
I was born in Miami's Little Havana neighborhood as the daughter of Cuban exiles. **My parents risked _everything_ to seek FREEDOM in America.**
Growing up, they told me about the horrors of socialism back home in Cuba - and instilled in me the importance of individual freedom and hard work.
I was blessed that my parents made it to our great nation, but I knew millions of people throughout the world are still living under tyranny, so I dedicated my life to exposing corrupt dictators.
As an Emmy-award-winning journalist, I took on Venezuela's Nicolas Madura, Chile's Augusto Pinochet, and Fidel Castro himself head-on.
**[But I never thought I 'd see the same socialist agenda I was fighting make its way to the United States.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=62207f577e774438b38f09c8eb0e6ae5&_e=xNfvJmKFyVkPDAEz5aBR77cBhNZrqFdMluFr76NdAXRjyBZgfC9q2-_f7FZpx2f06yT4m3B7NuSIj3XEyH3gp3hQ9HxfU3VWdv-Yfvl0HwDX5crSFb0nQSpcJWvAUzZt8NJ-XYMqj2igFMuRI_ssnZMB3uvag6jg5GCQGfuWquglrROpXfjj2MSLACCkF6jnEmVd7REaBPlVmtRPtLN_BzJOK89x_sKJSlwthpSEUp5vFvGapfa3HvQkYMSUTcbpeAEPhxYK__a5AID77OS2gGaW7e1rstn_UV8jy-8rmhaC30bDOoPJ0zt9hq7XdWUF-bPvgqFbjGGZa0a425srXpx-X7-K8hHFD7bponsXhtxO-zGUMpMMLD5plyen5rdg1w2NKuZ2BYuAdLQ6q45ujA%3D%3D)**
Now, we have members of Congress proudly proclaiming to be socialists and trying to crush your individual rights under their radical agenda - **[_and I won 't let them get away with it._](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=62207f577e774438b38f09c8eb0e6ae5&_e=xNfvJmKFyVkPDAEz5aBR77cBhNZrqFdMluFr76NdAXRjyBZgfC9q2-_f7FZpx2f06yT4m3B7NuSIj3XEyH3gp3hQ9HxfU3VWdv-Yfvl0HwDX5crSFb0nQSpcJWvAUzZt8NJ-XYMqj2igFMuRI_ssnZMB3uvag6jg5GCQGfuWquglrROpXfjj2MSLACCkF6jnEmVd7REaBPlVmtRPtLN_BzJOK89x_sKJSlwthpSEUp5vFvGapfa3HvQkYMSUTcbpLEY8va1K0jCe69TxCCDt1knNGzS6lGtDoGmw5W71Q-qlJSL6duFs6r--bmdM-6z9sjhzaFHtINWsWmE7_L0vqWstqOacnutmhEr87IK2NTPAwQ3dW-eSqzGko9quFEE1W-LWXEgMxIHw_GFHv9zTAg%3D%3D)**
My parents didn't risk their lives to come to America just for our great country to go down the same path as the Cuban regime they escaped, Fellow conservative.
**I need your help to take on the socialist Left and keep America free. I know how much you love America, and now, it 's time to put that patriotism into action.**
**[Join me today to defend American freedom and SQUASH socialism once and for all.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=62207f577e774438b38f09c8eb0e6ae5&_e=xNfvJmKFyVkPDAEz5aBR77cBhNZrqFdMluFr76NdAXRjyBZgfC9q2-_f7FZpx2f06yT4m3B7NuSIj3XEyH3gp3hQ9HxfU3VWdv-Yfvl0HwDX5crSFb0nQSpcJWvAUzZt8NJ-XYMqj2igFMuRI_ssnZMB3uvag6jg5GCQGfuWquglrROpXfjj2MSLACCkF6jnEmVd7REaBPlVmtRPtLN_BzJOK89x_sKJSlwthpSEUp5vFvGapfa3HvQkYMSUTcbpNgW1eoHCYKr_pCyRc597UhzYBt_KIy4G1FgQb_SzPr8LGMeXKErqGLvenpcANaRnyt0-JvXlGtrVLacdAMQzgbe70CY9NmE8Z_nUwpJioSzUt2Y0MyQ722l7iLqj3hOzKz6GkwaJnVQLnaWv5Umyuw%3D%3D)**

[**DEFEAT SOCIALISM NOW**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=62207f577e774438b38f09c8eb0e6ae5&_e=xNfvJmKFyVkPDAEz5aBR77cBhNZrqFdMluFr76NdAXRjyBZgfC9q2-_f7FZpx2f06yT4m3B7NuSIj3XEyH3gp3hQ9HxfU3VWdv-Yfvl0HwDX5crSFb0nQSpcJWvAUzZt8NJ-XYMqj2igFMuRI_ssnZMB3uvag6jg5GCQGfuWquglrROpXfjj2MSLACCkF6jnEmVd7REaBPlVmtRPtLN_BzJOK89x_sKJSlwthpSEUp5vFvGapfa3HvQkYMSUTcbpnTV0mlv_HzD16CGNQNSCZurEokR5k2tSGGvYABReESiH2zPJE2eUCv2oVeVLPdqGmZDr05ukcrrGEuClQ_fYE7Gz98gVWG9HY-0hrGEyVeABf1tx61T9h0qlCkim3SLDqT3M-Y2-ZPuwJqPNNpvnmg%3D%3D)

Fellow American -

Over the course of this election, I am laying my vision for an American national revival.

Here's one promise for you: I will end the weaponization of police power in America.

Time to stop complaining and actually *fix* the problem without apology.
1. Shut down + replace the FBI
2. Shut down + replace the IRS
3. Pardon all federal defendants prosecuted based on political motives. This includes Douglass Mackey & nonviolent January 6 defendants denied due process
4. Hold Congress accountable for taxpayer $$ used as hush money for sexual harassment claims
5. Publish the Jeffrey Epstein client list: the police state can't be weaponized to protect a select few.

Fellow American, if you agree, and want these policies debated on the main stage of the Republican Presidential Primary, then I need your help. **[Chip in $1 to build this movement toward our American revival.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=25009a20e516457aaf7c8a0faa30da32&_e=Mqs40jUF7FLixfxxa8pLYRs4TDQvumYaJTtWSpyW331woGzprNFVmI_FD3D4-ChiTJQjLOXyS0oalQ_FrAuF2osr2MUjUL_-DB7dGBnSokVkv3H0LjcxPzovga77uS_awP30zHXTkyfrBwEUiDZlnZlWHEZZtOpcFvctDGvJRvcP-LwAMZt-1J_ZLNfW3sm0UMb70vfONZNSr4O8RlDUSPg3i5vQIYvwHKUSpPBw48ZX9a0cunMOvVLZ2-TgzIZWsCsjKujoxh_Es-5keLHAwfwdtePX2zOZJET6fVL-tB8hOSF-eSLXfxNuIRcHsthEg1uqmctnyjOCxX3qokSgqUbpSqrnYuM3UBW7RJG5AluvUwp-u5qgUyjLzVvP1IwH)**

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

clean_body: It's time to stop complaining and actually fix the problem without apology. | Fellow American - Over the course of this election, I am laying my vision for an American national revival. Here's one promise for you: I will end the weaponization of police power in America. Time to stop complaining and actually fix the problem without apology. 1. Shut down + replace the FBI 2. Shut down + replace the IRS 3. Pardon all federal defendants prosecuted based on political motives. This includes Douglass Mackey & nonviolent January 6 defendants denied due process 4. Hold Congress accountable for taxpayer $$ used as hush money for sexual harassment claims 5. Publish the Jeffrey Epstein client list: the police state can't be weaponized to protect a select few. Fellow American, if you agree, and want these policies debated on the main stage of the Republican Presidential Primary, then I need your help. Thanks, Vivek Ramaswamy | GET TO KNOW VIVEK: Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam , along with his second book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence. He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution. Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved. In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics. | | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Vivek 2024 Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. Funds received in response to this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals without green cards, and federal government contractors are prohibited. She called for firing Biden’s new IRS agents and hiring 25,000 new Border Patrol and ICE agents. https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=bbb43efe83a1b7665e68007fbeca497be072d04965d992c041cfb975ef2cfc59980de1776b1b7d59c0e604f7c54d2740bc6ff7b8a84495dfd818c804055be002 https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=bbb43efe83a1b7665e68007fbeca497be072d04965d992c041cfb975ef2cfc59980de1776b1b7d59c0e604f7c54d2740bc6ff7b8a84495dfd818c804055be002 >" alias="WATCH NOW. >>" conversion="false" data-linkto="https://">WATCH NOW. >> Immigration https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=bbb43efe83a1b7660dadcc90f0c51396f34f233235a39f5fe1e33f5d4cb5243213a6d82e31d4c072f564df800e33c724d337f4c3b239fa26dec5e859a2ee37cb Gen. Don Bolduc: Nikki Haley will secure our border ( https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=bbb43efe83a1b7660dadcc90f0c51396f34f233235a39f5fe1e33f5d4cb5243213a6d82e31d4c072f564df800e33c724d337f4c3b239fa26dec5e859a2ee37cb New Hampshire Union Leader, 4/16/23) “Nikki Haley has the experience and determination to secure the border and stop the flow of illegal immigrants and deadly drugs. As governor of South Carolina, Nikki didn’t wait for the Obama administration to do something about illegal immigration. She tackled the issue head on. Only six months into her administration, Haley signed one of the toughest bills on illegal immigration in the country.” “Nikki laid out her plan for securing the border at her New Hampshire town halls. For those who are keeping count, it took Joe Biden two years to do that.” https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=bbb43efe83a1b76605809442adc2d11b16509a9c2f343eaf68e47c3b8b4243180b15b10d62b5cf88bb0eba304894057335ea7f0ff70c3c5a8cd9e438a25a07ef Read More → Washington Examiner: “@NikkiHaley responded to @SecMayorkas claim that the border is ‘secure’ with a video exposing a feeble chain link fence put up by the current administration.” ( https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=bbb43efe83a1b766b70bb8dcd5c44ae5626973063024c664643c5d74901049ff82243ccc2849a4f164ce10ebb8b28483a060ac48ca8a532fc9a8310907059e7f Twitter , 4/19/23) https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=bbb43efe83a1b766b70bb8dcd5c44ae5626973063024c664643c5d74901049ff82243ccc2849a4f164ce10ebb8b28483a060ac48ca8a532fc9a8310907059e7f Protecting Women’s Sports This week, the House passed a bill to protect women’s sports. Nikki Haley highlighted Joe Biden and the Democrats' woke agenda in a new video spotlighting the women’s rights issue of our time. https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=bbb43efe83a1b766413df55af43a01f95aa8c4bbfde5a0a433962b983919abd7af292166a7fdaffe36720dcbdcb37e42def40d588b85a54469a1b218b0857294 https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=bbb43efe83a1b766413df55af43a01f95aa8c4bbfde5a0a433962b983919abd7af292166a7fdaffe36720dcbdcb37e42def40d588b85a54469a1b218b0857294 WATCH NOW. >> Nikki has been an early and outspoken defender of women athletes and their right to a level playing field. In a 2021 National Review op-ed she wrote: “For generations, women fought hard to ensure that their daughters and granddaughters had a level playing field…and now the game is being rigged against women and in favor of biological men.” Nikki Haley in the National Review: We Must Protect Women’s Sports ( https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=bbb43efe83a1b7666e0dcfcd8d04bb5f6da40bbe8596c3b3c0fc7b432252af5fee25d8a3b3a457ebf5473d1734803770378b96bc21ed377990f3d4a519c1d734 National Review, 2/8/21) “Transgender kids deserve support and respect. The fact remains, however, that biological boys and girls are built differently. The best male athletes have a natural advantage over the best female athletes. You have to ignore science not to see it. The world’s fastest female sprinter has nine Olympics medals, but nearly 300 high-school boys are still faster than her. In states where biological boys compete against girls, the girls almost always lose — not just the match, but also possible college scholarships and a lifetime of success in their favorite sport. In states where biological boys compete against girls, the girls almost always lose — not just the match, but also possible college scholarships and a lifetime of success in their favorite sport. name: Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1e56da54356849df84e2f6e1cf9bd501&_e=IZIf39jvoNy1RzXLVIYEMyS64WjgzpmpQWSTd-3taNwJv6-rYzU2IqCilDDW9m6-hE8h63OxkJASuasQla76E65FjH4Ntx8nI8ydJqZffV-CHR3Q7b8cKaNLQuiqyWpK2g6Qmj7z_oQsdP_3bspJBGtgIsrpNq2bw2agrhJvF05L1kJYiltzizhcbV5YjdIfjqzz08DmB-bRaiqyOtPfA1GJRhvTXRrB5L_2spO7yMEKnT22s7yOUnn4RnMt_trU4vZsh7mcX5fEMf2xQ8Z4_3pRofcJtgyg6NXQUoeUnBchpJXBY9T2ZDszy1nnci84nh7dq2tBToQNom28USegu_SJj9kcaKiO3nt9AidU6URM0mK2Fl_JfLsJ7X_b9QJaB_kP2kQO6Wmsgrc2io8zrQ%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1e56da54356849df84e2f6e1cf9bd501&_e=IZIf39jvoNy1RzXLVIYEMyS64WjgzpmpQWSTd-3taNwJv6-rYzU2IqCilDDW9m6-hE8h63OxkJASuasQla76E65FjH4Ntx8nI8ydJqZffV-CHR3Q7b8cKaNLQuiqyWpK2g6Qmj7z_oQsdP_3bspJBGtgIsrpNq2bw2agrhJvF05L1kJYiltzizhcbV5YjdIfjqzz08DmB-bRaiqyOtPfA1GJRhvTXRrB5L_2spO7yMEKnT22s7yOUnn4RnMt_trU6_iWqMCAa5-jj6C_ThDI7PC4fOscvsZlTPx7LHmeiYqNIHoySVOD3b3cUJB3UAQpZbklE9ajixrw1faARE-Q5fsFu_nEP_oXa8m0PvZvBD-4CJYFDLZSvmBcuuw-RPdLokQE2gvC9KrgRNyOKmJbNQ%3D%3D) For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. clean_body: It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection. By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below: For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty. This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include: Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;" Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty; Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people; Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers. name: Full Mag News
subject: Victor Davis Hanson on DVD
body:
we're losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history

This sponsored message from Full Mag News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=586a30072a72485a97a9d9184f85f70e&_e=_hnl4dPvpvQNwkV2R0zW_pZAnwzcoP9-yKs4U27B9pYlJHGSe4CxVC8Pd1dKLUKXGB_8X-M1suapCaHcGobmpzdVaCwjnVKfeX-eGxx7E92Pxb3OcNZFahXfeFbDXGhlgdCjpwUKeYT4yLWU9vWZuw8DqbXFSbyq8ysB5XrANVmdw1vCjVkLjUuuvwB_yPh5OPIishuE9YpwRVq0aTuFSR83_xgTRao7noHTUputDxhqOysRScljtwNoyKSpahEhgnJLtxIL_CSr-nAW-u9DrXbbZUw_S9Gl-BrOuu-8K2bGhPwyCs3gHmc2AAvK-az9LKmmqu8DziCHJ3osiHRZ3Gwor73t1fFZ3-UydaZagD0CXOBOZGHOAoq8O_r8_l8z_oVDHQ3IH7pMDGVcOhtB7abyf9a8VHWAH_8cSS7M9Wk%3D) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we're losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important.
To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled "The Second World Wars."
Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict's diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=586a30072a72485a97a9d9184f85f70e&_e=_hnl4dPvpvQNwkV2R0zW_pZAnwzcoP9-yKs4U27B9pYlJHGSe4CxVC8Pd1dKLUKXGB_8X-M1suapCaHcGobmpzdVaCwjnVKfeX-eGxx7E92Pxb3OcNZFahXfeFbDXGhlgdCjpwUKeYT4yLWU9vWZuw8DqbXFSbyq8ysB5XrANVmdw1vCjVkLjUuuvwB_yPh5OPIishuE9YpwRVq0aTuFSR83_xgTRao7noHTUputDxhqOysRScljtwNoyKSpahEhgnJLtxIL_CSr-nAW-u9Dra3qJ_RPyZm7aPWrVvL4cHTsbI3q9adFixdvKhu_Jv_Jatwhnaca8fry6nugCvB483SYxvmoLJGp4o87CItq4U_8sV1BD3O79FwY9mwrwqkTzQ9_P8WN5CZs2AmYi6yfnha7240TXdC4VoVIYt9wFuI%3D) If you'd like to secure a DVD set before they're all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
Here's a secure link to reserve your copy of "**The Second World Wars** " on DVD:
**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=586a30072a72485a97a9d9184f85f70e&_e=_hnl4dPvpvQNwkV2R0zW_pZAnwzcoP9-yKs4U27B9pYlJHGSe4CxVC8Pd1dKLUKXGB_8X-M1suapCaHcGobmpzdVaCwjnVKfeX-eGxx7E92Pxb3OcNZFahXfeFbDXGhlgdCjpwUKeYT4yLWU9vWZuw8DqbXFSbyq8ysB5XrANVmdw1vCjVkLjUuuvwB_yPh5OPIishuE9YpwRVq0aTuFSR83_xgTRao7noHTUputDxhqOysRScljtwNoyKSpahEhgnJLtxIL_CSr-nAW-u9DrbTjibG9x7uSf48-vClR2ixYlvqNDJyseU12FhTPfIn1D8GX9tp6_FNvNP-H7ivrRxHQBbvEGViNxIHO85Nl5JQI-luFpTHyxbH_5AZ_J0kRyUN-jHS8cX3OC6YYfhYfh31FZnaRhKOJaaidH76Acvc%3D)**
Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!
Best regards,
Kyle Murnen, '09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College

name: Allen West
subject: Gun Rights 101
body:
Our Second Amendment rights are under attack.

| |
---
| | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c17379%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Q8TuIkljBLOfRLCIPeEn9Q&sysid=1)
---
| | Fellow American, Our Second Amendment rights are under attack. With each passing day it seems that Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi, and the radical left find another way to disparage and infringe on our right to keep and bear arms. Even worse, states like Michigan and Washington are passing unconstitutional gun control and red flag laws almost daily. It’s up to patriots like you and me to stand up and fight for our rights. And that’s exactly what the Second Amendment Institute (SAI) is doing. [**Will you join the battle to protect our right to keep and bear arms with a generous, tax-deductible donation today? For any gift of $58 or more we’ll send you the critically-acclaimed book Gun Rights 101 written by SAI President Tyler Yzaguirre.**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c17370%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=NhCHW2t7BToV%2f8VWuPkH8g&sysid=1) SAI exists to educate, activate, and empower individuals to be effectively mobilized for the 2nd Amendment. They fight on the front of the lines in defense of your second amendment rights with important lawsuits and a national college program called Students for Self-Defense. As part of their mission to educate and inform gun-owners and 2nd Amendment supporters across the country, Tyler Yzaguirre wrote a quick and easy-to-read book titled _Gun Rights 101_.
---
[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c17371%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=rD2ETRyYVGMPD2p2FOgPgQ&sysid=1)
---
In _Gun Rights 101_ you’ll find:
---
* Largest list of debunked gun control lies ever published in one book
* U.S. Supreme Court Second Amendment cases simplified with history and rationales
* Most extensive list of national gun rights and gun control organizations
* And much more!

---
Gun Rights 101 is aimed at folks who are just getting involved in the fight for gun rights as well as those who are already in the fray as it provides many useful summaries of court rulings. SAI relies on patriots like you to fund their programs, initiatives, and lawsuits. [**Which is why I’m asking you to make a freedom-saving gift of $58 or more today and in return, we’ll send you your very own copy of _Gun Rights 101._**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c17372%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=a4U0l3onP4cXyilvnvJiHg&sysid=1) You may have heard that SAI is funding several lawsuits against gun-grabbing liberals in Washington D.C. Metro. ** ****And soon, SAI will file a lawsuit against D.C.’s egregious “assault weapons” ban which prohibits residents from owning many rifles commonly used for home and self-defense.** But, as you likely know, filing lawsuits isn’t cheap and if one of these cases end up at the Supreme Court of the United States, the costs will likely exceed $100,000! clean_body: Our Second Amendment rights are under attack. | | | | | | Fellow American, Our Second Amendment rights are under attack. With each passing day it seems that Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi, and the radical left find another way to disparage and infringe on our right to keep and bear arms. Even worse, states like Michigan and Washington are passing unconstitutional gun control and red flag laws almost daily. It’s up to patriots like you and me to stand up and fight for our rights. And that’s exactly what the Second Amendment Institute (SAI) is doing. SAI exists to educate, activate, and empower individuals to be effectively mobilized for the 2nd Amendment. They fight on the front of the lines in defense of your second amendment rights with important lawsuits and a national college program called Students for Self-Defense. As part of their mission to educate and inform gun-owners and 2nd Amendment supporters across the country, Tyler Yzaguirre wrote a quick and easy-to-read book titled Gun Rights 101. In Gun Rights 101 you’ll find: Largest list of debunked gun control lies ever published in one book U.S. Supreme Court Second Amendment cases simplified with history and rationales Most extensive list of national gun rights and gun control organizations And much more! Gun Rights 101 is aimed at folks who are just getting involved in the fight for gun rights as well as those who are already in the fray as it provides many useful summaries of court rulings. SAI relies on patriots like you to fund their programs, initiatives, and lawsuits. You may have heard that SAI is funding several lawsuits against gun-grabbing liberals in Washington D.C. Currently, they’re fighting D.C.’s unconstitutional magazine ban on all magazines over 10 rounds, and the ban on concealed carry on the D.C. Metro. And soon, SAI will file a lawsuit against D.C.’s egregious “assault weapons” ban which prohibits residents from owning many rifles commonly used for home and self-defense. But, as you likely know, filing lawsuits isn’t cheap and if one of these cases end up at the Supreme Court of the United States, the costs will likely exceed $100,000! | | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. name: Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: this is what $5 means
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
| | |
---
Friend, I know that you probably get a lot of emails about grassroots donations. But today, will you give me just 30 seconds to explain what exactly your $5 donation means?
I first ran for office in a deep red district in upstate New York. When we flipped that seat blue against all the odds, I learned a fundamental truth about politics that has guided me ever since:** _Campaigns are won one voter, and one donation, at a time._**
You see, at the end of the day, photoshoots and consultants don't win elections. Votes do. And all the ways that we win those votes is what really matters — a yard sign in a neighbor's lawn, a mailer that offers solutions for the issues an undecided voter really cares about, a five-minute long phone call from a volunteer, a text that helps a busy mom vote by mail or a TV ad that reaches the right house at the right time. **_All those little moments add up to victory on Election Day._**
Building the resources to power that kind of campaign happens one grassroots donation at a time too. If you make a donation today, you can give us the resources to knock one more door, send another batch of GOTV texts or put up one more yard sign. If other folks chip in along with you, we'd have the resources to buy a TV ad spot or pay for a tour around the state to meet voters.
**New York Republicans just had their best election in decades, and with control of the Senate on the line in 2024, every single vote and every single donation will make all the difference for my campaign.** That's why I'm personally asking: [_Please, if you have anything to spare, will you invest in this people-powered campaign? I refuse to accept money from corporate PACs, so I truly rely on grassroots support from people like you._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62159238/402501335/-1386043057?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk4045-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMzdmNDhkNy0xYWUxLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4ln9jwviVBT9uT4jcNOmTYLJ4uP0z2hyKvGeZGQdFlE=)

clean_body: | | | Friend, I know that you probably get a lot of emails about grassroots donations. But today, will you give me just 30 seconds to explain what exactly your $5 donation means? I first ran for office in a deep red district in upstate New York. When we flipped that seat blue against all the odds, I learned a fundamental truth about politics that has guided me ever since: Campaigns are won one voter, and one donation, at a time. You see, at the end of the day, photoshoots and consultants don't win elections. Votes do. And all the ways that we win those votes is what really matters — a yard sign in a neighbor's lawn, a mailer that offers solutions for the issues an undecided voter really cares about, a five-minute long phone call from a volunteer, a text that helps a busy mom vote by mail or a TV ad that reaches the right house at the right time. All those little moments add up to victory on Election Day. Building the resources to power that kind of campaign happens one grassroots donation at a time too. If you make a donation today, you can give us the resources to knock one more door, send another batch of GOTV texts or put up one more yard sign. If other folks chip in along with you, we'd have the resources to buy a TV ad spot or pay for a tour around the state to meet voters. New York Republicans just had their best election in decades, and with control of the Senate on the line in 2024, every single vote and every single donation will make all the difference for my campaign. That's why I'm personally asking: = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = With gratitude, Kirsten | * | = A note from Kirsten: Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 – and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight is saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. = And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, = Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

name: Sarah Myhre
subject: Be part of the climate solution this Earth Day
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
body:
Act fast and get a signed copy of my art
| [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4533?t=3&akid=13308%2E53494%2E58rtB6) [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4533?t=4&akid=13308%2E53494%2E58rtB6) Friend, My name is **Dr. Sarah Myhre** , and I'm a printmaker, climate scientist, and organizer in Washington. **Like many of you, I struggle with the enormity and urgency of the climate crisis.** We live in a vulnerable time where so much is at stake, and we all must reckon with the crisis in our own way. As a scientist, I believe in evidence-based solutions. As a mom, I believe in doing all that we can to protect the future. And as a printmaker, I've found that creative work helps me bear witness and make meaning from the climate crisis, through expressions of love, grief, and interconnection. Earth Day is often co-opted by corporations, eager to greenwash their public image and convince us they are part of the solution. **However, the real solutions that I see are the ones that accelerate the transition to a thriving, just, and inclusive clean energy future—the work that is at the heart of Evergreen's mission.** That's why I'm partnering with Evergreen today to offer the first 50 people who donate a one-of-a-kind signed block print titled "We are still here." | [DONATE NOW](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4533?t=5&akid=13308%2E53494%2E58rtB6)
---
This piece is special to me because it depicts the northern Spotted Owl in a Douglas fir tree, and represents a bittersweet and narrow win for the environmental movement to protect old-growth forests in my home state of Washington (where Evergreen was founded).
This "win" ultimately came at the expense of working-class people, and it reminds me how we must not separate people from the planet we are working to protect if we want to enact meaningful change. This original print is a reminder, and a prayer, that the world is waiting for us to do the right thing; we are so close.
**As someone invested in building a more just, viable world, I deeply believe in supporting Evergreen's crucial work and urge you to join me.**
[**Your donation will support the bold policies we need to tackle the climate crisis head-on and deliver a thriving clean energy future for people and the planet.**](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4533?t=6&akid=13308%2E53494%2E58rtB6)
[DONATE NOW](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4533?t=7&akid=13308%2E53494%2E58rtB6)
---
In solidarity,
Sarah Myhre, Ph.D.
Climate scientist, printmaker, advocate

name: Conservatives Give
subject: Survey on an urgent matter
body:
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a66b366b2cd2463c9aa9530f4e907677&_e=v3z5UvBZ6rU_OCh4BCqN5ISrjFuJHKCm43GTO9FLqPXJ5x-GzaMGpyZkJ5T447RHOrrRFkzLEJGO_2FejmimnTVESEEp2qgkUDS-uwHEbbQVUH67JylMM60ixO7Iz8N4aPSKs2b61SkL31oCXtESG6MandzlLvKg1AtRYHkLJpcVGW2g2jMQugZqvt4H0p8OUaQ_aHSMjSMRKUsWTdSIxqxFkrjeKcaBwVmglrYOWucDbFGsmDzGFzChsVOnO7cj6SC1P0u8mBjIC9JozeBIIHP504xTCkR6RGnX3fnkt9iYgVNEvwnJfaWxpFHZBtX5c0lU8fsfBIokeGVQ0zeCsy3VTY_1oeWcC8T7rf6OvIgpR47C8HRC7yZ0RGtegKedodCXhC0lMqUW8zO3I2Tn1Q%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a66b366b2cd2463c9aa9530f4e907677&_e=v3z5UvBZ6rU_OCh4BCqN5ISrjFuJHKCm43GTO9FLqPXJ5x-GzaMGpyZkJ5T447RHOrrRFkzLEJGO_2FejmimnTVESEEp2qgkUDS-uwHEbbQVUH67JylMM60ixO7Iz8N4aPSKs2b61SkL31oCXtESG6MandzlLvKg1AtRYHkLJpcVGW2g2jMQugZqvt4H0p8OUaQ_aHSMjSMRKUsWTdSIxqxFkrjeKcaBwVmglrYOWucDbFGsmDzGFzChsVOnO7cjj3rgvOXnsSaNzvdaG21zbYdfHocwSFdZ7eWkWGEMOo5EV_dfTCbHioCCn1Cm0OIXkn8jk6Tcnm0j2FgdNhGCK9Uw52hQA6YI3szWIY7q8abXJaGlMQ6qdKbCmO8YR58FQt9Goc_p6yuAXuwL0PV3gQ%3D%3D) For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a66b366b2cd2463c9aa9530f4e907677&_e=v3z5UvBZ6rU_OCh4BCqN5ISrjFuJHKCm43GTO9FLqPXJ5x-GzaMGpyZkJ5T447RHOrrRFkzLEJGO_2FejmimnTVESEEp2qgkUDS-uwHEbbQVUH67JylMM60ixO7Iz8N4aPSKs2b61SkL31oCXtESG6MandzlLvKg1AtRYHkLJpcVGW2g2jMQugZqvt4H0p8OUaQ_aHSMjSMRKUsWTdSIxqxFkrjeKcaBwVmglrYOWucDbFGsmDzGFzChsVOnO7cj2pVsogoGv3KY822yYti89Ga7izWETTZGb8vQLXuIJYJ_sCVAeRBh2ugjZ_9wXLzEd5wJQv11hUl93i6zGpI47utShxFXZtqPBUEH6-DT99fDvt9Jg2kUdVpVwL39uqHzTlrL1gr2qNvjjuhCAage2w%3D%3D) And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Conservatives Gives
---

This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection. By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below: For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty. This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include: Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;" Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty; Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people; Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers. Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. name: Friends of the Earth
subject: URGENT EARTH DAY GOAL: Protect our wolves and our wilderness from trophy hunters and Big Oil!
body:
| | | | | [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e_s17_main_cobrandedemail_c3)
---|---|---

| | **Dear Friend,** | **Vulnerable wolves are being hunted in droves. Donate $27 now to help us reach our $180,000 Earth Day goal by midnight tonight! ** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [$27 donation + $27 match = $54 impact](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1735662?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[$50 donation + $50 match = $100 impact](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1735663?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[$100 donation + $100 match = $200 impact](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1735664?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1735665?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Tiny paws wander across the snowy forest floor. These innocent wolf pups don’t notice the steel traps lurking beneath. They don’t know they just crossed state lines, into an area where they can be legally killed. They don’t have time to react as the metal rips into their paws, splattering the snow red. **Their lives have barely begun, and now they’re in a struggle to survive.** **[No innocent creature should endure this: Donate $27 immediately and help us reach our $180,000 goal by midnight on Earth Day to help protect vulnerable wolves and the planet, and it will be matched dollar-for-dollar, up to this goal.](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1735666?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) **
This scene is common in Northern Rockies states that border Yellowstone. There are no safeguards to keep gray wolves safe from vicious trophy hunters who are killing off innocent and vulnerable wolves in droves -- and using the most inhumane of hunting practices.
The situation is dire, Friend, but there’s still hope for vulnerable wolves. Thanks to members like you, we can still make real change happen and protect wolves before it’s too late. But trophy hunters are doubling down against protections for these precious animals, so we need to _act now and give them a fighting chance. _
**These vicious hunting practices can’t continue. Help protect wolves and our planet this Earth Day: Rush your $27 donation now and have double the impact! **
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[$27 donation + $27 match = $54 impact](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1735662?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[$50 donation + $50 match = $100 impact](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1735663?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[$100 donation + $100 match = $200 impact](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1735664?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1735665?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Wolves had begun to make a slow but promising recovery over the past six decades. Last year, three baby wolf pups were born to the only wolf pack left in Colorado. The pups were **suspected to be the first wolves born in Colorado in 80 years. **
Protected by the state, they were a symbol of hope for repopulation efforts. But wolves aren’t bound by state lines -- the second they set their tiny paws onto Wyoming soil, they become _**vulnerable to the most brutal hunting practices we’ve seen. **_
Sure enough, three mangled, bloody young wolf carcasses were found across Wyoming state lines.
Not even wolves in Yellowstone are safe from the pattern. **The park recently lost a record high of 25 wolves, leaving only 89 behind.** Yet the states that border Yellowstone still have no safeguards to keep gray wolves safe from vicious trophy hunters and their inhumane practices!
In states like Montana, Idaho, and Wyoming, wolves are **dynamited in their dens** while nursing their pups. Baby wolves are left **bleeding out in steel traps and slowly choking to death on snares** in a futile attempt to escape. Trophy hunters unleash bloodhounds on them, which **_tear their flesh apart while they whimper and yelp for help that won’t come._** Will you join us and help answer their cries for aid?
**Help protect vulnerable wolves from brutal hunters before it’s too late. Donate $27 immediately and help us reach our $180,000 goal! **
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[$27 donation + $27 match = $54 impact](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1735662?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[$50 donation + $50 match = $100 impact](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1735663?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[$100 donation + $100 match = $200 impact](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1735664?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1735665?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Wolves are intelligent creatures that are vital to their ecosystems. They help keep elk and deer populations in check, allowing other plant and animal species to flourish. The remains of their kill redistribute nutrients and feed scavengers. They truly are a keystone species!
Yet, trophy hunters and Big Oil lobbies are pushing against protections for these precious creatures, hoping to kill them for sport and develop their habitats for the sake of corporate greed. Their actions have contributed to the gutting of the Endangered Species Act and protections for wolves, bears, and other vulnerable species -- and now, only **6,000 wolves remain in the lower 48 states.**
For trophy hunters, it’s not enough to just take the lives of innocent wolves -- they resort to helicopter chases and torturous snares that fill a wolf’s last hours with **_panic, dread, and insurmountable pain._** To make matters worse, wolf pups are left orphaned after their mothers are gunned down in the woods. They can suffer from **_hypothermia, starvation, and predation_** without the protection of their mothers.
Friend, your membership gift today can help push the Biden administration to put federal protections in place to save wolves from these vicious attacks and at the same time, we’ll work to protect the public lands and planet that wolves and their web of life rely on.
But we are facing pushback from private trophy-hunting interests and Big Polluters, and we need to step up our efforts before it’s too late. The Endangered Species Act is one of the few protections that stands in the way of the fossil fuel and agriculture industries polluting communities, driving climate chaos, and harming biodiversity across the country. If the GOP attacks on the ESA succeed, these harmful industries will have an even easier time drilling, fracking, mining and operating massive factory farms. **[If just 1 of every 10 people reading this contributes, we can reach our $180,000 Earth Day goal -- will you rush your $27 donation now?](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1735667?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)**
**Protect the remaining wolves from greedy private interests. Donate $27 before the clock strikes midnight and help us reach our $180,000 Earth Day goal for the planet. **
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[$27 donation + $27 match = $54 impact](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1735662?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[$50 donation + $50 match = $100 impact](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1735663?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[$100 donation + $100 match = $200 impact](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1735664?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1735665?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Standing with you,
Nicole Ghio
Senior program manager fossil fuels,
Friends of the Earth**
|

name: Team Brown
subject: $400 billion toward clean energy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shontel Brown for Congress
body:
Democrats are making historic investments in protecting our environment.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62143657/402457159/-849735382?refcode=EM_PET_230422EarthDay_N_SB_90DO_4_NG_TESTB_logo&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYzU2YzkzMy0wNWUxLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9OVclUzDjrURrOCv76eSUXvyU7ukqRtJNuPO-pA0Q6Q=) Happy Earth Day, Peter!

As we celebrate our home and stress the importance of environmental protections, we wanted to reflect on the groundbreaking progress Shontel and Democrats in Congress have made in the fight against climate change.

In 2022, Democrats passed the Inflation Reduction Act, making America’s largest investment in history to combat climate change. With nearly **$400 billion in funding toward clean energy,** we’ll see lower energy costs for families, accelerated growth in clean energy solutions, and a significant reduction in our emissions. And, Peter, just yesterday, **President Biden announced his plan to establish the Office of Environmental Justice** , _spearheading the revitalization of communities that have faced environmental injustice through racial discrimination for too long. _

But while we commend these historic investments in our climate reality, the GOP is pushing to undermine our progress. In their campaign to roll back regulations, **the GOP is chipping away at critical portions of the Inflation Reduction Act.**

That’s why we’re calling on you, Peter, to send the GOP a strong message that we won’t let them continue destroying our environment and letting our people suffer along the way. [**_Will you sign Shontel’s petition demanding the GOP end their assault on climate change initiatives to ensure our planet is protected and environmental justice is served?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62143658/402457160/1228193065?refcode=EM_PET_230422EarthDay_N_SB_90DO_4_NG_TESTB_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYzU2YzkzMy0wNWUxLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9OVclUzDjrURrOCv76eSUXvyU7ukqRtJNuPO-pA0Q6Q=&emci=eb27c34d-54e0-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=fc56c933-05e1-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=23746811) [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62143659/402457161/1228193065?refcode=EM_PET_230422EarthDay_N_SB_90DO_4_NG_TESTB_b1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYzU2YzkzMy0wNWUxLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9OVclUzDjrURrOCv76eSUXvyU7ukqRtJNuPO-pA0Q6Q=&emci=eb27c34d-54e0-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=fc56c933-05e1-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=23746811) We're in this together,

Team Brown | As a Cuyahoga County Council member and Chairwoman of the Cuyahoga County Democratic Party, Shontel Brown has spent the last decade serving the people of Ohio and building coalitions. Now, as the Congresswoman for Ohio’s 11th District, she will fight for affordable quality health care, jobs that pay fair wages, a strong public education system, and equity and justice for all. **Will you join her and be the change we need?**

clean_body: Democrats are making historic investments in protecting our environment. = Happy Earth Day, Peter! As we celebrate our home and stress the importance of environmental protections, we wanted to reflect on the groundbreaking progress Shontel and Democrats in Congress have made in the fight against climate change. In 2022, Democrats passed the Inflation Reduction Act, making America’s largest investment in history to combat climate change. With nearly $400 billion in funding toward clean energy, we’ll see lower energy costs for families, accelerated growth in clean energy solutions, and a significant reduction in our emissions. And, Peter, just yesterday, President Biden announced his plan to establish the Office of Environmental Justice , spearheading the revitalization of communities that have faced environmental injustice through racial discrimination for too long. But while we commend these historic investments in our climate reality, the GOP is pushing to undermine our progress. In their campaign to roll back regulations, the GOP is chipping away at critical portions of the Inflation Reduction Act. That’s why we’re calling on you, Peter, to send the GOP a strong message that we won’t let them continue destroying our environment and letting our people suffer along the way. We're in this together, Team Brown | As a Cuyahoga County Council member and Chairwoman of the Cuyahoga County Democratic Party, Shontel Brown has spent the last decade serving the people of Ohio and building coalitions. Now, as the Congresswoman for Ohio’s 11th District, she will fight for affordable quality health care, jobs that pay fair wages, a strong public education system, and equity and justice for all. Will you join her and be the change we need? = Paid for by Shontel Brown for Congress Shontel Brown for Congress PO Box 221232 Beachwood, OH 44122 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: Lincoln's secret weapon
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills

| This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=288ebd823f3441e8aece767490f97e33&_e=4MTpxWWXMFQRDD6GN52HJZ9pDrcEkPQ5aHwy_cn3ZhMOlXTmygs6NmqM03OtxAw8hXmO56DYyz8tzLnMkJkdDt3ABCP3BPof5GQ-6q16ZFlo7ktMtsY7BS0aqvNy5qKID4nKYCM9YVVhAZkPvLQ84T-AI4dOVYrSY5fWS5i3TlmrUnGQTdf7NUmxAwpe2-uZnDRpWMDm4BapqVr83kLqTdyZsge1KqewYpPdlylGcx_PCySvyjbLQQ_XUkQHv57OM7rXvrzOWhoHSsuhnSmlcE8ww4DqiqRihaO7P-7S_aR23YGMY5033z1sN17pQSiPWx7tYReSYTaZuXfMeSLrIUDpnUDv4XT56z--PzNrXe8XcB1itGWeCcBl6ArpAmG8exd_WlgmXiebTgPvUeakPwijAjGe7CQQ8Nf086i1wgI%3D)
---
| | Dear fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father's cabin, and did not return until he could "give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight."
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly--plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That's why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **" Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry." **
Through** "Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,"** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** ** ** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=288ebd823f3441e8aece767490f97e33&_e=4MTpxWWXMFQRDD6GN52HJZ9pDrcEkPQ5aHwy_cn3ZhMOlXTmygs6NmqM03OtxAw8hXmO56DYyz8tzLnMkJkdDt3ABCP3BPof5GQ-6q16ZFlo7ktMtsY7BS0aqvNy5qKID4nKYCM9YVVhAZkPvLQ84T-AI4dOVYrSY5fWS5i3TlmrUnGQTdf7NUmxAwpe2-uZnDRpWMDm4BapqVr83kLqTdyZsge1KqewYpPdlylGcx_PCySvyjbLQQ_XUkQHv57O1SNm5UUqNOj7LvGYrSZ3l-YAcNXoQOfqTIWXGd99HuXU6jY0TnNTzDrfN__kkaEqXTAUYccSDxsUQ8km6ODigXTgb_XBrv9j8QH-dYMJfyDh1NZaPSVSiEPQ9WxTQDJenbgRX52pckFapa6wLEpsUqi--3aTBnpUOYFFHTPkJmE%3D)
---
| | That's why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I've included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=288ebd823f3441e8aece767490f97e33&_e=4MTpxWWXMFQRDD6GN52HJZ9pDrcEkPQ5aHwy_cn3ZhMOlXTmygs6NmqM03OtxAw8hXmO56DYyz8tzLnMkJkdDt3ABCP3BPof5GQ-6q16ZFlo7ktMtsY7BS0aqvNy5qKID4nKYCM9YVVhAZkPvLQ84T-AI4dOVYrSY5fWS5i3TlmrUnGQTdf7NUmxAwpe2-uZnDRpWMDm4BapqVr83kLqTdyZsge1KqewYpPdlylGcx_PCySvyjbLQQ_XUkQHv57OYcLzIVxyA3ZAFxIfkaicxKyEND3KjlPk4vIL2gQE1z1OLR33GycPyUEwCqef6JkCneN5yMEgp8a09gNs52G2U_5k2JWP1aJDGqaq0oMn4NCevJbrz3AYgh4ed8_ZP2ZDJDunYea6Jj7YeESrR9FT6mCfQ16DGayaMVohloeaLgw%3D)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Reclaiming American Freedom
