clean_body: Take the 2024 Republican Platform Survey >> I need patriots I can trust, Friend. My Senate Republican colleagues and I just left a BIG 2024 Election meeting, but we ran into a problem - we needed more up-to-date information to make better strategic decisions. I'm entrusting YOU with completing the because of your excellent track record of providing valuable input for the Conservative movement. Your opinions, concerns, and interests are CRITICAL to formulating our 2024 campaign platform. We can only WIN in 2024 when we create an agenda that best represents the will of the American people. You'll be the voice of your fellow patriots in your area, so we're counting on your quick response. 2024 is the most important election of our lifetime. We can't afford another defeat like the one we had in 2022. The is our way of correcting our missteps and ensuring a GOP victory next year. Please don't let our Party down, friend. We're counting on you. body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=039653e8351046fd8a8a9a0ab01f6ab5&_e=L3InURd8LlFuEbAp5Si78Tkpb2n7Gha75yXyGX4WPhslVd1G7miamZPhW-w2sdtbExxbI6vIpNffk4dB6rW9M0jiBhBR0K27iSB0RGJfYfchXV1GKwGHzPY93ahywd8T7nQrxzeJO76aYZNEaD8qn_2VW88JtIrCi-sc1te81z4D9_73LZWpRxn0jZnV_JsCskRAxRwXOniyovuS5-4OkNoaQ2smBEbGGf7-5YpozBP4sDXEn1f1Dcgx1l0xdl6gD9sEUmMaiYts_5DrwZ3bqw%3D%3D)

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=039653e8351046fd8a8a9a0ab01f6ab5&_e=L3InURd8LlFuEbAp5Si78Tkpb2n7Gha75yXyGX4WPhslVd1G7miamZPhW-w2sdtbExxbI6vIpNffk4dB6rW9M0jiBhBR0K27iSB0RGJfYfchXV1GKwGHzPY93ahywd8TbjWp6WZM-s97UKN-UJFzD4JvRiGFR0GBf2lTxjlK-0gHh9QG7bj5KuUxE3BjB7XH8Jp-UQR07Ik9jhjVQmrwB0_Ri_V4hKZqbW-P4L7d1MI54DJFHylZAJ_GROjMfrnV68VcyRLUNlPMuPKNKKM4_A%3D%3D)

Friend, Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells? They sing the national anthem. And they have sung this song proudly every night for more than 700 straight nights. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag. We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need. The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts! We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them. But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them. Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no " deadly insurrection." The video evidence proves it for many! This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before. It's time to act and help to support these families. My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families? Click below to show your support today! Support the January 6th Families Email: dpwillis67@gmail.com Donor Status: MISSING Goal: 1,000 Donors I launched the Kash Foundation to offer legal help to America First families like the ones from the Jan 6th witch hunts. I know what it's like. I've been the target of the government gangsters in the Department of Justice myself. I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump. The FBI used innocent protestors to push their agenda. Now they are doing everything they can to hide any evidence that they tried to provoke the protesters. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, I will do everything in my power to help out. Friend, I 'm humbly asking you to help us get justice for the Jan 6th detainees and set them free. Please hurry. And as moving as it is to hear them sing every night from their prison cells, it will sound so much sweeter when they can sing our national anthem underneath the stars with their freedom restored. For Freedom, Kash Patel The Kash Foundation is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit. All donations are tax-deductible. Conservative Liberty Wire 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: Riley Gaines
subject: They gave Lia Thomas the trophy all for a photo-op…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
It gets worse:When I tied with Lia Thomas - down the hundredthof a second - I was told that the NCAA hadn't planned for a tie and that Thomas had to have the trophy for photo purposes...

| |
---
| | | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1e83b54bf48c4a3881fbff24fc628cab&_e=CzXbzqLWP6Y37YKHCumJ-H7qyI2XGm623Vajc4LHZWvtjS__zNagjVusBIpIvA3EzaScx_PGySbf6XFv1uHOR9ee5tDzQ0Wz_PvLTcE-G6v3ZbMDAGgjBkuuY01tw5KX_vl-V4HyT1FyComSQT8zB_hgSlb_aTRsHZITjEYLkrFJivZOq0MZFY1osuZkbGXd3NHvBXdVbxxUdlg0w0nbGRThEygEykVE6NUnrW4S7IgqAVknzWDorgmvNiU6JAAawgq4lTBczo6oeBHgIB8AJ3G5wMAB_Ha42dzlPuumoeAINwSDeeOHclfKS6wbeUNAs3YPVv04M_QPHryD5QjyG4ugPt3mqjdRI55ti5rmQvbqvbOHUPuxl1tjWqAVrFAN-ULHpjdMNVClJT7R76HnxZGo3ECNY1ZZEjXhjesJjs2YUMsHbgCLsX6CVv8V79A4IOuckjXwQPiHW3mATwb61Q%3D%3D)
---

My name is Riley Gaines. I'm a 12 time All-American swimmer with 5 SEC titles under my belt after my time at the University of Kentucky.

After college, my dream was to become a dentist. Unfortunately, my life completely changed when I was forced to share a locker room with and compete against biological male Lia Thomas at the 2022 NCAA Women's Swimming Championship.

**It gets worse:** When I tied with Lia Thomas - down the _hundredth_ of a second - I was told that the NCAA hadn't planned for a tie and that Thomas had to have the trophy for photo purposes...

My story is not unique. Unfortunately, countless young girls and women like myself are being sidelined as biological males infiltrate and dominate our competition.

**That 's why I'm taking a stand against Democrats' attacks against women's sports.**

_The "Party of Science" doesn't believe in biological differences.
The "Party of Women" doesn't support women.
Democrats are erasing our dreams in the name of wokeness._

Fortunately, Republicans in the House have introduced a bill that would codify the protections that women have been able to count on for generations, ensuring that biological girls will have an equal playing field. Together, we're making it clear we will not stand for discrimination against girls and women in sports. But Joe Biden is threatening to do just the opposite - to cement into law the destruction of women's sports...

So, I'm humbly asking on behalf of millions of female athletes dreaming big - **[will you stand with me?](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1e83b54bf48c4a3881fbff24fc628cab&_e=CzXbzqLWP6Y37YKHCumJ-H7qyI2XGm623Vajc4LHZWvtjS__zNagjVusBIpIvA3EzaScx_PGySbf6XFv1uHOR9ee5tDzQ0Wz_PvLTcE-G6v3ZbMDAGgjBkuuY01tw5KX_vl-V4HyT1FyComSQT8zB_hgSlb_aTRsHZITjEYLkrFJivZOq0MZFY1osuZkbGXd3NHvBXdVbxxUdlg0w0nbGRThEygEykVE6NUnrW4S7IgqAVknzWDorgmvNiU6JAAawgq4lTBczo6oeBHgIB8AJ3G5wMAB_Ha42dzlPuumoeAINwSDeeOHclfKS6wbeUNAcm0pr752zVYrnRbuld89YDLxQ43e0LL2d07vUkhjBkrJI8VKo5G0bfbE31mvruRni6Vyz-_KJDZZ72rRffyJmYRkp83ogGNHdVOZtcgviU4450JFdRMza4bTl60krIFAaO0OCHpV9mfJuvpv8FEoTg%3D%3D "will you stand with me?")** If we fail, I fear this could be the end of female athletic competition as we know it...

---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Douglas=20Carswell?=
subject: Our free market wins are improving Mississippi – and here’s the proof
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/leadershipacademy-8132988?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
|
Dear Friend,

**Mississippi is on the up. Our state has risen five places in terms of current economic outlook and now ranks 22nd out of all 50 US states.**

According to research by ALEC, the American Legislative Exchange Council, [Mississippi’s economic prospects are now brighter than those of either Alabama or Louisiana.](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=78364983d3&e=5703353baa) We are only just behind South Carolina.

**_ALEC’s report shows that the policies that the Mississippi Center for Public Policy has successfully advanced are having a direct positive impact on our state._**

Over the past couple of years, the Mississippi Center for Public Policy has had three major accomplishments. We played a key role in:

* **Cutting the state income tax** to a flat 4 percent.
* **A universal occupational licensing law** to remove red tape in the labor market.
* **Making the case for less government** in Jackson, with a series of hard-hitting reports on reducing bureaucracy.

**ALEC’s report proves that our free-market policies are working. **

Following our successful “Axe the Tax” campaign, Mississippi now ranks 20th out of 50 states in terms of having the most favorable personal income tax regime. Interesting, ALEC’s report suggests we have the 14th best corporate income tax system.

**Our universal occupational licensing reform has not only made it easier for folk from outside Mississippi to find work here.** It has created momentum inside our state to remove some of the unnecessarily onerous red tape. For example, the legislature recent issued a report suggesting that we might be able to do away with the barber board.

Over the past few years, Mississippi has seen a reduction in the number of people on the public payroll. According to ALEC’s report, there are still 606 public employees per 10,000 people in our state. That might still be high, but it is lower than it used to be.

Looking at ALEC’s report, one thing really stands out; **the southern US states are where the growth is.**

**All the southern US states, with the exception of Louisiana, are in the top half of the country in terms of economic outlook.** At the bottom of the league table in terms of economic outlook are at California (45th), Illinois (46th) and New York (50th).

This is clear evidence that economic momentum in America is shifting from the historic hubs in the northeast, mid-west and west coast to the South. According to this new report, Mississippi is starting to become part of this southern success story!

What we have accomplished over the past few years has had an immediate impact – but it is not enough. **Our mission is to ensure even lower taxes, further deregulation and smaller government for our state.**

If we can continue to achieve further wins for liberty in Mississippi, our state will continue to become more competitive.

Have a wonderful weekend!
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=115163aa94&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| | |
---
Warm regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO

---
|
---

subject: Do you know your Earth Day status?
body:

---|---|---

| | Today is Earth Day, and there’s never been a more powerful moment to stand up for the future of our planet. But time is running out for you to make a difference before our rare match opportunity expires. Our planet is reaching a terrible tipping point. From doubling down on fossil fuels to ramping up plastic pollution, corporations are still prioritizing profits over our Earth and destroying the fragile ecosystems that sustain us. We're part of the world's largest grassroots environmental network fighting Big Polluters for a just, sustainable future. That’s why today only, a group of generous donors will match every gift -- dollar for dollar -- up to our $180,000 Earth Day goal. We’re counting on you to help make the most of this opportunity. **We pulled your supporter record, and here’s what we found: ** | | [ ](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1735746?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---

**MATCH EXPIRING: 11:59 p.m.**
**YOUR EARTH DAY DONATION: NOT YET. [GIVE NOW](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1735747?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)** **DONORS NEEDED FROM YOUR AREA: 20**

We set our ambitious $180,000 goal because our planet and our very future are in a dire situation. But right now, we’re falling dangerously short of our goal, and this match expires at midnight TONIGHT.
Falling short means limiting our fight to protect public lands, preserve life-sustaining waterways and defend vulnerable species -- including bees and other insect pollinators we depend on to preserve our fragile food system. That's why we're counting on your support today.
**Time is running out to secure a sustainable future, Friend \-- and the stakes are simply too high to just wait and see. name: Andy Kim
subject: From my family to yours: Happy Earth Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andy Kim for Congress
body:
As a father, some of my proudest moments have been seeing my kids interact with nature. Their enthusiasm and amazement is contagious. Every encounter with a bird or insect opens their eyes a little wider to what our world has to offer.

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-andy-kim?refcode=2023-04-22-earthday&recurring=0&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=c71b004e-0de1-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-andy-kim?refcode=2023-04-22-earthday&recurring=0&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=c71b004e-0de1-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73]

Seeing my kids develop a growing appreciation for our planet fills me with joy. I hope all our kids have the opportunity to fall in love with nature.

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-andy-kim?refcode=2023-04-22-earthday&recurring=0&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=c71b004e-0de1-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-andy-kim?refcode=2023-04-22-earthday&recurring=0&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=c71b004e-0de1-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73]

We owe it to our children, grandchildren, and all the generations to come to create a world that fosters life, inspires them, and ignites their curiosity. So I'm focused on policies that lower carbon emissions and find clean energy solutions.

Will you support our growing movement to protect our planet for future generations with a donation this Earth Day? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-andy-kim?refcode=2023-04-22-earthday&recurring=0&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=c71b004e-0de1-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73]

I'm honored to stand with you in this fight.

From my family to yours, Happy Earth Day,

Andy

subject: Cry me a river

It’s obvious that Jim Jordan is wasting everyone’s time
| [](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/16796?t=6&akid=1770%2E564421%2EGGn7sT) Hey, it’s Eric Swalwell. Jim Jordan wants you to believe that conservatives are _victims and are targeted unfairly by the federal government._

Cry me a river.

**That’s pretty rich coming from an insurrectionist-backer and Trump puppet like Jordan, who is hell bent on distorting the truth and facts about January 6th.**

Now, he’s using his role as Chair of the Subcommittee on the Weaponization of the Federal Government to make martyrs out of the very people who actually weaponized our democracy.

I won’t stand for it.

[**Join my fight to take back the House and ensure Jim Jordan and his committee of insurrectionists don’t get another opportunity to stand in the way of justice in 2024 by splitting a donation between me and Ron Be Gone today »**](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/16798?t=8&akid=1770%2E564421%2EGGn7sT) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Eric Swalwell and Ron Be Gone will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $3 »](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/16804?t=14&akid=1770%2E564421%2EGGn7sT)

The GOP's attacks on reproductive freedom are coming from every corner of America.
**FIRST:** After decades of lobbying, the far-right Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade,__ sparking multiple states to enact immediate abortion bans.
**THEN:** Far-right lobbying groups bullied the courts system to overturn FDA authorization of mifepristone, an abortion pill people all across the country rely on – even affecting people in progressive states.
**NOW:** Infamous Florida governor Ron DeSantis signed a six-week abortion ban into law – making abortion illegal before most people even know they're pregnant!
These shameless attacks on our reproductive freedom can't continue.

We're working around the clock to hold Republicans accountable and defeat them at the ballot box.

**That's why we launched a petition to show that the majority of Americans support protecting reproductive rights. We set a goal of receiving 5,000 signatures, but we're still missing yours. So, please, stand up NOW before our midnight deadline:**

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62147884/402472187/1844526888?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjQwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNTQwNDAxOS0xMGUxLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GYfVLdrpKTujyKCQ86hrijblUh_8m3gPRTxMbBusWvc=) Peter**,**

name: Election Day Alerts
subject: Voter ID Petition
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elect Common Sense
body:
| You need an ID to do almost everything in America - but not to vote?
Elections across the country are just months away, and we STILL don't have nationwide VOTER ID.
It's insane.
[**That 's why we're asking you right here, right now to answer this one question: Do you support voter ID in EVERY state across the country?**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62595062:6nUNFRGN0:m:1:3371812801:A1E5944794FDEE291DF89193B3A85578:r)
---
| [ ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62595062:6nUNFRGN0:m:1:3371812801:A1E5944794FDEE291DF89193B3A85578:r)
---
| [ **YES - DEMAND VOTER ID** ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62595062:6nUNFRGN0:m:1:3371812801:A1E5944794FDEE291DF89193B3A85578:r)
---
| [ **NO - NO ID NEEDED** ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62595062:6nUNFRGN0:m:1:3371812801:A1E5944794FDEE291DF89193B3A85578:r)
---
We need to protect our elections. We need voter ID IMMEDIATELY before it's too late.
[**Please answer now.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62595062:6nUNFRGN0:m:1:3371812801:A1E5944794FDEE291DF89193B3A85578:r)
Our elections won't be secure unless something is done.
| |

name: Jon Tester
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-tester [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-tester]
Hey folks, Jon Tester here.
I’m not like most of my colleagues in the Senate, and it’s not too hard to see why. All you have to do is look at my $12 flattop haircut and my collection of dirt-stained t-shirts.
I’m the Senate’s only working farmer, and damn proud of it.
Yes, it can make for early mornings and late nights during planting and harvest seasons — but it keeps me grounded, and gives me a unique perspective on issues. Like how climate change affects my farm, or how rural communities like mine need high-speed internet.
These are real challenges that deserve real solutions, and that’s what I’m fighting for in Washington. But political experts rank my seat as one of the most likely to flip red, so I need your help to beat the odds and win this critical race:
Can you split a donation between Seth Moulton and my campaign? We need to raise another $1,000,000 to reach our goal. Anything you can give helps. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-tester]
Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-tester]
This will be one of the most competitive races of 2024, and I’ll need your help from the very beginning to build a team strong enough to win.
Thank you,
Jon
Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-tester]

subject: Former CIA Director John Brennan called her a dangerous security risk, unfit to be in the House. Will you join us in taking that first step towards removing Greene from office?
body:
fight this treason

| | | | | Peter, _We all know Marjorie Taylor Greene, the racist, anti-Semitic, anti-gay, ignorant, cruel & incompetent loudmouth is unfit to be in Congress. _**_Yet, she just proved again, and I don't say this lightly: She. Is. A. Dangerous. Traitor._** **_The FBI arrested Justin Teixeira, a white supremacist who burrowed his way into the Air National Guard, stole and shared sensitive, classified secrets online about the war in Ukraine. It helped seditionists and genocidal madman Putin, while endangering Americans around the globe._ ** **_The utterly repulsive Greene immediately defended this scumbag traitor_** , _tweeting that President Biden was persecuting Teixeira because he's "white, male, Christian" and pro-Russia. Here's former Rep. Liz Cheney's response:_ [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9f5e50c6-9a40-4e22-9dc1-d33d0b88a28f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Former CIA Director John Brennan called her a dangerous security risk, unfit to be in the House. We must remove her._ **_Sadly, Greene's from a gerrymandered, pro-Trump district. Yet, we have Stacey Abrams. She already proved she can change the tide of history, when her group, Fair Fight, did such an amazing job registering and turning out Georgia voters that President Biden won there in a shocker, as did Senators Warnock (twice) & Ossoff. _** [**_Fair Fight's still changing political gravity in Georgia, and making Marjorie Taylor Greene the face of the GOP nationwide, an albatross. Will you join us in taking that first step towards removing Greene from office by giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to Stacey Abrams' Fair Fight?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7d4fc12b-248f-4f38-8cb7-cff3de351938/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Thank you for fighting for a Democratic America and against treason._ Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. [“Ranked choice voting is the product of millions of dollars from non-Alaskan, dark-money advertisements, which were spoon-fed to Alaskans by a barrage of ads before the election.” ](https://f69e.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=644420aea547b40d93980d15&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.adn.com%2Fopinions%2Fletters%2F2023%2F03%2F05%2Fletter-end-ranked-choice-voting%2F%3Ffbclid%3DIwAR0rh087RsDvZkhljKpaIwKYLeJ90GPwpDxCSeDQ5wlOlobKQOs1WynmmiY&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_6435212787a1780fe275d62c&l=en-US&s=F6Tu2lRIuW6yrwl27tsMsu0_XrE%3D) Letter To The Editor Anchorage Daily NewsAs recently as January, House Speaker Kevin McCarthy trashed the system [during a podcast appearance with Donald Trump Jr.](https://f69e.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=644420aea547b40d93980d15&u=https%3A%2F%2Frumble.com%2Fv27a5jw-1-on-1-with-the-speaker-of-the-house-in-nancy-pelosis-former-office.html&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_6435212787a1780fe275d62c&l=en-US&s=Mx_sOJpzdN9EbBnApEktZpPeJHM%3D) Business Insider["Someone could get the most votes, and not win!" said McCarthy. "So if you come in 3rd, you win. What? 'I got a lot of second votes, I got a lot of 3rd vote — what does that mean?'"](https://f69e.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=644420aea547b40d93980d15&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.businessinsider.com%2Fsarah-palin-cpac-election-system-house-seat-ranked-choice-voting-2023-3%3Ffbclid%3DIwAR3Jknc7C6zK7VNe7krxknXbi80F8gFjREiHTI3U8mtD-8C3OFMn-GWQoVA&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_6435212787a1780fe275d62c&l=en-US&s=gmlogF_HnhufcK3-OUkYzx0OgH4%3D) Business Insider
---
#### **Help Us Gather Signatures Today, Sign Up On Our Website or Send Us an Email!!!**
---
#### [**Click Here to See Our Store and Show Your Support**](https://f69e.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=644420aea547b40d93980d15&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.alaskansforhonestelections.com%2Fstore%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D6435212787a1780fe275d62c%26ss_email_id%3D644420aea547b40d93980d15%26ss_campaign_name%3DToday%252C%2BFairbanks%252C%2BSoldotna%252C%2BJuneau%2BSigning%2BEvents%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2023-04-22T18%253A00%253A25Z&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_6435212787a1780fe275d62c&l=en-US&s=4gyPsnnoI4sl98mIq-I5Bh5rNKg%3D)
---
#### **More Signing Dates Below, Make Sure To Share with Friends & Family**
---
There will be petitions available at this event at the Palmer Train Depot
---
---
|
---
**admin@alaskansforhonestelections.com or call 907-802-8116****We only need 26,000 signatures, which is the lowest amount in history since we had the lowest turnout by percentage in history. Rank Choice Voting has made our job even easier. Let’s Do This Alaska.****If you would like to help us collect signatures, please sign up here** https://www.alaskansforhonestelections.com/petition-signatures**The Pro Rank Choice Voting group paid $300k and used mostly out of state signature gatherers, we want this done “By Alaskans, For Alaskans”**
---
#### **An Alaska Senator has said that our Bill is the Most Important Bill for the 2024 Election. We need you to get there. Help us Today!!!**
---
### **Sign In Person Today**
#### **Want To Sign The Petition To Get Repeal Rank Choice Voting!!!**

There are 40 House Districts, we need at least 35 or 75% of the districts. Attached is a breakdown of how many signatures we need per district. We will need signature gatherers in each district. The sign up link is the only way we can keep track of all of the people who are getting petition books. The group that passed Ranked Choice Voting in 2020 spent over $300,000 just on the signature gathering process, they paid an out of state firm to gather signatures here in Alaska. We want to have Alaskans in charge this time around. They collected 40,000 signatures, we want to collect 75,000.
Link to sign up for a Petition Book
[https://www.alaskansforhonestelections.com/petition-signatures](https://f69e.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=644420aea547b40d93980d15&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.alaskansforhonestelections.com%2Fpetition-signatures%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D6435212787a1780fe275d62c%26ss_email_id%3D644420aea547b40d93980d15%26ss_campaign_name%3DToday%252C%2BFairbanks%252C%2BSoldotna%252C%2BJuneau%2BSigning%2BEvents%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2023-04-22T18%253A00%253A25Z&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_6435212787a1780fe275d62c&l=en-US&s=7GDg0d2Z9YfoE0N9onkG9HJyiP4%3D)Please use the link below to find your house district or include your address if you do not know your house district. Scroll to the bottom and it has a search by address, which should tell you Your House and Senate Representatives.
[https://akleg.gov/Districts.php](https://f69e.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=644420aea547b40d93980d15&u=https%3A%2F%2Fakleg.gov%2FDistricts.php&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_6435212787a1780fe275d62c&l=en-US&s=HzjBfDNJylQE48wz0dCGxPMbq0I%3D)**To get involved please email**[**Admin@AlaskansForHonestElections.com**](mailto:admin@alaskansforhonestelections.com?subject=Newsletter%20Contact)
---
### Please Share with Friends, Family, and Co-Workers!
---
[_ _ Call Us or Text Us Here _ _](tel:+19078028116)
---
[_ _ Email Us Today _ _](mailto:info@alaskansforhonestgovernment.org?subject=Newsletter)

name: Jason Miyares
subject: from public school teacher to public servant
body:
This type of experience would be difficult for anyone, but Tara came out on top.
---
| | | | | | | Friend, Tara Durant had an intense encounter during the "summer of love" in 2020. She and her daughter were surrounded by a violent, angry mob in downtown Fredericksburg. Rioters surrounded her vehicle and damaged her car. It was that exchange that propelled this former school teacher to run for public office. It's because of that experience I know she will _always_ stand with law enforcement and work to keep our families and communities safe. **And that 's why I'm proud to endorse Tara for the Virginia Senate.**
---
| | [ ](https://click.email.miyares-for-virginia.com/?qs=1247f2009048bfb0d3dd8c91f4ce8ae63e1382e26707a6efc35e3b709b70a7c6c913e05bc977b2e50220adfde46ae7561ad64645bc2cb776)
---
I know Tara will be a force to be reckoned with and she will do everything in her power to help me uphold the rule of law in the Commonwealth. **[Chip in now to help me and Tara bring law and order back to Virginia.](https://click.email.miyares-for-virginia.com/?qs=1247f2009048bfb05f6d44c6654ed71ffd01bed2181e3bb7bc04d35cd72c443dca9548d97f79e8e02683705bacfb08b0d75446eb9bf095e7 "Chip in now to help me and Tara bring law and order back to Virginia.")**

clean_body: This type of experience would be difficult for anyone, but Tara came out on top. | | | | | | | Friend, Tara Durant had an intense encounter during the "summer of love" in 2020. She and her daughter were surrounded by a violent, angry mob in downtown Fredericksburg. Rioters surrounded her vehicle and damaged her car. It was that exchange that propelled this former school teacher to run for public office. It's because of that experience I know she will always stand with law enforcement and work to keep our families and communities safe. And that 's why I'm proud to endorse Tara for the Virginia Senate. | | I know Tara will be a force to be reckoned with and she will do everything in her power to help me uphold the rule of law in the Commonwealth. "Chip in now to help me and Tara bring law and order back to Virginia." | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Thank you, Jason Miyares Virginia Attorney General

name: Mark
subject: I’m running in 2024
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Robinson
body:
It is official! I've just launched my campaign for Governor to defeat Joe Biden & his handpicked liberal poster boy.

| |
---
| | |
Patriot,

**It is official! I 've just launched my campaign for Governor to defeat Joe Biden & his handpicked liberal poster boy. **

I'm not afraid to say that I'm a proud Christian, and America First conservative.

---
| [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b99c4668248d4bd095843e5e0088587c&_e=NYhJHKwGn_WxFCZQlpmqZsaPemG5PEJfRTWrlvE8L_dtPfMWjMpkPo0SEsC4Xstue_iFXXrMeUgU57JWUvRJQzSjMZudG1Ex7ajT5FSPsviNQa7rh27MB9wLHVw5X_I9ZbsVO72ddKXIFaQIMpwXOIYegiiuJ5BbbkMjkA4wPYdfKzvPzte4zSVg8dluJGA9nGIwIi12XDnRyMQP29bNGsTOirPGSFuhQnuCYgXs5la1lkj76V9ThNRMDMWxmijEHPyAzNUHW8woVvV7RGw9AVTQDcgVguxvmWAmx38DRgkKrMC3Nr0qrY6wUdqTMohwE9pDoK_sNU1_2oKgyse0Dl3FDaX-cXtKX1mRwDkOg2dRWVn2FTtSphPOaavggNpG6tvQWF2oY0sFSYU4jZ4_edb8iOOMR_mLYgJCOjcfNnXbgEiSj_SbK0NCz2jXagVtJmVEvqxjGKQ9NyJuoqMOfw%3D%3D)
---

And if you didn't already notice, I'm a black American.

Joe Biden, the Democrats, and the liberal media will tell you that as a black American, I can't be any of those things.

They think folks like me can't think for ourselves. They think we should just fall in line and do as we are told.

And now they want me to just sit down and shut up, and they'll do anything to destroy me for being a free-thinking man that undermines their sacred narrative.

It won't be long until they're running wall-to-wall coverage saying our silent majority is dead. Now, I'm ready for what they're going to hit me with- but that doesn't make fighting back any easier.

clean_body: It is official! I've just launched my campaign for Governor to defeat Joe Biden & his handpicked liberal poster boy. | | | | | Patriot, It is official! I 've just launched my campaign for Governor to defeat Joe Biden & his handpicked liberal poster boy. I'm not afraid to say that I'm a proud Christian, and America First conservative. | And if you didn't already notice, I'm a black American. Joe Biden, the Democrats, and the liberal media will tell you that as a black American, I can't be any of those things. They think folks like me can't think for ourselves. They think we should just fall in line and do as we are told. And now they want me to just sit down and shut up, and they'll do anything to destroy me for being a free-thinking man that undermines their sacred narrative. It won't be long until they're running wall-to-wall coverage saying our silent majority is dead. Now, I'm ready for what they're going to hit me with- but that doesn't make fighting back any easier. So I 'm humbly asking you to take just a few seconds today and endorse my campaign right out of the gates. | | | Let's show Biden and the liberal media that our movement is strong, and our movement is serious. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62153992/402489994/227139380?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNGEzMDYzZi0xNmUxLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3estylHJ0-Kj272EYojWATpAXV6u2IXvfi_J8Q1UK60=&emci=e58d4357-cbde-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=34a3063f-16e1-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=43566853)

| | Peter,

We get a lot of questions in our inbox from all our supporters, so we figured we’d give all y’all some answers to the most frequently asked questions.
1. _Why do you send so many emails?_ (Probably our most frequently asked question!) – Because it’s important. We rely on small-dollar donors pitching in every opportunity they can, and every email we send is an opportunity to give. We don’t expect our donors to pitch in every time we ask, but [**_if even a handful of people pitch in right now, that goes a long way toward funding our program.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62153993/402489995/710125701?refcode=20230422.1_GADems_4AR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNGEzMDYzZi0xNmUxLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3estylHJ0-Kj272EYojWATpAXV6u2IXvfi_J8Q1UK60=)**_
2. _Why don’t you email more about policy issues?_ To be frank – because a majority of our audience doesn’t donate to emails about policies, and to accomplish our goals, we need resources. We believe in being open with our supporters, so we try to highlight the contrast between us and our extreme GOP opponents.
3. _Why do you send split donation requests for out-of-state candidates?_ It’s important to win in battleground states across the country and to support our Democratic allies everywhere, not just in Georgia. If we want to keep the Senate blue, we’ve got to pull together and support strong Democrats everywhere.

We need you on our side, Peter, because the races ahead are only going to get more challenging as the GOP ramps up their work in Georgia.

We’ll try our best to keep you informed and keyed into our strategy, [**_but we also need your help as we work to keep Georgia blue. What do you say, can we count on you?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62153994/402489996/710125701?refcode=20230422.1_GADems_4AR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNGEzMDYzZi0xNmUxLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3estylHJ0-Kj272EYojWATpAXV6u2IXvfi_J8Q1UK60=)**_

– GA Dems

subject: Your thoughts on education in America
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vsX1iaiDNi

Hillsdale College

I'm sure you've seen
it in the national news, but I'd like to reiterate: There is
serious hostility towards the founding principles of liberty on
too many college campuses.

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osX1iaiDNi

Please
see a special message from our sponsor:

Fellow American,

I'm sure you've seen it in the national news, but
I'd like to reiterate: There is serious hostility towards the
founding principles of liberty on too many college campuses.

Many college students are not taught the true
meaning of terms like "Freedom" and "Equality." They are
accepting false promises of free college and health care and
voting for candidates who wish to embrace that fantasy. This is
evidenced by recent polling data, which shows that 70% of
Millennials say they are likely to vote socialist.

Worst of all, many students on college campuses
refuse to engage with those whom they disagree-instead, they
resort to intimidation, threats, and rioting in a manner that
incites violence.

I'm curious to know what you think about the state
of higher education in America. If you have a few minutes, I'd
love to ask you a few questions about America's education system,
and whether the damage to it can be repaired.

Take the survey now >>
https://lp.hillsdale.edu/higher-education-survey/

Take the Survey

Warm Regards,

Larry P. Arnn

President, Hillsdale College

Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844

Hillsdale
College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

name: Brown, Sherrod
subject: I'll be honest with you, friend
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF SHERROD BROWN
body:
I grew up in Mansfield, Ohio, in a community of ironworkers, carpenters, autoworkers, and electricians.
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62154771/402491302/691330013?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk110-fr-nd-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMjE1NmNhNi0xNmUxLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pIfKs2WGzWOLdYJNnkjKWKzWK6x-aTpmthtX_R_T9r4=)Hi friend – before I ask you to chip in to help me win in Ohio and keep the Senate blue, I need to take a moment to explain why I'm in this fight and what your grassroots contribution would mean today. I grew up in Mansfield, Ohio, in a community of ironworkers, carpenters, autoworkers, and electricians. I spent summers working on my family's farm. Today, I live in Cleveland with my wife, Connie, and our two rescue dogs, Franklin and Walter. **I’ll be honest with you, friend:** The Ohio I live in now looks a lot different than the one I grew up in. Over the years, we've seen manufacturing jobs shipped overseas because of bad trade deals, prices skyrocketing as wages failed to keep up, and hopes for a comfortable retirement dashed. That's why I've devoted my life to fighting for the Dignity of Work – the idea that hard work should pay off for everyone, no matter who you are, where you live, or what kind of work you do.
**Every day in the Senate, I'm fighting for _you._ B****ut I’m facing my toughest race yet, and I need your help to win.** **[Will you chip in $5 or more now – before our critical 48–hour fundraising deadline – so I can keep up the fight in Ohio and defend the Senate for Democrats?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62154774/402491303/691330013?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk110-fr-nd-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMjE1NmNhNi0xNmUxLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pIfKs2WGzWOLdYJNnkjKWKzWK6x-aTpmthtX_R_T9r4=)**

Right now, Mitch McConnell and the GOP need to flip only two seats to retake Senate control – and experts at _Politico_ say it could all come down to Ohio. Last year’s Senate race here was one of the most costly in the nation, and _NBC News_ reports this one could be “even nastier and more expensive.”
**That's why I simply cannot win this race – and Democrats simply cannot hold on to our narrow Senate majority – without grassroots support from folks like you. As one of the most vulnerable senators in the country, I'm personally asking: **

**[Will you please rush $5 now – or any amount that's meaningful to you – to help us hit our ambitious $50,000 goal, power our reelection campaign to victory, and keep the Senate blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62154778/402491304/691330013?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk110-fr-nd-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMjE1NmNhNi0xNmUxLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pIfKs2WGzWOLdYJNnkjKWKzWK6x-aTpmthtX_R_T9r4=)**
This is gonna be a heck of a fight, but with you by my side, I know we can beat the odds and continue making much-needed progress for workers and families. Thanks for being on our team.

With gratitude,

Sherrod
| | [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62154780/402491305/691330013?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk110-fr-nd-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMjE1NmNhNi0xNmUxLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pIfKs2WGzWOLdYJNnkjKWKzWK6x-aTpmthtX_R_T9r4=)
---
**Please read on for a personal message from Sen. Sherrod Brown: **Friend – thank you for being a part of our grassroots movement and for sharing our commitment to the Dignity of Work.

Fighting for workers means building an economy that prioritizes the needs of workers over tax breaks for billionaires and corporations. No matter who you are or what kind of work you do, I promise to fight for you. But I need your help: Experts say I'm one of the most vulnerable senators up for reelection and Senate control could come down to Ohio. The only way we can defend this critical seat is with grassroots contributions from supporters like you.

**[If you're with me in this fight, please chip in any amount today to win in Ohio and defend our Democratic Senate majority.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62154783/402491306/-1256022338?refcode=email-footer&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMjE1NmNhNi0xNmUxLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pIfKs2WGzWOLdYJNnkjKWKzWK6x-aTpmthtX_R_T9r4=)**

Thank you!

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Earth Day Alert: Bee-killing neonics could be approved for the next 15 years
body:
| | | | | [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e_s17_main_cobrandedemail_c3)
---|---|---

| | **Dear Friend, ** | **Act now before we lose vulnerable pollinators forever: Donate $27 before midnight and help us reach our $180,000 Earth Day goal! ** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [$27 donation](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1735964?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[$50 donation](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1735965?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[$100 donation ](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1735966?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1735967?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
An "insect apocalypse."
A "second Silent Spring."
A "catastrophic collapse of nature's ecosystems."
This is how scientists are describing the loss of bees and other insects. **[The time to act is now: Donate $27 or more and help us meet our $180,000 Earth Day goal for pollinators and the planet! When you do, your gift will be matched, dollar for dollar -- but only until midnight TONIGHT.](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1735968?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)**
Neonicotinoid pesticides are a key driver of this crisis. They can impact bees' ability to navigate and reproduce and even kill bees on contact. But they're also the most widely used insecticides in agriculture.
The EPA has a chance to ban neonics once and for all. Instead, it might **_approve these pesticides for another 15 years._** But there's still hope, Friend. Because of supporters like you, we have the chance to make real change -- change that would help protect bees, people, and the planet. Will you join us in this fight?
**Help get bee-killing pesticides out of our food system. Donate $27 immediately and help us reach our $180,000 goal before midnight TONIGHT! **
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[$27 donation](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1735964?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[$50 donation](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1735965?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[$100 donation ](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1735966?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1735967?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Bees play a crucial role in their ecosystems. From fields of blooming wildflowers to rows of veggies on organic farms, these insects and others aid in plant reproduction. Many of these plants support an entire web of life by offering habitat and food for countless other species.
We rely on bees and other pollinators for 75% of the world's food crops, including the most nutritious -- so when we lose bees,**we also lose some of the foods that keep us healthy!** In fact, the decline in bees and other pollinators has already harmed global fruit, vegetable, and nut production. Without access to these vital crops and a healthy diet, people could be at higher risk of _**heart disease, stroke, diabetes, and even cancer, according to a recent study.**_
There's no mystery here. Study after study has found that the massive use of pesticides, like Bayer-Monsanto's bee-toxic neonicotinoids, are key drivers in the decimation of pollinators.
But pollinator-killers like Bayer-Monsanto are sweeping their lethal impact under the rug -- and the United States EPA is giving them a free pass, allowing widespread use of toxic pesticides instead of shifting away from chemicals we KNOW are killing massive numbers of bees.
**Stop the downward spiral of vulnerable pollinator populations. Donate $27 or more to Friends of the Earth today! **
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[$27 donation](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1735964?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[$50 donation](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1735965?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[$100 donation ](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1735966?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1735967?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Bees are a canary in the coal mine, signaling that the toxic way we produce food is on a deadly track. We must act NOW to protect our health and ensure that we are not among the last generations to share the planet with countless species of wild bees.
At Friends of the Earth, we are doing everything we can to help save pollinators, protect our health, and stop the destruction of our planet. We're working to ban toxic pesticides that are driving the decline of bees and butterflies. At the same time, we're pushing major grocery companies like Kroger to stop selling food grown with these chemicals. With your help and membership support today, we can win.
But the bees are running out of time -- **and they need you. **
If we don't stand up to Big Ag now, we could stand to lose _hundreds_ of wild bee species in North America alone. It's up to you to help prevent a world without these vulnerable pollinators. Please, Friend, we need you by our side as we ramp up our efforts to save wild bees from extinction and protect our planet.
**Act now to give pollinators a fighting chance. Rush your $27 donation while it can still be matched, and help us reach our $180,000 Earth Day goal before the clock strikes midnight.**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[$27 donation](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1735964?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---

---
[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1735967?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Standing with you,
Kendra Klein
Deputy director of science,
Friends of the Earth **

name: Brandon Williams
subject: Supporting Parents’ Role in Education
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brandon for Congress NY 22** ](https://d2z3Y104
body:
Every parent has the right to make decisions about their children's education, and the Parents Bill of Rights will ensure these rights can never be questioned.
|
---
Peter, Every child deserves access to a quality public school education, regardless of where they live, and their parents have an important role to play. The education our children receive today is essential in preparing them for their futures. I am committed to working tirelessly to ensure our public schools are free from political indoctrination and are accountable to parents. It’s vital that parents have a say in their children's education. That's why I recently spoke in support of the Parents Bill of Rights Act. Every parent has the right to make decisions about their children's education, and the Parents Bill of Rights will ensure these rights can never be questioned. It’s time we make sure our schools are educating, not indoctrinating our children. The Parents Bill of Rights says that public school curriculum cannot be abused for political indoctrination. It also makes taxpayer money spent on public schools public information, ensuring greater transparency and accountability in our education system. It also makes sure that parents are notified immediately of any violent activity at their child's school, so they can stay informed and take action if necessary. Recently, I’ve been under attack from Democrat groups. Already, they are targeting my race, heavily funding opposition to distract from what we are accomplishing. I’m proud of the work we have done so far, but there’s still much more to do. I need your support so we can stay focused on important issues like our children’s education. clean_body: Every parent has the right to make decisions about their children's education, and the Parents Bill of Rights will ensure these rights can never be questioned. | Peter, Every child deserves access to a quality public school education, regardless of where they live, and their parents have an important role to play. The education our children receive today is essential in preparing them for their futures. I am committed to working tirelessly to ensure our public schools are free from political indoctrination and are accountable to parents. It’s vital that parents have a say in their children's education. That's why I recently spoke in support of the Parents Bill of Rights Act. Every parent has the right to make decisions about their children's education, and the Parents Bill of Rights will ensure these rights can never be questioned. It’s time we make sure our schools are educating, not indoctrinating our children. The Parents Bill of Rights says that public school curriculum cannot be abused for political indoctrination. It also makes taxpayer money spent on public schools public information, ensuring greater transparency and accountability in our education system. It also makes sure that parents are notified immediately of any violent activity at their child's school, so they can stay informed and take action if necessary. Recently, I’ve been under attack from Democrat groups. Already, they are targeting my race, heavily funding opposition to distract from what we are accomplishing. I’m proud of the work we have done so far, but there’s still much more to do. I need your support so we can stay focused on important issues like our children’s education. Your gift today will support my campaign and the work you sent me to Washington to accomplish. I refuse to put working for you on the sidelines to be a full-time fundraiser as many in Congress do. But if I’m going to stay in the fight and stay on the job - I need your help today. Thank you for your support and commitment to ensuring that our children receive the best education possible, and that their parents have a strong voice. For common sense and a stronger future, Congressman Brandon Williams www.letsvotebrandon.com | Brandon for Congress NY 22, 628 N Main Street, North Syracuse, NY 13212, USA, 315-220-0121

name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: We can’t leave this to chance
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
Peter — We wanted to make sure you saw the latest on the Texas
case on abortion medication:

The Supreme Court has decided to continue the stay on the potential ban on
mifepristone while the full appeal is pending.

This is just a band-aid solution to a much bigger problem. The only way we
can stop this, and any future attempts from anti-choice groups to take
away our fundamental rights, is to pass federal protections once and for
all.

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/signup/2304_PASSTHEWHPA_Petition?refcode=AU_STB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230421_PM1_V1_S1&t=1003&akid=203%2E35263%2EKr5E5e ]That’s why I’m hoping you’ll sign on as a citizen co-sponsor of the
Women’s Health Protection Act, my legislation to protect reproductive
rights. It’s high time for the Senate to pass this bill.

The fight for our fundamental rights will not stop until everyone,
regardless of where they live, has safe and practical access to abortion
care.

Thank you for standing with me,

Tammy

------------------Forwarded message------------------
From: Tammy Baldwin
Date: Friday, April 14, 2023
Subject: Good and bad news

[2]Tammy Baldwin for Senate

Team — Since Roe v. Wade was overturned last year, it feels like we’ve
been on a rollercoaster of abortion access being repealed and expanded
from state to state across the country. I wanted to share some recent news
about reproductive rights in our country, and how I’m using my voice in
the Senate to protect abortion access.

The bad news: Last week a federal judge in Texas severely restricted
access to abortion medication — ignoring science and siding with far-right
extremist stances. Just yesterday, Florida passed an incredibly
restrictive six-week abortion ban.

In so many states, women are losing the ability to make choices over their
own bodies and health. But even during these dark moments, there are
glimmers of hope:

The good news: A little over a week ago, Wisconsin elected Janet
Protasiewicz, ending the Wisconsin Supreme Court’s conservative majority.
We are hopeful that this big win will get us one step closer to
overturning the horribly outdated 1849 law on abortion our state is held
to.

Across the country, more and more people are supporting pro-choice
candidates and policies. I’m hearing it on the campaign trail, and I’m
putting it into action:

The next step: While reproductive rights are being stripped from women
nationwide, it’s high time we pass federal protections for abortion. That
is why I reintroduced the Women’s Health Protection Act in the Senate, and
I’m doing everything I can to get this bill onto President Biden’s desk.

I’ve said this once and I'll say it again: every American, no matter their
zip code, should be able to make decisions about their bodies, healthcare,
and future. Now, I'm hoping you’ll stand beside me and support me in the
fight ahead.

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/signup/2304_PASSTHEWHPA_Petition?refcode=AU_STB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230421_PM1_V1_S1&t=1004&akid=203%2E35263%2EKr5E5e ]Peter, add your name to my petition for the rapid passage of
the Women’s Health Protection Act in the Senate.

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/signup/2304_PASSTHEWHPA_Petition?refcode=AU_STB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230421_PM1_V1_S1&t=1005&akid=203%2E35263%2EKr5E5e ]PASS THE WHPA

I’m working day and night to achieve the progress Americans deserve,
including the fight to pass the Women’s Health Protection Act.

It’s time we lead the charge to restore abortion access in America once
and for all.

Thank you for supporting our movement every step of the way.

— Tammy

P.O. BOX 696 MADISON, WI 53701

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1001&akid=203%2E35263%2EKr5E5e ]www.tammybaldwin.com | [ mailto:INFO@tammybaldwin.com ]INFO@TAMMYBALDWIN.COM | [ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/68?t=1002&akid=203%2E35263%2EKr5E5e ]Privacy Policy

PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE

http://act.tammybaldwin.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=203%2E35263%2EKr5E5e

this is an embarrassment to New Jersey [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62160426/402506706/-2052849?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQyMzEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzE5MTdmNWEtMWVlMS1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=aXC5bnbF1VlyVxbHNv-G4O040-_8hz_vMFagBMrBIl4=&emci=ecc87370-79df-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=31917f5a-1ee1-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=10498376) | Peter, As a Mayor, I get things done with integrity and transparency. I have to look my constituents in the eye every day. So let me tell you, it absolutely outrages and disgusts me as a New Jerseyan to see our elected Senator in Washington fundraising for a “legal defense fund”. Peter, it’s just embarrassing and the opposite of what public service stands for. I can’t fix a sidewalk by breaking the law – so it’s fairly logical that Bob Menendez shouldn’t serve as a Senator if he’s under investigation for clear bribery and corruption. So while Bob raises money for a legal defense fund, I’ll keep hitting the campaign trail to talk to voters and to raise money from individuals. **If you’re with me, please chip in now:** [_**secure.actblue.com/sig4senate/donate422**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62160436/402506708/-1437131847?refcode=SIG-NJ-SEN_EMAIL_22042023_FR_Actives_Bob-Kicker&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQyMzEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzE5MTdmNWEtMWVlMS1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=aXC5bnbF1VlyVxbHNv-G4O040-_8hz_vMFagBMrBIl4=) Thanks, Joe __**PREVIOUS MESSAGE:**__ **_BREAKING: NJ Sen. Robert Menendez Setting Up Legal Defense Fund _****_Tied to Federal Investigation_** _– NBC4 New York_ [_**We deserve a U.S. Senator who is free from corrupt corporate and criminal interests, Peter. Joe Signorello is a son of New Jersey, Roselle Park's mayor, and a transparency champion who will fight for OUR interests in Washington. Chip in now to help us stay on track →**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62160438/402506720/-1437131847?refcode=SIG-NJ-SEN_EMAIL_22042023_FR_Actives_Bob-Kicker&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQyMzEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzE5MTdmNWEtMWVlMS1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=aXC5bnbF1VlyVxbHNv-G4O040-_8hz_vMFagBMrBIl4=) [CHIP IN FOR JOE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62160439/402506721/-1437131847?refcode=SIG-NJ-SEN_EMAIL_22042023_FR_Actives_Bob-Kicker&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQyMzEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzE5MTdmNWEtMWVlMS1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=aXC5bnbF1VlyVxbHNv-G4O040-_8hz_vMFagBMrBIl4=)
* * *
Sh*t has hit the fan for Senator Bob Menendez, as Warren Zevon would say. But Peter, while this story isn’t about lawyers, guns, and money – _okay, maybe the lawyers and money_ – it is about our Democratic Senator here in New Jersey, who launched his very own legal defense fund this week! While Senator Bob Menendez fundraises to pay lawyers, researchers, and god-knows who else to keep him out of jail and shielded from an ongoing federal corruption investigation – our grassroots campaign is talking with voters all across New Jersey about the issues that matter to them. Our elected officials have long had a love affair with bribery, criminal corruption, and corporate special interests. **The working folks of New Jersey are the ones who suffer, lacking a representative in Washington who is focused on the issues and fighting for them.** _Peter, we’re not here to ask you to chip in for our legal defense fund – because we don’t have (or need) one!_ [_**Instead, we’ll ask you to contribute to our grassroots campaign to elect a corruption-free Senator like Mayor Joe Signorello.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62160442/402506723/-1437131847?refcode=SIG-NJ-SEN_EMAIL_22042023_FR_Actives_Bob-Kicker&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQyMzEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzE5MTdmNWEtMWVlMS1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=aXC5bnbF1VlyVxbHNv-G4O040-_8hz_vMFagBMrBIl4=) [DONATE NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62160444/402506726/-1437131847?refcode=SIG-NJ-SEN_EMAIL_22042023_FR_Actives_Bob-Kicker&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQyMzEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzE5MTdmNWEtMWVlMS1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=aXC5bnbF1VlyVxbHNv-G4O040-_8hz_vMFagBMrBIl4=) Onward, **— Signorello HQ** |
* * *
_I'm Joe Signorello. I’m the Mayor of Roselle Park, New Jersey, and I’m running for U.S. Senate in 2024. Bob Menendez is an embarrassment to the people of the state of New Jersey, but for the last couple of years, we’ve had no other option – nobody’s been willing to step up to him. **I'm ready to get to work!**_ _Once we leave the corrupt politics of the past behind, we can move forward with progress and have a smart, efficient government with the ability to make positive change for everyone.**I need your support to build our grassroots movement — [so please chip in what you can right now!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62160445/402506728/244492595?refcode=email-footer&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQyMzEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzE5MTdmNWEtMWVlMS1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=aXC5bnbF1VlyVxbHNv-G4O040-_8hz_vMFagBMrBIl4=)**_ [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62160447/402506729/244492595?refcode=email-footer&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQyMzEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzE5MTdmNWEtMWVlMS1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=aXC5bnbF1VlyVxbHNv-G4O040-_8hz_vMFagBMrBIl4=) Our email list is an important tool for us to reach Democrats and activists in New Jersey and around the country. clean_body: this is an embarrassment to New Jersey | Peter, As a Mayor, I get things done with integrity and transparency. I have to look my constituents in the eye every day. So let me tell you, it absolutely outrages and disgusts me as a New Jerseyan to see our elected Senator in Washington fundraising for a “legal defense fund”. Peter, it’s just embarrassing and the opposite of what public service stands for. I can’t fix a sidewalk by breaking the law – so it’s fairly logical that Bob Menendez shouldn’t serve as a Senator if he’s under investigation for clear bribery and corruption. So while Bob raises money for a legal defense fund, I’ll keep hitting the campaign trail to talk to voters and to raise money from individuals. If you’re with me, please chip in now: = Thanks, Joe PREVIOUS MESSAGE: BREAKING: NJ Sen. Robert Menendez Setting Up Legal Defense Fund Tied to Federal Investigation – NBC4 New York = = Sht has hit the fan for Senator Bob Menendez, as Warren Zevon would say. But Peter, while this story isn’t about lawyers, guns, and money – okay, maybe the lawyers and money – it is about our Democratic Senator here in New Jersey, who launched his very own legal defense fund this week! While Senator Bob Menendez fundraises to pay lawyers, researchers, and god-knows who else to keep him out of jail and shielded from an ongoing federal corruption investigation – our grassroots campaign is talking with voters all across New Jersey about the issues that matter to them. Our elected officials have long had a love affair with bribery, criminal corruption, and corporate special interests. The working folks of New Jersey are the ones who suffer, lacking a representative in Washington who is focused on the issues and fighting for them. Peter, we’re not here to ask you to chip in for our legal defense fund – because we don’t have (or need) one! = = Onward, — Signorello HQ | I'm Joe Signorello. I’m the Mayor of Roselle Park, New Jersey, and I’m running for U.S. Senate in 2024. Bob Menendez is an embarrassment to the people of the state of New Jersey, but for the last couple of years, we’ve had no other option – nobody’s been willing to step up to him. I'm ready to get to work! Once we leave the corrupt politics of the past behind, we can move forward with progress and have a smart, efficient government with the ability to make positive change for everyone.I need your support to build our grassroots movement — =** = Our email list is an important tool for us to reach Democrats and activists in New Jersey and around the country. If you no longer wish to receive emails from us, please use Paid for by Signorello for Senate 508 Sherman Ave. Roselle Park, NJ 02704 United States

name: Rep. John Ray Clemmons
subject: Join our fight today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tennessee House Democratic Caucus, Gloria Johnson Treasurer
body:
https://www.everyaction.com/ [https://www.everyaction.com/]
Dear Peter,
Our legislative session has come to an end. As I reflect on this session, I am reminded of the determination and grit my fellow House Democrats have shown. In the face of senseless, cruel measures taken by House Republicans, our caucus has shown solidarity and courage time and time again.
As you may be aware, legislators are prohibited from raising money while in session, both for campaigns and the Caucus. Now that session has ended and we can accept contributions, it is vital that we focus on reinforcing the strength of our House Caucus with support from Tennesseans across the state.
If you are ready to show up for House Democrats and invest in the fight for the future of our state, contribute here. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tnhousedems2023]
Tennesseans continue to call for action to be taken by our state legislature. While House Republicans refuse to recognize these voices or uplift the will of the people, your Democratic representatives are not backing down from this fight. The future of our state is on the line, and I hope you will stand with us now by showing your support for our caucus.
Thank you for your consideration.
Rep. John Ray Clemmons
Chairman | Tennessee House Democratic Caucus
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tnhousedems2023]
Paid for by Tennessee House Democratic Caucus, Gloria Johnson Treasurer
Tennessee House Democratic Caucus
P. O. Box 198082
Nashville, TN 37219
United States

| Folks –

Today is Earth Day! Michigan is home to so many beautiful and crucial natural resources, perhaps the most well-known of which are the Great Lakes.

I come from a long line of conservationists, and we are a camping, hiking, and fishing family. Being good stewards of the environment means both creating jobs and keeping our state – and our families – safe from dangerous pollution.

name: BIDEN APPROVAL POLL
subject: Is America better under Biden?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee
body:
| | | Peter, We can’t _believe_ that Joe is thinking about running AGAIN in 2024.
He’s done enough damage to America, and we can’t afford any more.
_It’s time to show sleepy Joe how we REALLY feel._

name: Sean Spicer
subject: Read my full statement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
| |
---
| | | Hey - this is Sean Spicer:

With a heavy heart, I just announced I'm parting ways with Newsmax. My show reached millions and helped viewers see what's _really_ happening in our country. Something the Mainstream Media fails to do time and time again.

_**[But with that in the rearview mirror, I'm thrilled at what's coming next...](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62595084:6gXPURGNr:m:1:3361486117:D521B5974607B2737F9A3C06FA5D71D9:r "But with that in the rearview mirror, I’m thrilled at what’s coming next... ")**_

---
| | | [READ MY FULL STATEMENT >>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62595084:6gXPURGNr:m:1:3361486117:D521B5974607B2737F9A3C06FA5D71D9:r "READ MY FULL STATEMENT >>")
---

The 2024 election will be the single most important one in the history of our country. Joe Biden and Democrats in Congress have set our country into a tailspin. It's an emergency situation and we're running dangerously short on time to change course.

We have our work cut out for us ahead of 2024:

- Fire Joe Biden and retake the presidency
- Expand our razor-thin Majority in the House
- Win back the Senate and send Chuck Schumer into retirement

**The Democrats aren 't going to give us an inch... so we have no choice but to 1) outwork, 2) outsmart, and - most importantly - 3) outraise them. **

Unfortunately, that last point is the most important. Why? Because no one works harder than strong Conservatives like you. And Republicans are WINNING on the issues - they can't outsmart us when we're the ones fighting for freedom, defending our country and flag, and resisting their radical woke agenda.

But Democrats have a MAJOR advantage in fundraising thanks to their armies of Hollywood megadonors and woke Liberals whipping out their credit cards whenever they flip on MSNBC.

_**[Look- if we want to win in 2024, it's going to take all of us standing up RIGHT NOW.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62595085:6gXPURGNr:m:1:3361486117:D521B5974607B2737F9A3C06FA5D71D9:r "Look – if we want to win in 2024, it’s going to take all of us standing up RIGHT NOW. ")**_

That's why I'm teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise for the FIRST TIME THIS YEAR. We ran the numbers on what it'll take to outraise the Democrats and pull off an overwhelming victory.

We came to the conclusion that if every last one of you donated, we would have the resources to MAX OUT all our voter contact budgets, GOTV operations, and volunteer recruitment efforts.

_In other words ... if everyone here steps up RIGHT NOW, the Democrats would suffer a defeat like nothing we've ever seen before._

**But that 's a big "if" - it requires 100% participation. **

This plan falls apart if too many folks sit out. We need everyone on board to pull this off.

So I'll cut to the chase.

_**[From the bottom of my heart, would you be willing to make a meaningful contribution? If we can pull this off, we'll make history.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62595085:6gXPURGNr:m:1:3361486117:D521B5974607B2737F9A3C06FA5D71D9:r "From the bottom
of my heart, would you be willing to make a meaningful contribution between $27 and $54? If we can pull this off, we’ll make history.")**_

Are you in?

---
**[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62595085:6gXPURGNr:m:1:3361486117:D521B5974607B2737F9A3C06FA5D71D9:r)[**YES >>**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62595085:6gXPURGNr:m:1:3361486117:D521B5974607B2737F9A3C06FA5D71D9:r)_[**NO >>**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62595085:6gXPURGNr:m:1:3361486117:D521B5974607B2737F9A3C06FA5D71D9:r)**
---

More from me soon,
Sean Spicer

---
| [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62595085:6gXPURGNr:m:1:3361486117:D521B5974607B2737F9A3C06FA5D71D9:r "image")
---
* * *
---
|
---

name: Lucas Kunce
subject: What the NRSC said about me being a “nerd”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
Their latest attack about me and Magic: The Gathering
#
Peter — the NRSC and Josh Hawley’s oppo shop said it’s “disqualifying” to be a “nerd” who plays Magic: The Gathering.
Well here’s what I have to say: **Being a “nerd” wasn’t something we worried about when we played after long days while deployed — and it’s not what Missourians are worried about either.**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/31573?refcode=em20230422-3027&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=3027%2E614464%2EIpXVXJ)
Corrupt elites like Josh Hawley have spent years stripping communities across our state for parts. They use their power to control the lives of everyday Missourians instead of making them better and they’re desperate to make voters forget it.
**They know that this “nerd” — and the people-powered movement you’re helping us build — has a real shot to flip this Senate seat next year.**
But we can only do it with your help. So Peter:
**[Will you help us take back power from these corrupt elites and continue fighting back against these weird attacks by adding a donation of $10 or whatever you can afford to our campaign right now?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/31573?refcode=em20230422-3027&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3027%2E614464%2EIpXVXJ)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/31574?refcode=em20230422-3027&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=3&akid=3027%2E614464%2EIpXVXJ) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/31574?refcode=em20230422-3027&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=4&akid=3027%2E614464%2EIpXVXJ) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/31574?refcode=em20230422-3027&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=5&akid=3027%2E614464%2EIpXVXJ) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/31574?refcode=em20230422-3027&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=6&akid=3027%2E614464%2EIpXVXJ) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/31574?refcode=em20230422-3027&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=7&akid=3027%2E614464%2EIpXVXJ) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/31574?refcode=em20230422-3027&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=8&akid=3027%2E614464%2EIpXVXJ) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/31573?refcode=em20230422-3027&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=9&akid=3027%2E614464%2EIpXVXJ)

Thanks for all your support,
Lucas
