name: Helen Gym for Working Families Party
subject: "She’s never built anything in her life"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party National PAC (77 Sands St
body:
See the debate clip for yourself and how I responded here. | | | Peter — Did you catch the Philadelphia Mayoral debate this week? My opponent Jeff Brown tried attacking me with baseless and sexist comments. **[See the clip for yourself and how I responded here:](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953y7GAgFm2l_POJ-qqyOE1NqKHhzOjNBwYT9KJosTQBT9XBizGTxhRd7gL9KFZn2qY8bIx7xcEg8Dnxj6eMgPy0WxUT4oIZi07lHv7Uz80HMUUE_I3GeKfo-ohcHIjnEwhju-v8rQi1OuQwiC_uhdCQosKM1L3DMmZf6OE3unrqEUUtkXd3AjKIq2CLrzK77kVtk1osFDFY9vOgqydrRwqKw0HwsHUWNZQe5Ep-RNzfJOl8jVik8VitOazVRvl9yrclbRP40JQDm3JV4S42H6VdITXpkwJWBxhq_VfizWq3YpPKtpUgTOr_LI4FnT6na1wd0pE3EW1hPVWrXSP1KW-q-/3vk/RjKCHJUpRROgAwhjIaJ2eg/h0/CSgkQX-i-QcG-sRN7JtoQZtKxLpiXMAS2VAEdhJOPOY)** [](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953y7GAgFm2l_POJ-qqyOE1NqKHhzOjNBwYT9KJosTQBT9XBizGTxhRd7gL9KFZn2qY8bIx7xcEg8Dnxj6eMgPy0WfxSmwhPOzMnQQ9H6TwcYTFPLvmvI321_mr1nzfwmtKG8q1ALlEjGnimV7eEgi5cRQeIPuXNGzdAezmGjidqS5gRCr4WQmiMiLvr6GYmMYnQzQdZBjDZUAcPNYiZDdhn-rngfQH9q-0CibWch3ESmcf4-oOvdChA3mlypJq_cKUL8OwtZbDEZUBAG_j0Dc4S-TTEKIpfJBoUaabsiYS89DYthDlDQJRTb_nb6s2x8Fs_UKKszCywafeCiKSNjl6XY/3vk/RjKCHJUpRROgAwhjIaJ2eg/h1/zwpUDGraYik-Kl4-13xthOfCr89CELcIfxEP81quZ4A) _She’s “the least informed person on this stage.”_ _“She’s never built anything in her life.”_ _“She’s the queen of making stuff up.”_ Really, Jeff? I’ve spent my career fighting for safer, stronger communities with a particular focus on children and families. My work has restored nurses and counselors to schools, kept thousands of families in their homes, and guaranteed predictable schedules for 130,000 hourly workers. **But this is what angry, entitled men do — they look to silence their opposition and have no respect for anyone who has a different vision from them.**[**Pitch in right now to support our campaign and WFP and stand up to arrogant millionaires like Jeff Brown.**](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953y7GAgFm2l_POJ-qqyOE1NqKHhzOjNBwYT9KJosTQBT9XBizGTxhRd7gL9KFZn2qY8bIx7xcEg8Dnxj6eMgPy0W6GvI2aLHOr4L00hlbbf4BAmoIzbVGTctizNNFuSwwOtFlDTvMCmHK7VQgR_NrWOQFQoZwFOHGRf6hYzOXl-rwh87dD3XDNIqlXNuHlVE5UesrxjNAfl7D-os5JiRxNysOOEgBq6IRJdddqqdQVddPqJa0rUEmFDs8ozqhUs7nM-W1snjn5vnM-jcPfJL-OXZG6Uzee2ZLZJ8PToW8_Hudcs14A5vX_Atha8NVz0LUoNLGNgreISXM5zbqJ5aTZH9/3vk/RjKCHJUpRROgAwhjIaJ2eg/h2/Wd4CcLZGZULKGr_oiMB0m5WvBaLuhMOtjoVTubCha8o) **[Contribute $10 »](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953y7GAgFm2l_POJ-qqyOE1NqKHhzOjNBwYT9KJosTQBT9XBizGTxhRd7gL9KFZn2qY8bIx7xcEg8Dnxj6eMgPy0WHToULUQOUQMLjlBuwiso0QeJM7I1G3e_toHqJpfVq_Oh2AmiAEAuBdcnmfcpnuE72SGwxzuh5yxp5EvVswwG2GqEYMWd2E55JD2xSwwbJamqi1QwnwanYMDKcCsvU_ZuEQFMOWOao9s4H_HubGBHjsXGH08qsSJMKXgvdLNC2_vNiGpTWQIrsy8XhLTbdFbSbxyeYno0fd9yJ74r_CvW82g3JE1_1CuAxlg3f7Udllpkh_Dti78iMxlKhnVhIlkM/3vk/RjKCHJUpRROgAwhjIaJ2eg/h3/VjNiQMl0wyBF2vGoEMFhEn5xOZjD2WsuVz3YfeBxRIg)** When we win, we’ll build the quality schools that our children need. When we win, we’ll deliver real safety for every neighborhood. Together, we’ll build the safe, thriving, and vibrant Philly we all deserve, and we won’t let people like Jeff Brown keep us from reaching our city’s true potential. **** **[Thanks for standing with me. clean_body: See the debate clip for yourself and how I responded here. | | | Peter — Did you catch the Philadelphia Mayoral debate this week? My opponent Jeff Brown tried attacking me with baseless and sexist comments. She’s “the least informed person on this stage.” “She’s never built anything in her life.” “She’s the queen of making stuff up.” Really, Jeff? I’ve spent my career fighting for safer, stronger communities with a particular focus on children and families. My work has restored nurses and counselors to schools, kept thousands of families in their homes, and guaranteed predictable schedules for 130,000 hourly workers. But this is what angry, entitled men do — they look to silence their opposition and have no respect for anyone who has a different vision from them. When we win, we’ll build the quality schools that our children need. When we win, we’ll deliver real safety for every neighborhood. Together, we’ll build the safe, thriving, and vibrant Philly we all deserve, and we won’t let people like Jeff Brown keep us from reaching our city’s true potential. ** Helen Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. name: President Joseph R. Biden, Jr.
subject: The peace of mind that all Americans deserve
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, **[www
body:
Families across the country are starting to breathe just a little easier. We’ve just got to keep it going. | |
---
Growing up, we lived in a three-bedroom split-level home with my grandpop. And my headboard was up against the wall where my dad and mom were on the other side. One night, I remember I could hear how restless my dad was. When I got up the next morning, I asked my mom, “What’s the matter with Dad?” She said his company just dropped our health insurance. All he was asking for was a little breathing room -- the kind of peace of mind that comes from knowing that if an illness strikes or an accident occurs, you can get quality medical care and recover and heal. _It’s what all Americans deserve._ But we all know that too many folks don’t have that peace of mind today. Too many folks lie in bed at night staring at the ceiling, wondering what will happen if their spouse gets cancer, if their child gets sick, or if something else happens to them. Will they have the money to pay the medical bills? Will they have to sell the house? I get it, Derek. That’s why, since I was sworn in as president over two years ago, we have focused intensely on getting more people affordable health care and bringing down medical costs so you have a little bit of breathing room again. I believe we made significant progress. Now, we need to finish the job. So today, I am calling on this grassroots team to help elect more Democrats ready to ensure health care is a right, not a privilege. Can I count on you to make a $7 to the DNC today?

clean_body: Families across the country are starting to breathe just a little easier. We’ve just got to keep it going. | | Growing up, we lived in a three-bedroom split-level home with my grandpop. And my headboard was up against the wall where my dad and mom were on the other side. One night, I remember I could hear how restless my dad was. When I got up the next morning, I asked my mom, “What’s the matter with Dad?” She said his company just dropped our health insurance. All he was asking for was a little breathing room -- the kind of peace of mind that comes from knowing that if an illness strikes or an accident occurs, you can get quality medical care and recover and heal. It’s what all Americans deserve. But we all know that too many folks don’t have that peace of mind today. Too many folks lie in bed at night staring at the ceiling, wondering what will happen if their spouse gets cancer, if their child gets sick, or if something else happens to them. Will they have the money to pay the medical bills? Will they have to sell the house? I get it, Derek. That’s why, since I was sworn in as president over two years ago, we have focused intensely on getting more people affordable health care and bringing down medical costs so you have a little bit of breathing room again. I believe we made significant progress. Now, we need to finish the job. So today, I am calling on this grassroots team to help elect more Democrats ready to ensure health care is a right, not a privilege. Can I count on you to make a $7 to the DNC today? While Democrats have worked to lower costs for families like yours, the GOP is trying to dismantle our progress. They want to cut taxes for the very wealthy and large corporations, again. They want to take back the power we gave Medicare to negotiate lower drug costs. And they would provide a huge giveaway to Big Pharma. The contrast couldn’t be clearer, Derek. We have to fight for Democratic majorities so we’re able to protect and expand access to affordable health care. It’d mean so much to me if you’d make a donation to power our party’s work to elect more Democrats up and down the ballot. Thank you for everything you do, Joe Joseph R. name: Ro Khanna
subject: Hospitals are on the front lines of the climate crisis
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ro for Congress
body:
https://rokhanna.com [https://rokhanna.com]

Friend,

This Earth Day, I want to take a moment to focus on an issue we don’t normally associate with environmental policy: healthcare.

As the frequency and severity of natural disasters increase with climate change, hospitals are faced with the task of both improving their infrastructure and accommodating the influx of people suffering from the effects of these weather events. Floods, heat waves, tornadoes, wildfires, and more have the potential to strike at the very core of hospital care by destroying equipment and cutting off power [https://www.aamc.org/news-insights/hurricanes-heat-waves-fires-floods-hospitals-build-defenses-climate-change-stirs-weather] .

These problems cannot continue to be ignored. Tell Congress: It's time to take action to protect healthcare facilities from the effects of climate change. [https://act.rokhanna.com/a/green-new-deal-health-petition?contactdata=QZDBC/pCu5hGrv57HGQyaJwUdvgcjagFUhg8IWlPXoUQQsX2SRo1ByCq8NsO9Uj2fCyobZiOaLzL4G5dldesEIgSRj0X7h728hPLReYX4a2zoroCl+qmK6wSvXcrs2tUjgZNHi8kIezOMWMU+Nwp/Q==]

Sign the Petition [https://act.rokhanna.com/a/green-new-deal-health-petition?contactdata=QZDBC/pCu5hGrv57HGQyaJwUdvgcjagFUhg8IWlPXoUQQsX2SRo1ByCq8NsO9Uj2fCyobZiOaLzL4G5dldesEIgSRj0X7h728hPLReYX4a2zoroCl+qmK6wSvXcrs2tUjgZNHi8kIezOMWMU+Nwp/Q==]

These disaster-related outages have real consequences for the lives of patients. During Hurricane Katrina, for example, patients and staff at New Orleans’ Memorial Medical Center were unable to evacuate after the city’s levees failed, resulting in the deaths of 45 patients [https://www.nytimes.com/2009/08/30/magazine/30doctors.html] . Five people on ventilators died [https://www.reuters.com/article/us-usa-weather-tornadoes-hospital/five-patients-who-died-in-joplin-hospital-suffocated-idUSTRE74N7FB20110524] when St. John’s Regional Medical Center lost power and its back-up generator to a tornado. And during the 2021 ice storm in Texas, officials were forced to rapidly administer thousands of COVID-19 vaccines [https://abcnews.go.com/US/texas-officials-scramble-administer-8000-covid-vaccines-power/story?id=75911159] that were at risk of expiring because they could not remain frozen at the required temperature.

Meanwhile, hospitals themselves are greater contributors to climate change than most would acknowledge. The healthcare sector is responsible for 8.5 percent [https://www.commonwealthfund.org/publications/explainer/2022/apr/how-us-health-care-system-contributes-climate-change] of carbon emissions and growing in the United States, more than a third of which come from hospitals. This has the added effect of creating a negative feedback loop by worsening environmental health issues.

That’s why I’ve joined Senator Ed Markey to introduce the Green New Deal on Health. This legislation would improve hospital infrastructure by making it more resilient to natural disasters, protect workers and shift infrastructure towards renewable energy, making hospitals less susceptible to power failures while reducing carbon emissions.

Sign the petition: Tell Congress to pass the Green New Deal on Health. [https://act.rokhanna.com/a/green-new-deal-health-petition?contactdata=QZDBC/pCu5hGrv57HGQyaJwUdvgcjagFUhg8IWlPXoUQQsX2SRo1ByCq8NsO9Uj2fCyobZiOaLzL4G5dldesEIgSRj0X7h728hPLReYX4a2zoroCl+qmK6wSvXcrs2tUjgZNHi8kIezOMWMU+Nwp/Q==]

Onward,
Ro

DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ngp-email-footer?refcode=20230422-green-new-deal-health]

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: The time is now, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Today I’d like to take a moment to contemplate where we are in our work addressing climate change to save our planet.
#
**Happy Earth Day, Peter!**
I hope that wherever you are, you’re able to get outside to enjoy today in our shared nature.
I’d like to take a moment to contemplate where we are in our work to address climate change and save our planet. Our fight has remained the same, and will continue to be the same if we do not enact bold, transformative solutions to the climate crisis that we face today.
**We must immediately pass legislation to invest in bold solutions to the climate crisis, and I need you with me in this fight, Peter.**[**If you stand with me, please chip in $3 to support my advocacy in the fight to end climate change.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/41686?refcode=em20230422-2402&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=2402%2E420207%2Eq_hVcV)
**[Contribute](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/41686?refcode=em20230422-2402&t=20&akid=2402%2E420207%2Eq_hVcV)**
Our planet is beautiful, bursting with life from every corner of every country. From Mount Rainier to the Columbia River Gorge and beyond, we have a moral, ethical, and intangible obligation to turn this climate crisis around, not only for ourselves but also for our future generations.
We must continue to stand up to climate change deniers at every level of our government and continue fighting for immediate change. From pushing to reduce carbon emissions in the U.S. to urging our government to move away from fossil fuels towards renewable energy — there's a lot of work ahead of us. **But there’s much more at stake.**
We can only make these bold changes together, and the time to make these changes is right now. [**Please chip in $3 — or whatever you’re able to give — today to help build our momentum to end climate change and save our planet.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/41686?refcode=em20230422-2402&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=2402%2E420207%2Eq_hVcV)
In solidarity,
Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20230422-2402-footer&t=22&refcode2=2402_420207_q_hVcV&akid=2402%2E420207%2Eq_hVcV)**

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

clean_body: Today I’d like to take a moment to contemplate where we are in our work addressing climate change to save our planet. Happy Earth Day, Peter! I hope that wherever you are, you’re able to get outside to enjoy today in our shared nature. I’d like to take a moment to contemplate where we are in our work to address climate change and save our planet. Our fight has remained the same, and will continue to be the same if we do not enact bold, transformative solutions to the climate crisis that we face today. We must immediately pass legislation to invest in bold solutions to the climate crisis, and I need you with me in this fight, Peter. Our planet is beautiful, bursting with life from every corner of every country. From Mount Rainier to the Columbia River Gorge and beyond, we have a moral, ethical, and intangible obligation to turn this climate crisis around, not only for ourselves but also for our future generations. We must continue to stand up to climate change deniers at every level of our government and continue fighting for immediate change. From pushing to reduce carbon emissions in the U.S. to urging our government to move away from fossil fuels towards renewable energy — there's a lot of work ahead of us. But there’s much more at stake. We can only make these bold changes together, and the time to make these changes is right now. In solidarity, Pramila | | Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com

name: Team Cori
subject: It’s Earth Day 🌎
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
body:
We need bold solutions to address the climate crisis with the urgency it demands.
#
It’s Earth Day, and we’re demanding bold action on the climate crisis.
[](https://act.coribush.org/sign/gnd-em-earth-day-petition/?source=em20230422&t=1&akid=2561%2E1082990%2EoCbQKH)
[**Peter, can you add your name next to Cori’s to show your support for a Green New Deal? It’s critical to demonstrate our widespread support for IMMEDIATE climate action this Earth Day before time runs out to take action.**](https://act.coribush.org/sign/gnd-em-earth-day-petition/?source=em20230422&t=2&akid=2561%2E1082990%2EoCbQKH)
**[I support a Green New Deal →](https://act.coribush.org/sign/gnd-em-earth-day-petition/?source=em20230422&t=3&akid=2561%2E1082990%2EoCbQKH)**
In St. Louis, there are clear signs of how people, especially Black and brown people, are hurting because of a lack of local funding and government support for climate action and environmental protection. Our children are making more and more trips to the emergency room for asthma attacks and extreme temperatures are driving up electric bills.
**This is a crisis of great magnitude, and we can't wait any longer for empty legislation: We need bold solutions.** That's why Cori worked to secure the passage of the Environmental Justice Mapping and Data Collection Act last year. And it’s why she’s a bold advocate of a Green New Deal and a Green New Deal for Cities — a policy that would enable community-based environmental policies.
**If you’re in this fight with us, will you add your name to support the Green New Deal and demand immediate action to address the climate crisis?**[**Add your name right now so we can make our voices heard loud and clear this Earth Day.**](https://act.coribush.org/sign/gnd-em-earth-day-petition/?source=em20230422&t=4&akid=2561%2E1082990%2EoCbQKH)
**[I support a Green New Deal →](https://act.coribush.org/sign/gnd-em-earth-day-petition/?source=em20230422&t=5&akid=2561%2E1082990%2EoCbQKH)**
Together,
Team Cori

Peter,

The Left has declared a War on Cops.

From Black Lives Matter and Antifa “protests” that are closer to terrorism than exercises in democracy, to liberal politicians’ “Defund the Police” movement, _anti-police sentiment is the worst it’s ever been._

The result of this marginalization and demonization of police: **under Biden’s administration, record numbers of police officers have been murdered.**

And rather than crack down on criminals and hold _them_ responsible, liberal politicians continue to target police instead.

**America is not safe with leftists in control, and it’s time to hold them responsible.**
I am proud to partner with **The League for Law Enforcement** as they lead the charge to stand up for police and fight against the radical Left and their War on Cops.

_I’m rounding up patriots to deputize in this fight and support The League and the officers they advocate for._

[**Will you join me and The League and denounce the Left’s War on Cops by rushing a contribution of $25 or another amount right away?**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=09a6eb8f8af74d6e9a6e3a5d5dfa3041&_e=CqH6qwTQ-PS6cINPj-WcpJEVqan7PTVX73c-Y7xkpdtfkSvy0yQKWyqh8MG9b3weM91Uw-ZwhfcL3kjdsRBocyOQjKnsA-0I7BX0dO0TdoSOJyheLiIif0zO4hdTAQV77860jkUyPIun4-vqnqI9CvzqL7ppU6gxKLWrnbjjOfwYsL0ZmGZfxcIKevBhvzD7wRnzSyRWWnYtGg9fYfMgChrZTdlHBGt8j7TtAfB_LIfd7g_RjUeWEX4FOhx1hdVp4zkOZ-dnBPPMoOYnn_qCv8v0sCgx-pQeaPQe0_V1arC_vf0Z5RGjUC2WNKu4X4fj4TiFjjCmoTJi5rF19JT24A%3D%3D)

[ **JOIN SHERIFF CLARKE
BACK UP COPS WITH A DONATION » **](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=09a6eb8f8af74d6e9a6e3a5d5dfa3041&_e=CqH6qwTQ-PS6cINPj-WcpJEVqan7PTVX73c-Y7xkpdtfkSvy0yQKWyqh8MG9b3weM91Uw-ZwhfcL3kjdsRBocyOQjKnsA-0I7BX0dO0TdoSOJyheLiIif0zO4hdTAQV77860jkUyPIun4-vqnqI9CvzqL7ppU6gxKLWrnbjjOfwYsL0ZmGZfxcIKevBhvzD7RyqwMZzCnYIvud7Bgbe7KclrqOfH91TotyRdcFt9TzsB0y16uRNZmwTGAY7sN-DqA3J0x0k5gV8xTLLu--gSHhmznAkpQsbJTyJZNe3BQYvG1erZRiVwq3gPC0uJeMtD6Sktx2Iz9EED58xJhiyG3w%3D%3D)
We can’t win this fight without backup from patriots like you who still support our brave men and women in law enforcement.

I’m rounding you up – [**will you answer the call and rush a donation to support our fight against the War on Cops?**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=09a6eb8f8af74d6e9a6e3a5d5dfa3041&_e=CqH6qwTQ-PS6cINPj-WcpJEVqan7PTVX73c-Y7xkpdtfkSvy0yQKWyqh8MG9b3weM91Uw-ZwhfcL3kjdsRBocyOQjKnsA-0I7BX0dO0TdoSOJyheLiIif0zO4hdTAQV77860jkUyPIun4-vqnqI9CvzqL7ppU6gxKLWrnbjjOfwYsL0ZmGZfxcIKevBhvzD7ysu28NJ9Sb-pI2oauuIkQwifTG9p5OgWbdRg-kd2HesNBWqRvcGMShDJZl_5Ei7rXcR0b7zYnX6g7uknJn5YZSxwASdxQaksM8seiIsYnVbS1tr0tADJj5q5QvaaM6EmQu3zX01E34O3tHYUmj5FiQ%3D%3D)

Sheriff David Clarke (retired)

# ABOUT "THE LEAGUE"
---
The League was formed to bring back the law - both in the inalienable rights of defense and in enforcing the laws at all levels of government, protecting the good and removing the bad from our great society. The League represents sportsmen, hunters, law enforcement, and others who in the past have been the mainstay of our society. The League stands for the defense of our Constitutional Rights, our inalienable rights protected by the First Amendment, Second Amendment and the eight other amendments in our Bill of Rights.
# ABOUT JIM FOTIS

A retired 14-year veteran of the Lynbrook Police Department in New York, Jim Fotis was injured in the line of duty and is the highest decorated officer in the Department's history. Now, Jim is dedicating his life to advocating for law enforcement and American values.
## [**JOIN US TODAY »**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=09a6eb8f8af74d6e9a6e3a5d5dfa3041&_e=CqH6qwTQ-PS6cINPj-WcpJEVqan7PTVX73c-Y7xkpdtfkSvy0yQKWyqh8MG9b3weM91Uw-ZwhfcL3kjdsRBocyOQjKnsA-0I7BX0dO0TdoSOJyheLiIif0zO4hdTAQV77860jkUyPIun4-vqnqI9CvzqL7ppU6gxKLWrnbjjOfwYsL0ZmGZfxcIKevBhvzD7c9KUcZgxtHdMnds0ty-iuCh9QO9XoKRPsLYfHqixH1Fdfh8492IFxrf5hdhSYKgBtoh1G8PsM7nvzyrxw02kdTrquC77sPf518Cd7lCABI6PHAu7IDumpGJ_zX7xUI-nCTw8G-GqBbj60GhegsFzhw%3D%3D)

| | **Dear Friend,** | **Only 73 orcas remain. Stop them from being driven to extinction, protect our planet, and donate $27 or more to help us hit our $180,000 Earth Day goal! ** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [$27 donation + $27 match = $54 impact](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1736042?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)

---
[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1736045?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**There are only 73 Southern Resident orcas left in the world, and they’re slowly starving to death.** Big Oil and shipping megaprojects are threatening the LAST living Southern Resident orcas -- all in the interest of corporate profit. These orcas are the only endangered species of killer whales in the United States, and they are starving and growing weaker by the day. But two proposed megaprojects threaten to seal their death sentence. **[Help protect these 73 remaining orcas and our planet by standing up to corporate greed and donate $27 or more today and help us reach our Earth Day goal of $180,000 before midnight tonight!](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1736046?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)**
These Southern Resident orcas are a struggling family who have suffered devastating blows recently. **Three beloved members of their pods -- Cappuccino, Marina, and now Ripple -- already died from starvation.** Losing Cappuccino’s playfulness, Marina’s wisdom, and the hope that young Ripple brought for future of the family, has plunged their surviving family members deep into grief and stress, worsening the impact of persistent starvation for all three of the Southern Resident pods. In this state, these precious creatures are even more vulnerable to the destructive impact of commercial megaprojects.
Each Southern Resident killer whale is an integral member of their family. Every loss is felt by the entire pod. But Big Oil and the shipping industry are threatening them all with proposed megaprojects that would directly impact their habitats and drive them to EXTINCTION.
**Big Oil and the shipping industry are threatening orcas with starvation. Help us fight for their protection and the future of our planet with your $27 donation before the clock strikes midnight on Earth Day! **
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[$27 donation + $27 match = $54 impact](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1736042?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)

---
[$100 donation + $100 match = $200 impact](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1736044?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1736045?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Southern Resident killer whale populations have been declining since at least 2006. Key drivers to their extinction are tied to toxic water pollution and food availability. Their main food source is Chinook salmon, which were once abundant in their ecosystems, but have substantially declined in the last decade -- **leading these orcas to starvation, stress, and miscarriages. **
The two proposed megaprojects would drastically magnify these threats to orcas. The Roberts Bank T2 shipping terminal project would increase cargo ship traffic and disrupt Chinook salmon migration patterns -- driving them further away from the orcas’ habitat. The resulting noise from the ships will also disrupt the killer whales’ sonar hunting methods, preventing them from finding the few salmon left in the region.
The proposed Trans Mountain Pipeline expansion would also significantly increase oil tanker traffic in Southern Resident critical habitat SEVEN-FOLD -- from one tanker a week to one per day! Worst of all, it will also be pushing out millions of gallons per day of toxic tar sands oil -- **the dirtiest kind** \-- in oil tankers through this already delicate orca habitat.
**The threatened Southern Resident orca population is just one big oil spill away from extinction.** And we know that with oil transportation projects, oil spills are not a matter of “if,” but rather of “when.” This is why we need to raise our voices and stand up to Big Oil and the shipping industry, showing them that we will not allow them to put private profit over the lives of precious wildlife and the ecosystems that rely on them.
**Southern Resident orcas are one big oil spill away from EXTINCTION. Fight the megaprojects that threaten their existence and our planet with your contribution of $27 or more now. **

---
Orcas are crucial to a thriving ocean habitat and our own health. They release vital nutrients for phytoplankton, which in turn provide half of the oxygen we breathe while absorbing hundreds of thousands of tons of carbon each year. We depend on this flow of nutrients for healthy ecosystems and a functioning planet, which is why we must protect these orcas at all costs.
Each tragic death in these pods reduces the chances of the remaining orcas’ survival. With Marina’s death, her children are now three times more likely to die, while her grandchildren are **SIX TIMES less likely to survive.** With these 73 precious lives at stake and at increased risk, we need to step up our fight to protect them.
Southern Resident killer whales are in perilous danger. You and I may be some of the last people to share the planet with these magnificent creatures if these disastrous megaprojects are allowed to move forward. That is why we need you by our side, Friend.
Your membership gift of $27 or more to Friends of the Earth in honor of Earth Day will allow us to fight these projects and the threats to our planet. Make your contribution now, while orcas still have a fighting chance and you can make double the impact!
**Cappuccino and Marina are dead. Don’t let their surviving family members meet the same fate. Make your contribution of $27 or more to Friends of the Earth before the clock strikes midnight on Earth Day! **

Stop them from being driven to extinction, protect our planet, and donate $27 or more to help us hit our $180,000 Earth Day goal! If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | == == == == There are only 73 Southern Resident orcas left in the world, and they’re slowly starving to death. Big Oil and shipping megaprojects are threatening the LAST living Southern Resident orcas -- all in the interest of corporate profit. These orcas are the only endangered species of killer whales in the United States, and they are starving and growing weaker by the day. But two proposed megaprojects threaten to seal their death sentence. == These Southern Resident orcas are a struggling family who have suffered devastating blows recently. Three beloved members of their pods -- Cappuccino, Marina, and now Ripple -- already died from starvation. Losing Cappuccino’s playfulness, Marina’s wisdom, and the hope that young Ripple brought for future of the family, has plunged their surviving family members deep into grief and stress, worsening the impact of persistent starvation for all three of the Southern Resident pods. In this state, these precious creatures are even more vulnerable to the destructive impact of commercial megaprojects. Each Southern Resident killer whale is an integral member of their family. Every loss is felt by the entire pod. But Big Oil and the shipping industry are threatening them all with proposed megaprojects that would directly impact their habitats and drive them to EXTINCTION. Big Oil and the shipping industry are threatening orcas with starvation. Help us fight for their protection and the future of our planet with your $27 donation before the clock strikes midnight on Earth Day! If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: == == == == Southern Resident killer whale populations have been declining since at least 2006. Key drivers to their extinction are tied to toxic water pollution and food availability. Their main food source is Chinook salmon, which were once abundant in their ecosystems, but have substantially declined in the last decade -- leading these orcas to starvation, stress, and miscarriages. The two proposed megaprojects would drastically magnify these threats to orcas. body:
I’m happy to join the celebrations on this very special day!

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62164820/402523133/931978131?refcode=BLU-JANE-20230422-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA2MmQ0ZjZjLTI4ZTEtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=O0tgKJ3qo7my4uBeu8w3rY9GwmGETfMvek2NtxdzILE=)

Hi, it’s Jane Fonda. Happy Earth Day! I’m happy to join the celebrations on this very special day!

While we have much to celebrate, we cannot lose sight of what we have at stake right now – _**the climate crisis poses a grave threat to everything we love about this planet and it’s people.**_

We still have a long way to go to fight against the growing climate crisis and end the era of fossil fuels. **But there is hope and with your support we can make progress.

[_Will you contribute $10 before midnight tonight to help us reach our $5,000 Earth Day fundraising goal?_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62164821/402523134/931978131?refcode=BLU-JANE-20230422-1-EM&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA2MmQ0ZjZjLTI4ZTEtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=O0tgKJ3qo7my4uBeu8w3rY9GwmGETfMvek2NtxdzILE=)**
| [CONTRIBUTE ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62164822/402523135/931978131?refcode=BLU-JANE-20230422-1-EM&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA2MmQ0ZjZjLTI4ZTEtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=O0tgKJ3qo7my4uBeu8w3rY9GwmGETfMvek2NtxdzILE=)
---
The fossil fuel industry has a stranglehold on our political system, enabling them to exploit our natural resources. We must work together to build our grassroots strength and show that it’s possible to elect climate champions at every level of government who will lead the way to a bright and sustainable future. clean_body: I’m happy to join the celebrations on this very special day! | = Hi, it’s Jane Fonda. Happy Earth Day! I’m happy to join the celebrations on this very special day! While we have much to celebrate, we cannot lose sight of what we have at stake right now – the climate crisis poses a grave threat to everything we love about this planet and it’s people. We still have a long way to go to fight against the growing climate crisis and end the era of fossil fuels. But there is hope and with your support we can make progress. = | = The fossil fuel industry has a stranglehold on our political system, enabling them to exploit our natural resources. We must work together to build our grassroots strength and show that it’s possible to elect climate champions at every level of government who will lead the way to a bright and sustainable future. = | | | = | = | = | = | = Thank you for your support, Jane Fonda = | | = Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. name: Derek Kilmer
subject: What I learned from growing up on the Olympic Peninsula:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
Happy Earth Day!
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62164996/402524010/-2027002553?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzNzUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzE0NTkyZDQtMjhlMS1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=idLh4lzK1DBt9y9MbdzO55Kw1SJEu85oCykI7euCnvY=&emci=8d6b7799-aadf-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=314592d4-28e1-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=3595835)

Peter,

As a lifelong Washingtonian, I know protecting our planet should be a priority every day — not just on Earth Day. And as someone who grew up on the Olympic Peninsula, I learned firsthand that economic growth and environmental protection should always go hand-in-hand.

Peter, Washington State's way of life and economy are rooted in our natural surroundings. That's why in Congress, protecting our natural resources and fighting for clean air and water remain one of my top priorities.

From eradicating the invasive European Green Crab and recovering salmon and steelhead populations to combating the climate crisis to working to restore Puget Sound, I remain a committed partner in the efforts to protect our environment.

Last Congress, alongside Representative Marilyn Strickland, I was proud to introduce the PUGET SOS Act to enhance the federal government’s role and investment in Puget Sound. And in December, I was proud to see President Biden sign our bill into law.

But when it comes to addressing the climate crisis and protecting our natural resources, Congress can and should do more! **That's why I am reintroducing the Wild Olympics Wilderness and Wild and Scenic Rivers Act in the House — which would protect the wildest and most pristine places on the Peninsula and ensure we can keep and grow jobs in our natural resource industries.**

Peter, you can't live in a state as beautiful as Washington and not know the value of our natural world. I'm committed to the conservation of our way of life every day — _not just on Earth Day_. That's why I'm asking:

**[Today, and every day, will you join me in recommitting to the fight to protect our planet by adding your name next to mine?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62164997/402524011/-280932223?ms=em23_230422_earthd_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&refcode=em23_230422_earthd_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&source=em23_230422_earthd_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230422_earthd_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=XCciwrIud2RA0tJILrMWAXjJlxNII0VTICVUOafv0R8Xr9ojQ4vNpNYA8gwKxtNAAGHqBqm98oIGWJvQb9owYfS4/aaukt/fz/9fMQSy2QtSBExyf/d68HyPQgXmOJLbaKlTNEbigZcefQ57KAQGqDZpKZZWf+Q5yhoNLZBld7g=&refcode2=314592d4-28e1-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzNzUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzE0NTkyZDQtMjhlMS1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=idLh4lzK1DBt9y9MbdzO55Kw1SJEu85oCykI7euCnvY=&emci=8d6b7799-aadf-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=314592d4-28e1-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=3595835)**
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62164999/402524013/-280932223?ms=em23_230422_earthd_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&refcode=em23_230422_earthd_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&source=em23_230422_earthd_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230422_earthd_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=XCciwrIud2RA0tJILrMWAXjJlxNII0VTICVUOafv0R8Xr9ojQ4vNpNYA8gwKxtNAAGHqBqm98oIGWJvQb9owYfS4/aaukt/fz/9fMQSy2QtSBExyf/d68HyPQgXmOJLbaKlTNEbigZcefQ57KAQGqDZpKZZWf+Q5yhoNLZBld7g=&refcode2=314592d4-28e1-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzNzUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzE0NTkyZDQtMjhlMS1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=idLh4lzK1DBt9y9MbdzO55Kw1SJEu85oCykI7euCnvY=&emci=8d6b7799-aadf-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=314592d4-28e1-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=3595835)

name: Your America
subject: Marjorie Taylor Greene To The Rescue

name: Team Whitesides
subject: George is focused on wildfires this Earth Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by George Whitesides for Congress
body:
georgewhitesidesforcongress.com [georgewhitesidesforcongress.com]
Hey Peter, all of us here at Team Whitesides just wanted to wish you a Happy Earth Day!
Here in California, we have access to some of the most beautiful lands in the world — something we don't take for granted. However, we are also witnessing the effects of climate change right in our own backyards. Between ongoing droughts and a longer, more uncontrolled wildfire season, we need aggressive and transformative action to end our reliance on fossil fuels and dramatically cut our carbon emissions.
We know that our planet needs protecting — and fast. That's why protecting our environment is one of George's top priorities.
The challenges associated with extreme wildfires in California are complex and urgent. As CA-27's next Representative, George will work with experts and scientists in the field to invest in the wildfire mitigation efforts that are vital to our state's future.
Will you chip in now to help George continue to fight against climate change and build a campaign that's committed to solving the wildfire crisis? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gw4cemail?refcode=X_042223_Earth_Day_act]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to George Whitesides will go through immediately:
DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gw4cemail?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=X_042223_Earth_Day_act] DONATE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gw4cemail?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=X_042223_Earth_Day_act]

DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gw4cemail?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=X_042223_Earth_Day_act] OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gw4cemail?express_lane_other=true&refcode=X_042223_Earth_Day_act]
Thank you,
— Team Whitesides
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/90153/images/George%20Bio.png] It’s time we have bold, new leadership in this district. As a former NASA Chief of Staff and community leader of wildfire mitigation efforts, George Whitesides is ready to deliver.
https://www.facebook.com/whitesidesforcongress/ [https://www.facebook.com/whitesidesforcongress/] https://www.instagram.com/whitesidesforcongress/ [https://www.instagram.com/whitesidesforcongress/] https://twitter.com/gtwhitesides [https://twitter.com/gtwhitesides] George’s campaign is connecting with voters across the district to flip this seat in 2024. As someone who is committed to moving CA-27 forward, will you make sure George wins next November by donating now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/georgewhitesides2024?refcode=X_Bio]
Paid for by George Whitesides for Congress
George Whitesides for Congress
P.O. Box 221776
Newhall, CA 91322
United States

| Team, with an AZ GOP legislature member being expelled recently, **it is essential to remember that we need to hold our elected officials accountable for their actions.**

We have to vote the far-right Republicans who are consistently working against the interests of Arizona out of office. **[But we need your grassroots support and donations to make that possible.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xTerfBqG0VHddyZFF79qWDNs30TdVXmBmVR88-88TM7tdtMy7naKHM5HsaArmjF8Nyvh7vAEUhbE8YTq49QyNcMTutVJZz9viLkAU-d-QdHdmZ7j0okExDlY9csMwHQceehomlVr71sMi-H-5EYVaP0ilU7h5IEJWMNI2QhOeBXxy_Nzw4X8Zf8I9m-_PqVyHlTiNsOtSsRFZGGSqHdw_cAh8qVmupLIUi4zsbN-0XJdDTpqRqTpB1RKX1iHZODoNR6bNJOOZbNRU0G0PV33ZytXXhC0BrDm1SVyXbKBKxmwaAP74PFEqXs4RV8EIpVyo2J-3SxgfKKu6pchDZAKt25H5kTLQENcoqrF31hlYyw_XVRPROTxn3WEgPH1X0oKKAwPAtPt6yxsGd7wPimtG_ikLeMLW_48pDrcSNZpPP06Vcpdp28UVADZEe7HyQfs4/3vk/7hAlHdoPSpeYYYaWDBUxMQ/h1/aa0SM67KiUN0e5TelzeT_3N-1-oisW_SUAA0DKe2un4)**

Time and time again, these politicians prioritize an ultra-conservative agenda over getting actual work done to improve the lives of this state. _They work against policies that would help working families and promote far-right ideas that go against the progress Arizona has made._

We have to vote the far-right Republicans who are consistently working against the interests of Arizona out of office. Time and time again, these politicians prioritize an ultra-conservative agenda over getting actual work done to improve the lives of this state. They work against policies that would help working families and promote far-right ideas that go against the progress Arizona has made. name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: There’s a special election for two open seats in the Pennsylvania state house. We can’t let Republicans win them and take back the chamber, tying the hands of the new Democratic governor, Josh Shapiro!
body:
Crucial special election on May 16th
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td43fd536-20ed-4af5-9d7e-227c05f9a0ef/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |

| | | | | Peter, [**We must stop the Republicans from ripping the state house away from Democrats in Pennsylvania!**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T596bf928-804e-4e95-a215-698548f5f3dd/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _One of the biggest victories on election night, 2022, was in Pennsylvania. As we know, guns sold illicitly and climate-change-causing carbon don't know what state lines mean._** _**So, on May 16th, when there is a special election for two open seats in the state house, we cannot let Republicans win them and take back the chamber!**_ _Democrat Heather Boyd (District 163) is clear after the travesty of Dobbs, "protecting women's bodily autonomy" is the main reason she's running. Trevor S. Finn (District 108) says he'll stop permitless carry to protect our schoolchildren. Both GOP opponents, meanwhile, are ready to give guns to anyone and ban abortion for everyone. And they're terrible on EVERY other issue._ [**_Will you join us in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to Democrats Heather Boyd & Trevor S. Finn so we keep progressing in Pennsylvania and across the country, and never return to MAGA Republican policies of pre-2020?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T455da108-87cd-455f-8753-8301e5510e87/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thank you for fighting this fight everywhere it's required! | | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T95105844-612b-4b2c-b25e-0ac387655590/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Kim Bernice Nguyen
subject: Earth Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kim Nguyen for Congress
body:
| | We are rapidly running out of time to combat the existential threat of climate change. This crisis isn’t just some hypothetical – it’s real, and we’re already seeing its devastating impacts. _On this Earth Day, the fight for climate action has never been more important._

**But my GOP opponent Michelle Steel just voted for the ‘Polluters over People’ Act, which will reverse key climate provisions of the Inflation Reduction Act, worsen the climate crisis, and slash environmental protections. It’s shameful.**

[Add your name to stand against the ‘Polluters over People’ Act and condemn Michelle Steel’s anti-climate, pro-polluter agenda.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62165681/402526657/150336278?refcode=KBN_EM_PT_WL_230422_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM4MzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOGE4ZmUyMmYtMmJlMS1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=x61fE1MkfuApnQ44WP_JrA5KUl2tdzc3qeml8-9knH8=&emci=cf895f79-6de0-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=8a8fe22f-2be1-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=9674971) | | **[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62165682/402526658/150336278?refcode=KBN_EM_PT_WL_230422_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM4MzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOGE4ZmUyMmYtMmJlMS1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=x61fE1MkfuApnQ44WP_JrA5KUl2tdzc3qeml8-9knH8=&emci=cf895f79-6de0-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=8a8fe22f-2be1-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=9674971)**
---
Californians are all too familiar with the effects of global warming and climate change. In my lifetime, we’ve experienced severe droughts, unbelievable heat waves, an intensifying wildfire season, and flooding from historic rain.

With our planet hurtling towards the tipping points of irreversible climate change, we can’t afford any kind of legislation that would put polluters ahead of our planet.

**Unfortunately, Michelle Steel has doubled down on her pro-polluter agenda, which is no surprise given that she’s accepted _tens of thousands of dollars from Big Oil._**

[If you oppose the GOP’s dangerous efforts to weaken environmental protections and worsen the climate crisis, then please add your name to our petition today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62165683/402526659/150336278?refcode=KBN_EM_PT_WL_230422_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM4MzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOGE4ZmUyMmYtMmJlMS1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=x61fE1MkfuApnQ44WP_JrA5KUl2tdzc3qeml8-9knH8=&emci=cf895f79-6de0-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=8a8fe22f-2be1-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=9674971)

Thanks,

Kim

name: Our Revolution
subject: LIVE Call: Raise the Wage state by state with Rep. Schakowsky, Saru Jayaraman and more!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Join our LIVE National Organize-to-Win Call

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

TOPICS: End Subminimum Wages | US Rep. Jan Schakowsky | Stand with Tipped
Workers | OFW President Saru Jayaraman | Raise the Wage OH, IL, NY |
ServSafe Scam & the Restaurant Lobby | & MORE!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/340?t=1011&akid=4215%2E5885482%2EezmH2- ][IMG]

Don’t miss our [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/340?t=1012&akid=4215%2E5885482%2EezmH2- ]National Organize-to-Win Call focused on raising the
wage in states across the country — LIVE this Monday, April 10th at 8:30
pm ET/5:30 PT!

US Rep. Jan Schakowsky and One Fair Wage President Saru Jayaraman will dig
into work to eliminate subminimum wages in Illinois, Ohio, and beyond!

Then, we’ll turn to building local power with San Antonio Council member
Teri Castillo on her run for re-election and Jorden Giger on his run for
City Council in South Bend IN!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/340?t=1013&akid=4215%2E5885482%2EezmH2- ]RSVP

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8629?t=1014&akid=4215%2E5885482%2EezmH2- ]CANNABIS JUSTICE & CLIMATE JUSTICE

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/340?t=1015&akid=4215%2E5885482%2EezmH2- ][IMG]

Spring is in the air, and we’re [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8629?t=1016&akid=4215%2E5885482%2EezmH2- ]Feeling the Bern! That’s why we’re
releasing this new sticker pack to help ramp up our efforts for Climate
Justice and Cannabis Justice.

No one should be in jail for weed while Big Oil billionaires get away with
burning our planet for record profit. Our Revolution is proud to stand
with Sen. Ed Markey and Reps. Ro Khanna and Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez as
they reintroduce the Green New Deal this Earth Day!

We must stop funding the drug war on poor people and communities of color
and stop handing out billions in subsidies to the fossil fuel industry.

Help fund our work to take on the special interests blocking justice on
both of these issues with a $10 donation and we’ll send you this fresh
sticker bundle!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8629?t=1017&akid=4215%2E5885482%2EezmH2- ]GET YOUR STICKERS

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/340?t=1018&akid=4215%2E5885482%2EezmH2- ][IMG]

As you know, Our Revolution and One Fair Wage are working hard to end the
subminimum wage state by state across the country. Ahead of our Live Call
on Monday, we’ll be kicking off the next phase of our work to Raise the
Wage in Illinois and Ohio!

On Monday morning, our worker activists, organizers, and elected allies
will join US Rep. Jan Schakowsky in the Chicago Loop to call out the
anti-worker National Restaurant Association and their #ServSafeScam
forcing workers to fund lobbying efforts to keep wages low.

IL Rep. Rashid Abdul Nassir will join in support and Chicago Aldermen Mike
Rodriguez will join us in addressing the city council in a legislative
push. And, advocates will share new info on the lobby’s efforts to weaken
child labor laws in order to fill gaps left by thousands of restaurant
workers refusing to work for poverty wages post-pandemic.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8630?t=1019&akid=4215%2E5885482%2EezmH2- ]JOIN US IN CHICAGO

On Monday afternoon, OR Field Director Mike Oles and our crew will
activate our Raise the Wage Ohio Team, gathering at the State House in
Columbus to launch a new petition for higher wages and an end to
subminimum wages.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8622?t=1020&akid=4215%2E5885482%2EezmH2- ]JOIN US IN COLUMBUS!

Looking ahead, we have exciting plans in the works for New York, where a
May 8th civil disobedience action is being planned for Albany — with
special guests we’ll be announcing soon! Stay tuned.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8628?t=1021&akid=4215%2E5885482%2EezmH2- ]JOIN US IN ALBANY

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/340?t=1022&akid=4215%2E5885482%2EezmH2- ][IMG]

We’ll have plenty of ways for you to get involved with our state teams on
the call, but you can plug into our work to raise wages state by state by
joining our team at the link below. One job should be enough!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8222?t=1023&akid=4215%2E5885482%2EezmH2- ]HELP RAISE THE WAGE!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/340?t=1024&akid=4215%2E5885482%2EezmH2- ][IMG]

Every two weeks, we gather to organize directly with progressive leaders,
activists, and fellow workers. Make sure to [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8488?t=1025&akid=4215%2E5885482%2EezmH2- ]RSVP to participate
directly in Zoom and make connections in the chat!

Thousands watch LIVE on our [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8355?t=1026&akid=4215%2E5885482%2EezmH2- ]Facebook and [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8356?t=1027&akid=4215%2E5885482%2EezmH2- ]Twitter, and you can find
more of our video content by subscribing to our [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8357?t=1028&akid=4215%2E5885482%2EezmH2- ]YouTube channel. Help
us build the call — share this [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8596?t=1029&akid=4215%2E5885482%2EezmH2- ]link on your Twitter and [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8488?t=1030&akid=4215%2E5885482%2EezmH2- ]invite
your friends to tune-in with you.

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/340?t=1031&akid=4215%2E5885482%2EezmH2- ][IMG]

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8629?t=1032&akid=4215%2E5885482%2EezmH2- ]GREEN POWER STICKER DUO!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/340?t=1033&akid=4215%2E5885482%2EezmH2- ][IMG]

It’s the same powerful special interests blocking marijuana reform in the
midst of a mass incarceration crisis and escalating fossil fuel production
in the face of a climate crisis.

Donate $10 to fund our organizing work to get this ‘Green Bundle’ sticker
pack and demand freedom for those wrongfully jailed and freedom from
fossil fuels!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8629?t=1034&akid=4215%2E5885482%2EezmH2- ]GET YOUR STICKERS!

★ ★ ★

clean_body: [ stdin# ][IMG] Join our LIVE National Organize-to-Win Call TOPICS: End Subminimum Wages | US Rep. Jan Schakowsky | Stand with Tipped Workers | OFW President Saru Jayaraman | Raise the Wage OH, IL, NY | ServSafe Scam & the Restaurant Lobby | & MORE! ★ ★ ★ [ - ][IMG] Don’t miss our [ - ]National Organize-to-Win Call focused on raising the wage in states across the country — LIVE this Monday, April 10th at 8:30 pm ET/5:30 PT! US Rep. Jan Schakowsky and One Fair Wage President Saru Jayaraman will dig into work to eliminate subminimum wages in Illinois, Ohio, and beyond! Then, we’ll turn to building local power with San Antonio Council member Teri Castillo on her run for re-election and Jorden Giger on his run for City Council in South Bend IN! [ - ]RSVP ★ ★ ★ [ - ]CANNABIS JUSTICE & CLIMATE JUSTICE [ - ][IMG] Spring is in the air, and we’re [ - ]Feeling the Bern! That’s why we’re releasing this new sticker pack to help ramp up our efforts for Climate Justice and Cannabis Justice. No one should be in jail for weed while Big Oil billionaires get away with burning our planet for record profit. Our Revolution is proud to stand with Sen. Ed Markey and Reps. Ro Khanna and Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez as they reintroduce the Green New Deal this Earth Day! We must stop funding the drug war on poor people and communities of color and stop handing out billions in subsidies to the fossil fuel industry. Help fund our work to take on the special interests blocking justice on both of these issues with a $10 donation and we’ll send you this fresh sticker bundle! [ - ]GET YOUR STICKERS ★ ★ ★ [ - ][IMG] As you know, Our Revolution and One Fair Wage are working hard to end the subminimum wage state by state across the country. Ahead of our Live Call on Monday, we’ll be kicking off the next phase of our work to Raise the Wage in Illinois and Ohio! On Monday morning, our worker activists, organizers, and elected allies will join US Rep. Jan Schakowsky in the Chicago Loop to call out the anti-worker National Restaurant Association and their #ServSafeScam forcing workers to fund lobbying efforts to keep wages low. IL Rep. Rashid Abdul Nassir will join in support and Chicago Aldermen Mike Rodriguez will join us in addressing the city council in a legislative push. And, advocates will share new info on the lobby’s efforts to weaken child labor laws in order to fill gaps left by thousands of restaurant workers refusing to work for poverty wages post-pandemic. [ - ]JOIN US IN CHICAGO On Monday afternoon, OR Field Director Mike Oles and our crew will activate our Raise the Wage Ohio Team, gathering at the State House in Columbus to launch a new petition for higher wages and an end to subminimum wages. [ - ]JOIN US IN COLUMBUS! Looking ahead, we have exciting plans in the works for New York, where a May 8th civil disobedience action is being planned for Albany — with special guests we’ll be announcing soon! Stay tuned. [ - ]JOIN US IN ALBANY ★ ★ ★ [ - ][IMG] We’ll have plenty of ways for you to get involved with our state teams on the call, but you can plug into our work to raise wages state by state by joining our team at the link below. One job should be enough! [ - ]HELP RAISE THE WAGE! ★ ★ ★ [ - ][IMG] Every two weeks, we gather to organize directly with progressive leaders, activists, and fellow workers. Make sure to [ - ]RSVP to participate directly in Zoom and make connections in the chat! Thousands watch LIVE on our [ - ]Facebook and [ - ]Twitter, and you can find more of our video content by subscribing to our [ - ]YouTube channel. Help us build the call — share this [ - ]link on your Twitter and [ - ]invite your friends to tune-in with you. ★ ★ ★ [ - ][IMG] ★ ★ ★ [ - ]GREEN POWER STICKER DUO! [ - ][IMG] It’s the same powerful special interests blocking marijuana reform in the midst of a mass incarceration crisis and escalating fossil fuel production in the face of a climate crisis. Donate $10 to fund our organizing work to get this ‘Green Bundle’ sticker pack and demand freedom for those wrongfully jailed and freedom from fossil fuels! [ - ]GET YOUR STICKERS! ★ ★ ★ [ - ][IMG] Don’t forget to [ - ]RSVP NOW for our LIVE interactive broadcast focused on Raising the Wage state by state with US Rep. Jan Schakowsky, One Fair Wage President Saru Jayaraman, San Antonio Council member Teri Castillo on her run for re-election and Jorden Giger for City Council in South Bend, IN. The call kicks off at 8:30 pm ET/5:30 PT this Monday! name: Lucas Kunce
subject: Tucker Carlson says Josh Hawley isn’t a fraud and a coward…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18936?t=1001&akid=3166%2E346206%2EzlJOmM ][IMG]

Some folks on cable news tried to claim Josh Hawley didn’t actually show
us he was a fraud and a coward on January 6th. So let’s get this straight,
Peter.

Josh Hawley didn’t just run away from the Capitol. He ran away from the
same people he raised his fist and claimed to be fighting for just hours
earlier.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18936?t=1002&akid=3166%2E346206%2EzlJOmM ][IMG]

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18936?t=1003&akid=3166%2E346206%2EzlJOmM ]CHIP IN →

As a U.S. Marine, I took an oath to defend our democracy — just like Josh
Hawley when he was sworn into the U.S. Senate. But unlike him, I didn’t
break mine.

That’s why I’m running to replace him — so Missourians will have a real
warrior for working people standing up and fighting for them in
Washington. And it’s why I need your help today, Peter.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18936?t=1004&akid=3166%2E346206%2EzlJOmM ]We don’t need any more frauds or cowards like Josh Hawley in the U.S.
Senate. Will you split a donation of $25 or anything at all between my
campaign and Charles Booker right now so we can defeat him, flip this
seat, and stand up for our democracy?

Thanks for standing with me,

— Lucas Kunce

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18936?t=1005&akid=3166%2E346206%2EzlJOmM ]CHIP IN →

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20230422-3166-footer&t=1006&refcode2=3166_346206_zlJOmM&akid=3166%2E346206%2EzlJOmM

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=3166%2E346206%2EzlJOmM

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

body:
Introducing our new rallying cry for 2023! |
---
_Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District. _
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62166307/402528793/-246429796?refcode=headerfooter-header&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NmVmZjc0OS0yZGUxLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0gq7E_XR_L5er_cGCWU970ZWfPl0qPnUqGUzzchdCtE=)
Friend, For the last 20 years, Supreme Court justice Clarence Thomas has received luxury vacations from shady conservative real estate magnate — and Nazi memorabilia collector — Harlan Crow. The total cost of these vacations, yacht trips, and private jet escapades spans **multi-millions of dollars** , yet they’re _nowhere_ to be found on any of Justice Thomas’ financial disclosures. **That fact in and of itself _reeks_ of corruption.** It’s _even more_ troubling when you factor in the guests who joined the men on these extravagant jaunts around the globe: corporate executives from **Verizon** and **PricewaterhouseCoopers** (Republican mega-donors) _and_ one of the leaders of the American Enterprise Institute, a business-focused conservative think tank out of D.C.. Friend, propriety should be __priority number one__ for public servants. And at the end of the day, a justice serving on our nation’s highest (and theoretically, most nonpartisan) court has _zero business_ accepting extravagant gifts from any big party donor. **Now, activists and elected officials alike are calling for a full on investigation into the nature of the gifts Justice Thomas has been raking in — and we want to make sure they’ve got public support on their side.** [**Will you sign our petition to help put the pressure on the Supreme Court to launch an investigation into Justice Thomas’s unreported campaign gifts?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62166308/402528795/204406895?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NmVmZjc0OS0yZGUxLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0gq7E_XR_L5er_cGCWU970ZWfPl0qPnUqGUzzchdCtE=&emci=12507c5c-82e0-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=86eff749-2de1-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=7878003) | [SIGN ON TO SUPPORT ACCOUNTABILITY BEFORE THE LAW »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62166309/402528796/204406895?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NmVmZjc0OS0yZGUxLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0gq7E_XR_L5er_cGCWU970ZWfPl0qPnUqGUzzchdCtE=&emci=12507c5c-82e0-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=86eff749-2de1-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=7878003)
---
**No one — not even a SCOTUS justice — is above the law.** That’s why, regardless of the outcome, we owe it to Americans to do our due diligence on this.
Stay tuned,
Team Swalwell

name: Gabe Vasquez
subject: BREAKING: Supreme Court rules on abortion pill
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GABE VASQUEZ FOR CONGRESS
body:
| Team, _First_ , the Supreme Court overturned the federal right to abortion established by the 50-year old _Roe v. Wade_ decision last summer, ripping away the right to choice for millions. _Then_ , a conservative Texas judge recently ruled to overturn FDA approval of mifepristone, an extremely common and safe abortion medication that’s been approved and on the market for the last 20 years. **_Now,_ the U.S. Supreme Court stepped in and blocked the lower court’s decision, which means mifepristone remains FDA approved, for now.** This decision could have presented a very real danger to New Mexicans’ reproductive freedoms despite our state protections. Had SCOTUS supported the original decision, they would have ripped away access to a medication that is safer than Tylenol, Ibuprofen, penicillin, and Viagra, and used in more than half of abortions in addition to miscarriages. _We may have won this time, but these extreme attacks on our basic rights and healthcare are only getting worse._ **That’s why it’s CRITICAL we continue to have a pro-choice representative of NM-02 in Congress — especially since my far-right opponent Yvette Herrell has already double-downed on her anti-choice stance.** [**I will ALWAYS defend your right to choose and access the reproductive health care you and your families need. Will you help protect this seat from anti-choice Herrell by chipping in $10 or more right now?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62166402/402529398/1324874474?refcode=fl_email_fr_20230421mifepristone_gv_180da_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYWNkMTIxMi0yZWUxLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rLKP9bh8JnBLYjRITt84BL6mKekUvWkblEmwGZBguQQ=) | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

name: Rick Larsen
subject: I talk about climate change everyday, not just on Earth Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Citizens to Elect Rick Larsen
body:
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62166604/402530114/-201694504?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ODZmMzBmNy0yZWUxLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6o86qKc5wekifJrdbLhKwXBDug1Oxm9qRRuWbpWeEGY=&emci=02f0f872-27de-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=786f30f7-2ee1-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=9494239)
---

| | **Happy Earth Day!** Earth Day was created to educate the public on how harmful pollution is, how we can reduce pollution, and how to protect the environment for generations to come. Today, I am happy to report that over the last year I have worked hard to tackle the biggest climate issues of our day. In the last year, I supported and voted for the Inflation Reduction Act (IRA) to provide historic investments in the fight against climate change. **This bill is expected to cut carbon emissions by 40% by 2030 in the United States.** Here are a few examples of how the IRA achieves these cuts:
* Providing $27 billion to deploy carbon emission reducing technologies with an emphasis on deployment in disadvantaged communities.
* $5 billion to support healthy forests, forest fire resiliency, forest conservation, and urban tree planting.
* $3 billion for the U.S. Postal Service to purchase zero-emissions vehicles.
* $2.6 billion to conserve and restore coastal habitats around Puget Sound and other marine ecosystems.

We are making meaningful progress on climate change and I am working hard to make even more progress. But this progress is only possible because you sent me and others to Congress who are dedicated to this fight. To keep it up, we need to build our grassroots organizing program. **[Can you chip in $5 today and help us grow our grassroots organizing efforts?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62166605/402530115/1596212816?refcode=2023-04-22-earthday&recurring=0&amount=5&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=786f30f7-2ee1-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ODZmMzBmNy0yZWUxLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6o86qKc5wekifJrdbLhKwXBDug1Oxm9qRRuWbpWeEGY=)** **I am committed to tackling climate change and building a better future for all our kids.** Together we can fight climate change and protect our future. Happy Earth Day, _Rick_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | clean_body: | | | | Happy Earth Day! Earth Day was created to educate the public on how harmful pollution is, how we can reduce pollution, and how to protect the environment for generations to come. Today, I am happy to report that over the last year I have worked hard to tackle the biggest climate issues of our day. In the last year, I supported and voted for the Inflation Reduction Act (IRA) to provide historic investments in the fight against climate change. This bill is expected to cut carbon emissions by 40% by 2030 in the United States. Here are a few examples of how the IRA achieves these cuts: Providing $27 billion to deploy carbon emission reducing technologies with an emphasis on deployment in disadvantaged communities. $5 billion to support healthy forests, forest fire resiliency, forest conservation, and urban tree planting. $3 billion for the U.S. Postal Service to purchase zero-emissions vehicles. $2.6 billion to conserve and restore coastal habitats around Puget Sound and other marine ecosystems. We are making meaningful progress on climate change and I am working hard to make even more progress. But this progress is only possible because you sent me and others to Congress who are dedicated to this fight. To keep it up, we need to build our grassroots organizing program. = I am committed to tackling climate change and building a better future for all our kids. Together we can fight climate change and protect our future. Happy Earth Day, Rick | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for and authorized by Citizens to Elect Rick Larsen. | This email was sent by . Peter,

Earth Day is an opportunity to celebrate our planet and recommit to creating policies that are environmentally friendly and will protect our planet for generations to come.

While Republicans block climate action in Congress, Seth and the Democrats are working hard to fight climate change and ensure our children and grandchildren have a healthy planet to call home.

[There’s no time to waste in the fight against climate change. Seth has always been an advocate for clean energy and investing in environmentally-friendly programs. In Rhode Island, he launched a green bank that helped cities and towns build out solar, wind, and climate resiliency projects. All of which saved taxpayers money and reduced fossil fuel emissions.

Now, as a member of the House Natural Resources Committee, Seth is focused on how affordable clean energy will help Rhode Island’s economy, and how we can bring Rhode Island’s leadership on wind energy production to the rest of the country.

Fighting climate change should not be a partisan issue. In Congress, Seth will work with anyone — Democrats, Republicans, or Independents — to protect our planet for future generations. [If you’re with him, add your name to tell Republicans to stop ignoring climate change and finally do something about it. ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62166686/402531638/1674330506?source=EM_NBI_SM_20230422_PT_earthday_0_3MO_teammagaziner_NA_NA_earthday&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOTFlNTMxYi0yZmUxLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iVcT7IfBg8EJsYwDyzLotj4qxfu2UIq4DEC4bvVB0SM=&emci=337abfcf-91e0-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=b91e531b-2fe1-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=15384964)

Today, we hope you find time to get outside and celebrate our beautiful planet.

— Team Magaziner

name: Sign your name (via Left Action)
subject: Sign: Impeach the Abortion Pill Judge
body:
| | | | |
---
| | | [Impeach the Abortion Pill Judge](https://default.salsalabs.org/T73f8b93a-cf89-4410-bf47-8ee445a976c0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T110cbb7f-2736-4699-84e7-49d485946225/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Judge Matthew Kacsmaryk, a Trump appointee, went way out of bounds when he ignored decades of scientific evidence and [ordered](https://default.salsalabs.org/T02382891-c868-4091-b9f8-c91b401aeae2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) the FDA to reverse its approval of the abortion pill mifepristone. This was not his job -- not even close -- and is reason enough for him to be impeached and removed. But there's more: \- When being considered for confirmation, he improperly [had his name removed](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ted26ce15-c0a9-45b8-9563-d1681dc7467c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) from a controversial article in order to hide it from Senators. \- He also [hid the details](https://default.salsalabs.org/T98b35dd1-644d-4fe9-b94c-6e8f96ff5359/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) of a multimillion dollar investment in an unknown company. \- And there's a whole lot of [other reasons](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1c917cb3-ef69-4aa9-89ed-41337dfb532c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) why he needs to be removed now. Kacsmaryk should have never gotten this job in the first place, and given what we know now, he sure as hell shouldn't keep it. [**Sign the petition, and tell Congress to impeach and remove Kacsmaryk ASAP.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc0d3b704-87c8-4139-8cf5-c3c6d1879fcd/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---

| | | Thank you, Left Action _[P. S. - if you no longer wish to receive updates, use the unsubscribe link below]_ _Why sign a petition? _ _By signing a petition, you demonstrate to those in power that people care about an issue, and will vote/act accordingly. The more signatures a petition gets, the more seriously those leaders will take it. It’s a sign that they will be rewarded for doing the right thing, and face a hassle if they don’t. Plus, right wing nuts are pushing hard on petitions for their positions, and we need to show leaders that our side cares too, otherwise the one side screaming loudest will be the one that gets attention. Will one signature make a difference? Almost certainly not. But could thousands tip the balance on a critical issue? For sure. It’s already happened many times. Political leaders routinely change positions when they get a lot of pushback from voters, and corporate leaders do as well, when there is pushback from consumers. And you know what? Even if you don't make change right away, there's still value in letting the world know how you feel, rather than keeping things bottled up inside. __So take action, get others on board, and help make a difference. _
---

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | | | | Judge Matthew Kacsmaryk, a Trump appointee, went way out of bounds when he ignored decades of scientific evidence and the FDA to reverse its approval of the abortion pill mifepristone. This was not his job -- not even close -- and is reason enough for him to be impeached and removed. But there's more: \- When being considered for confirmation, he improperly from a controversial article in order to hide it from Senators. \- He also of a multimillion dollar investment in an unknown company. \- And there's a whole lot of why he needs to be removed now. Kacsmaryk should have never gotten this job in the first place, and given what we know now, he sure as hell shouldn't keep it. | | | | | | | Thank you, Left Action [P.
