name: Friends of the Earth
subject: DOUBLE YOUR IMPACT: The insect apocalypse is looming
body:
| | | | | [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e_s17_main_cobrandedemail_c3)
---|---|---

| | **Dear Friend, ** | **Act now before we lose vulnerable pollinators forever: Donate $27 before midnight and help us reach our $180,000 Earth Day goal! ** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [$27 donation](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1736100?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[$50 donation](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1736101?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[$100 donation ](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1736102?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1736103?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
An "insect apocalypse."
A "second Silent Spring."
A "catastrophic collapse of nature's ecosystems."
This is how scientists are describing the loss of bees and other insects. **[The time to act is now: Donate $27 or more and help us meet our $180,000 Earth Day goal for pollinators and the planet! When you do, your gift will be matched, dollar for dollar -- but only until midnight TONIGHT.](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1736104?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)**
Neonicotinoid pesticides are a key driver of this crisis. They can impact bees' ability to navigate and reproduce and even kill bees on contact. But they're also the most widely used insecticides in agriculture.
The EPA has a chance to ban neonics once and for all. Instead, it might **_approve these pesticides for another 15 years._** But there's still hope, Friend. Because of supporters like you, we have the chance to make real change -- change that would help protect bees, people, and the planet. Will you join us in this fight?
**Help get bee-killing pesticides out of our food system. Donate $27 immediately and help us reach our $180,000 goal before midnight TONIGHT! **
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[$27 donation](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1736100?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[$50 donation](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1736101?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[$100 donation ](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1736102?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1736103?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Bees play a crucial role in their ecosystems. From fields of blooming wildflowers to rows of veggies on organic farms, these insects and others aid in plant reproduction. Many of these plants support an entire web of life by offering habitat and food for countless other species.
We rely on bees and other pollinators for 75% of the world's food crops, including the most nutritious -- so when we lose bees,**we also lose some of the foods that keep us healthy!** In fact, the decline in bees and other pollinators has already harmed global fruit, vegetable, and nut production. Without access to these vital crops and a healthy diet, people could be at higher risk of _**heart disease, stroke, diabetes, and even cancer, according to a recent study.**_
There's no mystery here. Study after study has found that the massive use of pesticides, like Bayer-Monsanto's bee-toxic neonicotinoids, are key drivers in the decimation of pollinators.
But pollinator-killers like Bayer-Monsanto are sweeping their lethal impact under the rug -- and the United States EPA is giving them a free pass, allowing widespread use of toxic pesticides instead of shifting away from chemicals we KNOW are killing massive numbers of bees.
**Stop the downward spiral of vulnerable pollinator populations. Donate $27 or more to Friends of the Earth today! **
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[$27 donation](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1736100?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[$50 donation](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1736101?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[$100 donation ](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1736102?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1736103?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Bees are a canary in the coal mine, signaling that the toxic way we produce food is on a deadly track. We must act NOW to protect our health and ensure that we are not among the last generations to share the planet with countless species of wild bees.
At Friends of the Earth, we are doing everything we can to help save pollinators, protect our health, and stop the destruction of our planet. We're working to ban toxic pesticides that are driving the decline of bees and butterflies. At the same time, we're pushing major grocery companies like Kroger to stop selling food grown with these chemicals. With your help and membership support today, we can win.
But the bees are running out of time -- **and they need you. **
If we don't stand up to Big Ag now, we could stand to lose _hundreds_ of wild bee species in North America alone. It's up to you to help prevent a world without these vulnerable pollinators. Please, Friend, we need you by our side as we ramp up our efforts to save wild bees from extinction and protect our planet.
**Act now to give pollinators a fighting chance. Rush your $27 donation while it can still be matched, and help us reach our $180,000 Earth Day goal before the clock strikes midnight.**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[$27 donation](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1736100?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[$50 donation](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1736101?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[$100 donation ](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1736102?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1736103?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Standing with you,
Kendra Klein
Deputy director of science,
Friends of the Earth **

name: Dr. Kim Schrier
subject: 🌎 This Earth Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
I hope you'll join me in recommitting to the fight to protect our environment for generations to come. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62166814/402531838/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNzFlNTMxYi0yZmUxLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rBxqlnYGB8kBNNxk0WyQ6hc2Oy6ApbQ9jivXV7uJ_pA=&emci=4c829b83-81e0-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=c71e531b-2fe1-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=15820338)
---
Happy Earth Day, Peter!

In Washington's 8th District, we are surrounded by some of the most beautiful wilderness our country has to offer. But we've also seen the effects of climate change firsthand – from destructive wildfires and new diseases affecting crops and trees, to warmer temperatures in our tributaries and species extinction.

Climate change is the greatest moral and existential issue of our time, and we only have a few years to make major changes before we see irreversible and profound damage to our environment. We can't continue to drag our feet on this issue any longer–which is why, as your congresswoman, I will always fight for bold solutions to protect our planet.

Combating the climate crisis has long been an important issue for me. Prior to attending medical school, I spent a year working at the Environmental Protection Agency (EPA). Now, I'm working in Congress to protect our planet for generations to come.

Over the past few years, I helped pass the Inflation Reduction Act, which makes the single largest investment in climate solutions ever. I also helped pass the bipartisan Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act which included provisions I championed to make our forests more resilient to wildfires, protect our rivers and streams, and more. But we still have a lot of work ahead of us.

As co-chair of the House Sustainable Energy and Environment Coalition’s Climate and Agriculture Task Force, I'm working to make sure the 2023 Farm Bill includes provisions that are great for both our farmers and the planet.

I'm ready to keep working to reduce carbon emissions, protect public lands, and mitigate climate change impacts. But I know that the only way we're going to enact lasting changes that will fight climate change is if we all work together. **This Earth Day, I hope you'll join me in recommitting to the fight to protect our environment for generations to come.**

Thank you,

Kim

Rep. Kim Schrier is a doctor, scientist, and mom, fighting for Washington's 8th District in Congress. This is one of the most competitive districts in the country, so we need your help to keep Kim in Congress. Chip in now to help protect Kim's seat in 2024. | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62166830/402531856/-1888718630?refcode=em23_230422_earthday_engg_gq_act___dks_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230422_earthday_engg_gq_act___dks_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=c71e531b-2fe1-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNzFlNTMxYi0yZmUxLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rBxqlnYGB8kBNNxk0WyQ6hc2Oy6ApbQ9jivXV7uJ_pA=)

But we've also seen the effects of climate change firsthand – from destructive wildfires and new diseases affecting crops and trees, to warmer temperatures in our tributaries and species extinction. Climate change is the greatest moral and existential issue of our time, and we only have a few years to make major changes before we see irreversible and profound damage to our environment. We can't continue to drag our feet on this issue any longer–which is why, as your congresswoman, I will always fight for bold solutions to protect our planet. Combating the climate crisis has long been an important issue for me. Prior to attending medical school, I spent a year working at the Environmental Protection Agency (EPA). Now, I'm working in Congress to protect our planet for generations to come. Over the past few years, I helped pass the Inflation Reduction Act, which makes the single largest investment in climate solutions ever. I also helped pass the bipartisan Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act which included provisions I championed to make our forests more resilient to wildfires, protect our rivers and streams, and more. But we still have a lot of work ahead of us. As co-chair of the House Sustainable Energy and Environment Coalition’s Climate and Agriculture Task Force, I'm working to make sure the 2023 Farm Bill includes provisions that are great for both our farmers and the planet. I'm ready to keep working to reduce carbon emissions, protect public lands, and mitigate climate change impacts. But I know that the only way we're going to enact lasting changes that will fight climate change is if we all work together. This Earth Day, I hope you'll join me in recommitting to the fight to protect our environment for generations to come. Thank you, Kim Rep. Kim Schrier is a doctor, scientist, and mom, fighting for Washington's 8th District in Congress. This is one of the most competitive districts in the country, so we need your help to keep Kim in Congress. Chip in now to help protect Kim's seat in 2024. | = Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress Contributions or gifts to Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress are not tax deductible. body:
I am absolutely livid.

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62168258/402536072/-2042826227?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MTlkYjI1Yy0zMGUxLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=f36BZnvU3RD2hhVFU5QZb271irjjym1ZUl9KRFk6zy8=)

Dear Peter,

I am absolutely livid.

House Republicans are threatening to use a potentially catastrophic debt default as leverage to hold the nation hostage and push their extreme agenda, which would result in devastating cuts to working families.

The Republican Party claims to be the party of fiscal responsibility, _**yet they are willing to risk the financial stability of our country for their own political gain.**_

Their actions are shameful, unacceptable, and could have severe consequences for the American people. We cannot let them continue to hold the American people hostage.

It is time for us to take a stand and push back against their dangerous and destructive tactics.

**[**Peter, will you speak up and tell House Republicans what you think about their AWFUL spending cuts? »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62168259/402536073/57138481?refcode=MTFC_20230422_EMPOLL_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MTlkYjI1Yy0zMGUxLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=f36BZnvU3RD2hhVFU5QZb271irjjym1ZUl9KRFk6zy8=&emci=e29c5cad-7fe0-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=819db25c-30e1-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=18839602)** | [SUBMIT YOUR RESPONSE NOW »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62168260/402536074/57138481?refcode=MTFC_20230422_EMPOLL_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MTlkYjI1Yy0zMGUxLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=f36BZnvU3RD2hhVFU5QZb271irjjym1ZUl9KRFk6zy8=&emci=e29c5cad-7fe0-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=819db25c-30e1-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=18839602)

name: Kirsten Engel
subject: It's Earth Day — so let's talk about it.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Engel for Arizona
body:
https://www.engelforarizona.com/ [https://www.engelforarizona.com/]
Happy Earth Day, friend!
I love Earth Day. As a former Park Ranger, few things make me happier than enjoying all the beautiful outdoors that Arizona has to offer.
But Earth Day is also a reminder of the serious environmental issues facing our state — and our planet.
Top of mind is Arizona's water crisis. I've spent years studying this issue and fighting for a solution in the State Legislature. And while Arizona has made some incredible progress, we'll need more buy-in from Colorado River Basin states to win this fight.
I've worked at the EPA, taught as an environmental law professor at colleges across the country (including the University of Arizona!), and legislated on climate issues for years.
Here's my biggest lesson: the best way to tackle these problems is with collaboration, open-mindedness, and hard work. We can support working families, create good-paying jobs, AND tackle the climate crisis, but we can only do it together.
I hope you and your loved ones have a beautiful Earth Day!
Best,
Kirsten
CHIP IN NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_042223_EarthDay]
CHIP IN MONTHLY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_042223_EarthDay&recurring=1]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_042223_EarthDay [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_042223_EarthDay] Kirsten is a mom, an environmental attorney, and a former State Legislator who has spent the past six years fighting to restore funding to public schools, protect Arizona's natural resources, and make our communities safer.
She’s ready to take that fight to Washington to find common-sense solutions to the challenges we’re facing here in Arizona's Sixth Congressional District.
In 2022, Kirsten lost her race by one of the smallest margins in the country. Will you make sure she can build a winning campaign early by chipping in now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_042223_EarthDay]

[ SANTA FE, N.M. – Involuntary manslaughter charges against actor Alec Baldwin will be dropped, New Mexico special prosecutors announced Thursday. The involuntary manslaughter charges stem from a fatal shooting on the set of “Rust,” a movie Baldwin had been filming in New Mexico in October 2021. ---

Right now, increasing numbers of floods, tornadoes, and other natural disasters are threatening farmers’ livelihoods without proper safety nets in place. The people who put food on our tables shouldn’t have to worry about not being able to put food on their own if a storm strikes. We can, and must, do better.

Nikki’s tackling the problem head-on by spearheading efforts to make sure that important measures like crop insurance are included in this year’s farm bill. The farm bill only comes up once every five years, so this is a unique opportunity for Nikki to make real change happen for farmers nationwide.

[We need to send a message to Congress loud and clear that Nikki’s bipartisan work to champion farmers is critical. Add your name to demand members of Congress include Nikki’s proposals in the upcoming farm bill:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62168697/402537313/17211230?refcode=EM_PET_230422Farmers_NHQ_6_TESTA_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYzhlNGNjMy0zMmUxLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aqo2gbBn4GyoZU89qXXOyB_2nz3mgeJo7IbX0vmsFRQ=&emci=1b8e4cc3-32e1-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=1c8e4cc3-32e1-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=13891387)

name: Bob Casey for Senate
subject: Won’t sugarcoat this
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC

Let’s just get real about this. When you donate, you help us build our resources so we can make early investments into defending this seat and protecting Democrats’ slim Senate majority.
Here are just a few examples of ways we might invest your donation:
🎉 Setting up on-the-ground campaign events
🤝 Hiring for the top positions on our campaign team
📋 Opening our first offices across the Commonwealth
Since we’re being transparent here, we’ll just say it: all of these take resources. But even $5 from you today would bring us closer to our end-of-month goal and ensure we can make the best choices for the ultimate success of this campaign.
Early investments in critical Senate races like ours will make all the difference. That’s why we’re so grateful to everyone who is able to chip in to this email.
**[We’d be honored if you invest a donation into Bob’s re-election fight today. Whether it’s $5 or $50 or even $500, your generous gift will go far in this competitive Senate race.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62168995/402538488/1735275206?refcode=em20230422-1-ngp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMzQ1NTAwOC0zNGUxLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yhIXULyqgjp8ESXXPj7U75OHTpQRQcDUG2s6NFCybSI=)**
Thank you so much,
Team Casey

If lobbyists want to meet with me, they better bring their good ideas, not their checkbooks.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=21608%2E3422442%2E560EVZ)
**Derek, I’m the only Democrat in this race who has never taken a dime of corporate PAC money and doesn’t take contributions from lobbyists**. Here’s the story behind it.
A few years ago I attended a reception for newly elected Members in DC. A lobbyist came up to me and said “Well, I guess you’re one of the new Members we’ll never see.” I asked him why. He said it was because I didn’t take corporate PAC money.
Since that day, I’ve said clearly—**if lobbyists want to meet with me, they better bring their good ideas, not their checkbooks.** There are lobbyists for organizations like Planned Parenthood who I’m happy to work with and learn from. But no matter who you are lobbying for, I’m proud to prove that I won’t be swayed by your check.
As Members of the House, we are one vote of 435. That often means only a fraction of the bills we want to pass will ever become law. But we all have a choice to make when it comes to corporate PAC money. **As Members of Congress, we’re privileged to be in positions of power, and we should use our power to stand up to the status quo and corporate special interests.**
Californians deserve to know that their Senator works for them. Whether it’s using my whiteboard to hold Wall Street CEOs accountable or passing legislation to prevent Big Pharma from raising prices, I’m proud to fight for working people.
Our campaign is funded by real, working people, and our average contribution this week is $28. I rely on supporters like you chipping in to keep our campaign afloat. **[Can you make a donation today to show we don’t need corporate PAC and lobbyist money to run a winning campaign?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230422-1?refcode=EMAG22_1_WAL_20230422_V1_F&refcode2=21608_3422442_560EVZ&akid=21608%2E3422442%2E560EVZ)**
**[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230422-1?amount=5&refcode=EMAG22_1_WAL_20230422_V1_F&refcode2=21608_3422442_560EVZ&akid=21608%2E3422442%2E560EVZ)**
—Katie Porter

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAG22_1_WAL_20230422_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=21608_3422442_560EVZ&akid=21608%2E3422442%2E560EVZ)**
---

Katie Porter for Senate

Irvine, CA 92616

name: Martin Heinrich
subject: Asking for your thoughts on our national parks
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate
body:
Today kicks off National Park Week! [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62169349/402539811/-272948131?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230422_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMDI2YjFlMC0zNWUxLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gDfWXFDRjMpz0l8MHPAfCKK_5fqe3sMaVkBu5dqIqRE=&emci=0d26b1e0-35e1-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=1026b1e0-35e1-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=252045)
---
Today kicks off National Park Week, folks! I hope you get the opportunity to visit a national park today — especially since entry is _free_! Here in New Mexico, we treasure our two national parks, Carlsbad Caverns and White Sands National Parks. Back in 2019, I even helped White Sands get designated as a national park to boost the local economy and ensure its spectacular views and beautiful sandscapes get the attention (and protection) they deserve. Our national parks are beloved by so many folks in New Mexico and across the country. From helping pass the _Great American Outdoors Act_ into law to repair and protect our national parks to introducing the _Recovering America’s Wildlife Act_ to preserve our parks’ wildlife and plant species, I will always fight in the Senate to keep our parks around for future generations. **[I’d love to hear what our national parks mean to you. Before you head out to enjoy the outdoors, could you answer my National Park Survey?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62169350/402539812/-536323441?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230422_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMDI2YjFlMC0zNWUxLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gDfWXFDRjMpz0l8MHPAfCKK_5fqe3sMaVkBu5dqIqRE=&emci=0d26b1e0-35e1-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=1026b1e0-35e1-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=252045)** | [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62169351/402539813/-536323441?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230422_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMDI2YjFlMC0zNWUxLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gDfWXFDRjMpz0l8MHPAfCKK_5fqe3sMaVkBu5dqIqRE=&emci=0d26b1e0-35e1-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=1026b1e0-35e1-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=252045)
---
Thank you — now go out and enjoy one (or more) of our national treasures!
— Martin
| Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate

name: Fair Fight
subject: Climate justice is key to a strong democracy. Here’s why →
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FAIR FIGHT
body:
We must elect climate justice leaders — and that starts with protecting our freedom to vote. |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62169353/402539925/1793776944?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20230422_f_earthday_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ODUwMDAxZS0zNmUxLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HUc5DvxMRh4ZSzxJd-6Q_o-UhDKZ1pZkJjZyvx8J6Bc=&emci=651ad314-72e0-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=9850001e-36e1-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=1037277)

| | Happy Earth Day! 🌎 There’s no denying it — the widespread impacts of the climate crisis continue to worsen each day. And this moment demands immediate action. **That’s why we’re proud to support Georgia Conservation Voters (GCV) this Earth Day.** They’re recruiting volunteers and organizing voters in Georgia — helping to elect climate justice leaders and hold our elected officials accountable to enacting better climate policies. And the GCV team knows that without fighting back against big corporations and extremists pushing anti-environmental policies, we can’t make real progress. [_**Split a donation between Fair Fight and Georgia Conservation Voters.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62169355/402539927/339085691?amount=20&refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20230422_f_earthday_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ODUwMDAxZS0zNmUxLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HUc5DvxMRh4ZSzxJd-6Q_o-UhDKZ1pZkJjZyvx8J6Bc=) | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62169358/402539930/339085691?amount=20&refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20230422_f_earthday_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ODUwMDAxZS0zNmUxLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HUc5DvxMRh4ZSzxJd-6Q_o-UhDKZ1pZkJjZyvx8J6Bc=)
---
Fair Fight is working towards a democracy where we have true climate justice — and that means ensuring Black and brown folks who are hit hardest by the climate crisis are able to make their voices heard in elections.
We know that the same extremists attempting to suppress our votes, particularly for communities of color, are the same ones who deny the urgency of the climate crisis. It’s essential that we elect, re-elect, and work with climate justice leaders to pass comprehensive climate policies, and that starts with protecting access to the ballot box. Leading up to critical election cycles like 2024, Fair Fight works tirelessly to elect leaders who will defend our democracy and fight for climate action.
[_**In honor of Earth Day, can you split a $20 donation to Fair Fight and Georgia Conservation Voters right away? Your contribution today will support our mission of expanding access to the ballot box AND boost the climate justice movement.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62169360/402539933/339085691?amount=20&refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20230422_f_earthday_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ODUwMDAxZS0zNmUxLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HUc5DvxMRh4ZSzxJd-6Q_o-UhDKZ1pZkJjZyvx8J6Bc=)
[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62169362/402539935/339085691?amount=20&refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20230422_f_earthday_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ODUwMDAxZS0zNmUxLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HUc5DvxMRh4ZSzxJd-6Q_o-UhDKZ1pZkJjZyvx8J6Bc=)
---
Thank you for your support,
The Fair Fight Team

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: [WATCH] Thank you!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J

name: Helen Gym
subject: Earth Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Helen Gym
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-april23-em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-april23-em]
Hi team,

Happy Earth Day! Today, we celebrate our planet and recommit to protecting it for future generations. But we can't just talk about it — we must take bold action to address the climate crisis.

That's why I'm proud to have earned the endorsement of climate organizations like Sierra Club, Sunrise Movement, Food and Water Action, and the Jane Fonda Climate PAC. As the only candidate championing a Green New Deal for Philadelphia, I'm committed to taking on the fossil fuel industry and leading a strong agenda for environmental justice.

Our city faces a critical moment to transition away from fossil fuels and build a just, green, and sustainable city for all. As Mayor, I will work to ensure that our local government meets its commitment to a net-zero energy footprint and I’ll bring our private sector along too.

I’ll approach the climate crisis and its harmful manifestations not as a side project, but as an integral part of addressing decades of disinvestment and systemic inequality in our city.

Will you join me in building a healthier, greener, livable Philadelphia? Your contribution of $5, $15, $25, or whatever you can give will help us power our campaign and make our climate vision a reality. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-april23-em]

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your contribution will go through immediately:

CHIP IN $5 NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-april23-em?express_lane=true&amount=5]
CHIP IN $10 NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-april23-em?express_lane=true&amount=10]

CHIP IN $15 NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-april23-em?express_lane=true&amount=15]
CHIP IN $25 NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-april23-em?express_lane=true&amount=25]

CHIP IN $50 NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-april23-em?express_lane=true&amount=50]
ANOTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-april23-em]

My administration will modernize public transit, stabilize and retrofit aging homes, green and cool neighborhoods, and transform our public schools into safe, sustainable community anchors through a Green New Deal for Philadelphia schools.

This will not only provide children and educators with the facilities they deserve but also engage the entire city in a real facilities planning process to revitalize neighborhood schools instead of closing them. By doing so, we'll create family-sustaining, union jobs and place Philadelphia students into a pipeline of opportunity.

We can’t wait for action at the state and federal levels on the climate crisis. Cities like Philadelphia must lead the way on building a green, healthy, and livable environment for this generation and generations to come.

Thank you,
Helen
Helen Gym is a Philly mom, a school teacher, a community organizer, and former City Councilmember. She has been fighting for Philly families and communities for decades — winning more resources for our schools, safer communities, and a more affordable Philadelphia. Our efforts are supported by everyday people like you who give what they can, whenever they can, because they want to see a safer, more prosperous, equitable Philadelphia that works for all of us. If you’d like to donate to Helen and help elect her as Philadelphia’s next Mayor, click here:
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-em-feb2023]
Friends of Helen Gym
PO Box 11766
Philadelphia, PA 19101
United States
www.helengym.com [https://www.helengym.com/] | info@helengym.com [info@helengym.com]

We are on pace for record amounts of human smuggling and illicit drugs to cross our Southern Border -- **[enough is enough.](http://links.dolanforsenate.com/u/click?_t=879ec3883fbb432d91bdf6fa5c9b36c6&_m=a90fe657ccce4f64a0989c8b745d8dea&_e=nWt1FgGZLb7dCbGrSApcN324jiLIT_VNvl1wjQ6NwBKksCTR17VXxLNCxeuve_creiwWNFD0UWW3wF1OrPV_QEoRaHmoLzjbWT4aySTL2B1frbKrAR_q4yLz13_Ks6O7Gc9JzrlJikWCnet9NHvuJhcUQ-YC_RIfe6A26fQ_sDuqceeAgQlQ49vDvOLX4ARl1eDfrx74fQaON-eD-Q8emBxd1a8Ow0Hz7BQ2Oq9KGLntU8oIg8Iy5rsC7dB5qcRdAFHxiJ6vYnA28lS6PXbZ_z4vuKaPXtOspJEL7PUf4ttxQeIU93F03Di45tTqfipG_gGNcgHBm0eZvRCbjMhVtRMzjuq6BxmGxyMNkmTTE0_q0HnODxpNPmx4UWC9zcR0Yufpa0oUN9hyZ15FezGR5Y-U6TYRKAF7c-UoE4nF-H1ru6Cmm-zx5GQyJks4V8TK_Ou0Wzj1zxnHfHeCt6iLjKpgS3b_c2bi8iae2e5Z2geLa-oUGtZRQ9xYnhM43s-E7X9r0jp7L-yskowztmlLnQ%3D%3D)**

Despite the hopes of the Biden administration, **we have NOT forgotten about the Southern Border**. As the White House continues to ignore the problem, Americans feel the repercussions of years of failed Border policy every day.

| [ **SECURE THE SOUTHERN BORDER** ](http://links.dolanforsenate.com/u/click?_t=879ec3883fbb432d91bdf6fa5c9b36c6&_m=a90fe657ccce4f64a0989c8b745d8dea&_e=nWt1FgGZLb7dCbGrSApcN324jiLIT_VNvl1wjQ6NwBKksCTR17VXxLNCxeuve_creiwWNFD0UWW3wF1OrPV_QEoRaHmoLzjbWT4aySTL2B1frbKrAR_q4yLz13_Ks6O7Gc9JzrlJikWCnet9NHvuJhcUQ-YC_RIfe6A26fQ_sDuqceeAgQlQ49vDvOLX4ARl1eDfrx74fQaON-eD-Q8emBxd1a8Ow0Hz7BQ2Oq9KGLntU8oIg8Iy5rsC7dB5qcRdAFHxiJ6vYnA28lS6PXbZ_z4vuKaPXtOspJEL7PUf4ttxQeIU93F03Di45tTqfipG_gGNcgHBm0eZvRCbjMhVtRMzjuq6BxmGxyMNkmTTE08tGalCqYGW3RC4SXc_LLk-pPrNqrnjzitB9hgyYOuw6ddebufVvM53QTP6ieD-NYrQs16hIj5DwaJoDrOKwGOmU_mbkbKOcaL5vDeFRj-jO00S9QrjooWoKQxWQ0nY9l5qURCBzGdGcO2EMvB3q-s1QTBYITaGPvepUHR0XKpFPA%3D%3D)

subject: We can’t let plastic rule the ocean
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon

| | Happy Earth Day – On this Earth Day, we can all celebrate the fact that the Inflation Reduction Act and the Bipartisan Infrastructure Law are the biggest investments America has ever made to tackle the climate crisis. But we can't rest on our laurels. After all, we have a LOT of work still to do – to defend those investments from the corporate lobbyists that are teaming up with the MAGA extremists to turn the clock back; and to press ahead to reduce climate pollution wherever we can. **Here's one thing I've been thinking a lot about lately: plastic pollution.** Plastic is everywhere. And especially, plastic is overwhelming our oceans. We are at the point where some studies are finding more microplastics in the ocean than zooplankton, a vital link in the ocean's food chain. And some reports project that by 2050 we will have more plastic waste in the ocean than fish. **Think about that: Unless we act, our oceans will soon have _more plastic than fish._** These microplastics get into our drinking water, our food, and our bodies. These polymers have devastating long-term health effects for people, as well as animals, fish, and birds. And plastic production is a huge contributor to carbon pollution driving the climate crisis. We need action, and we need it now. Here's what you can do to help on this Earth Day: Plant a tree, pick up litter, make a plan to use less plastic, and **[make a donation to Climate Champions – my grassroots campaign to elect more leaders in Congress who will join us in this fight for Team -- Just a year ago, our razor-thin Senate majority confirmed Justice Ketanji Brown Jackson as the FIRST Black woman on the Supreme Court, but **you STILL haven’t completed our _official_ anniversary approval poll!**

Now is the time to speak out. While the Court's ultra-conservative majority leads a far-right assault on reproductive rights, gun safety, and even our democracy itself, it’s _never_ been more critical for Democrats to show we’re _still_ standing with Justice Jackson.

name: JohnFetterman.com
subject: Ugh, we wish we didn’t have to send this email
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
The truth is we’re falling behind our goal for April.
#
Derek,
This isn’t the email we want to be sending with nine days left before our end-of-month deadline.
Despite a ton of effort, **it looks like we’re falling behind on our goals for April and we don’t know if we can plausibly catch up.**
Occasional slowdowns in fundraising are pretty normal for campaigns, but we were really hoping to reach our goal and head into May as strong as possible. Now, it’s looking unlikely unless we see a big surge soon.
**[Derek, do you think you could chip in for the first time before our big deadline? Any amount would help us close this shortfall — whether you can afford $5, $25, or more.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230422-1?refcode=em20230422-1-8344&refcode2=8344_434096_lPtJn6&akid=8344%2E434096%2ElPtJn6)**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230422-1?amount=5&refcode=em20230422-8344&refcode2=8344_434096_lPtJn6&akid=8344%2E434096%2ElPtJn6)**
No matter what happens when the clock strikes midnight on April 30, we’re deeply grateful to this team. Thanks to yinz, we’re supporting John’s work with grassroots funding instead of prioritizing mega-donor checks.
Thank you, truly, for being part of this.
💛 Team Fetterman HQ

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20230422-8344-footer&t=1&refcode2=8344_434096_lPtJn6&akid=8344%2E434096%2ElPtJn6)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=2&akid=8344%2E434096%2ElPtJn6)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=8344%2E434096%2ElPtJn6)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: Laura Friedman
subject: Earth Day Petition: Protect California’s Biodiversity!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Laura Friedman for Congress
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62171105/402545759/62647395?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODBiNTg1YmQtM2FlMS1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=-MrN41ZYxQ6JySgPuDfiphGKfXlPvo-BWnhH99pUYbY=) Happy Earth Day, friend.

California is home to some of the planet's most treasured natural landscapes -- from the Sierras to our iconic coastlines. We have an abundance of biodiversity, and with our public lands comes the responsibility to protect them.

**[In honor of Earth Day, I hope you will add your name to this petition reaffirming your commitment to sustainability and protecting our state’s biodiversity.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62171106/402545760/-2067754854?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODBiNTg1YmQtM2FlMS1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=-MrN41ZYxQ6JySgPuDfiphGKfXlPvo-BWnhH99pUYbY=&emci=e70eb12c-3ae1-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=80b585bd-3ae1-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=8447100)**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62171107/402545761/-2067754854?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODBiNTg1YmQtM2FlMS1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=-MrN41ZYxQ6JySgPuDfiphGKfXlPvo-BWnhH99pUYbY=&emci=e70eb12c-3ae1-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=80b585bd-3ae1-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=8447100)
Our state’s biodiversity crisis is an issue that doesn’t get nearly enough attention. Native species have declined by 20 percent, and over 600 species are at risk of extinction due in-large part to wildfires and drought -- which are both propelled by climate change.

You may think a single species of bird or fish going extinct is inconsequential, but each loss can have massive ripple effects across entire ecosystems -- and damaged ecosystems hurt humanity's chances of survival.

Last year, I joined a California delegation at the United Nations Biodiversity Conference in Montreal to urge leaders around the world to support an ambitious and global biodiversity framework to protect life on Earth. I've also worked to put our state's biodiversity front and center in the state assembly as chair of the Select Committee on Biodiversity.

I'm also proud to have authored and helped pass the **Safe Roads and Wildlife Protection Act** which requires state agencies to identify wildlife barriers and establish safe crossings when building or improving roads and highways.This will help prevent the increasing deaths of mountain lions and other animals which migrate across our highways. I also authored the **California Desert Protection Act** to stop a water-grab from harming the fragile Mojave Desert.

We're making progress, but there's much more to be done:

**[It’s Earth Day, so please take a moment to reaffirm your commitment to sustainability and protecting our state's biodiversity by signing this petition.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62171108/402545762/-2067754854?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODBiNTg1YmQtM2FlMS1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=-MrN41ZYxQ6JySgPuDfiphGKfXlPvo-BWnhH99pUYbY=&emci=e70eb12c-3ae1-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=80b585bd-3ae1-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=8447100)**

Thank you,

Laura Friedman | ****[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62171109/402545763/62647395?refcode=em-4.22.23-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODBiNTg1YmQtM2FlMS1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=-MrN41ZYxQ6JySgPuDfiphGKfXlPvo-BWnhH99pUYbY=)****

name: The Ohio Democratic Party
subject: We only get one 🌎
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Ohio Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Ohio Democrats will never stop fighting to protect our planet.
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62171160/402545932/-438463598?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYTRiYzkwNy0zYmUxLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Y2PzZ3joJCBaA-Gs1naHAIFtBMk4NiRAqnhX6JvgplY=) | Our state — and country — are already experiencing the devastating effects of climate change every single day, team. But for too long, extremist Republicans have ignored the science and data in favor of their own political agenda.

As working Ohioans, and Americans, bear the brunt of the disastrous fallout from climate change, Big Oil and Gas executives are racking in record profits as MAGA Republicans continue to cash out.

**[Ohioans — and our planet! — deserve better. Will you support Ohio Democrats who are committed to the fight to protect our natural resources and our communities? Add your name to our petition this Earth Day →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62171161/402545933/-1398302427?ms=em23_230422_eday_adv_gq_act___odp_ettx&refcode=em23_230422_eday_adv_gq_act___odp_ettx&source=em23_230422_eday_adv_gq_act___odp_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230422_eday_adv_gq_act___odp_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=vqkw8cX8Ii9g3BkT/tOK83zua3ERmB6FdFpiwbnrhoj0WdSh7bmMoSKhTWjiPObO9BjoxVNuyjlEuhlcsRzp6AJZH+6zExSLS1eGdlvORw27856TztzEeZzIObIvlQrgRXOopwrfdRjZnOFKpHQfWw==&refcode2=3a4bc907-3be1-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYTRiYzkwNy0zYmUxLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Y2PzZ3joJCBaA-Gs1naHAIFtBMk4NiRAqnhX6JvgplY=&emci=e9522c1f-81e0-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=3a4bc907-3be1-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=25291327)** | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62171162/402545934/-1398302427?ms=em23_230422_eday_adv_gq_act___odp_ettx&refcode=em23_230422_eday_adv_gq_act___odp_ettx&source=em23_230422_eday_adv_gq_act___odp_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230422_eday_adv_gq_act___odp_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=vqkw8cX8Ii9g3BkT/tOK83zua3ERmB6FdFpiwbnrhoj0WdSh7bmMoSKhTWjiPObO9BjoxVNuyjlEuhlcsRzp6AJZH+6zExSLS1eGdlvORw27856TztzEeZzIObIvlQrgRXOopwrfdRjZnOFKpHQfWw==&refcode2=3a4bc907-3be1-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYTRiYzkwNy0zYmUxLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Y2PzZ3joJCBaA-Gs1naHAIFtBMk4NiRAqnhX6JvgplY=&emci=e9522c1f-81e0-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=3a4bc907-3be1-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=25291327)
---
The reality is climate change is real, and it's hurting our communities right here in Ohio. **Here's how we're seeing the effects:**
* Floods are becoming more frequent.
* Intense droughts during the summer months are hurting our agricultural industry and damaging our farms.
* And hotter temperatures are increasing the risk of serious health effects like heat stroke for Ohioans.

Team: _There is no planet B._ That's why we're determined to elect and defend leaders who take this crisis seriously and are investing in Ohio's future.

On Earth Day, and every day, we must do our part in the fight to protect our environment for future generations — from demanding action from our current legislators to pass clean energy bills to electing pro-environment Democrats _at every government level._

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: It's now or never: Double your impact for Earth Day
body:
| | | | | [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e_s17_main_cobrandedemail_c3)
---|---|---

| | We have good news and bad news. First, the bad news: We’re hurtling toward climate disaster, and corporations are taking every opportunity to dismantle hard-fought environmental protections, destroy our public lands and waters, and accelerate mass extinction... just so they can profit at our expense. The good news: We can fight this together, and what better time to do so than now, for Earth Day? Friends of the Earth has been working overtime to fight for people and our planet -- before it’s too late. But we can’t do it without you. To keep up the fight, we urgently need to raise $180,000 **by midnight tonight.** That’s why we need YOU to donate as generously as you can today. Can you help us meet our goal? **Please, Friend, make a special Earth Day donation of $27 or more by midnight tonight. Donate now and your gift will be matched dollar-for-dollar, doubling your impact!** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [$27 donation + $27 match = $54 impact](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1736145?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
| | [$50 donation + $50 match = $100 impact](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1736146?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
| | [$100 donation + $100 match = $200 impact](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1736147?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
| | [Double another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1736148?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
The facts are sobering. This past year has been one of the worst ever for scores of species -- including wild bees and gray wolves -- as well as for climate change.
The Intergovernmental Panel on Climate Change just gave the world its strongest warning that there is absolutely no time left to delay action on climate change. If we don’t act now, more areas of the planet will become unlivable. Extreme weather events will become more common. And the degradation of our ice caps and forests could tip us into increasing rates of global warming.
In short, **we don’t have much time left before complete ecological disaster.**
That’s why we’ve ramped up our efforts this year. **We’re not only running our typical campaigns** \-- including shifting our food and energy systems, protecting our oceans and forests, and more -- **but we’re also rapidly responding to new daily threats as they arise.**
Over the course of our history as an organization, we’ve seen and accomplished a lot together. And more than ever, we need your support -- as does our planet.
**Friend, please donate $27 or more to Friends of the Earth by MIDNIGHT TONIGHT. **
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
| | [$27 donation + $27 match = $54 impact](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1736145?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
| | [$50 donation + $50 match = $100 impact](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1736146?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
| | [$100 donation + $100 match = $200 impact](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1736147?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
| | [Double another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1736148?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**With your support, we pick strategic targets and run winning campaigns.** We use all the tools in our toolbox, from _hard-hitting research_ that exposes corruption and blocks dangerous policies, to _corporate campaigning_ that disrupts polluters’ actions and holds them accountable.
And we’re not just focused on immediate needs or reacting to the bad news of the day. We’re organizing to build long-term political power, for a healthy, just, sustainable world. **We’re changing the systems at the root cause of environmental harm, not just addressing the symptoms.**
This transformative leadership is thanks to you. With your support, we’ve been able to boldly push for urgent change. For decades, we’ve been a fearless, tenacious watchdog for people and our planet, and our expertise is perfect for this moment. **But now we’re counting on your membership support so we can continue this important work, Friend.**
Right now, a generous group of donors will match your gift dollar-for-dollar up to $180,000, doubling your impact!
**Please give as generously as you can. Rush a donation to Friends of the Earth today.**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
| | [$27 donation + $27 match = $54 impact](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1736145?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
| | [$50 donation + $50 match = $100 impact](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1736146?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---

---

---
**Regards,
Erich Pica,
President,
Friends of the Earth **

name: Senator Heidi Campbell
subject: [WATCH] My abortion access session comments
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Campbell for Mayor
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230422_em_fr_b1_HC_initial [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230422_em_fr_b1_HC_initial]
Peter,
The controlling party in our state opposes reproductive healthcare even in cases of rape or incest despite the fact that Tennesseans overwhelmingly believe that government should stay out of our personal healthcare decisions
This is wrong and yet another example of state leadership taking away our fundamental rights, Peter.
Here’s what I had to say about it:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230422_em_fr_b1_HC_initial [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230422_em_fr_b1_HC_initial]
Peter, I'm running to protect Nashvillians from people who want to strip away our healthcare access. Can you chip in any amount to elect a pro-choice champion as Nashville’s Mayor today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230422_em_fr_b1_HC_initial]
ELECT A PRO-CHOICE CHAMPION [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230422_em_fr_b1_HC_initial]
As Nashvillians, we need to stand together to defend access to reproductive rights.
The GOP supermajority in our state legislature has consistently aligned its goals with an extremist agenda focused on taking away our freedoms and having the government control our healthcare decisions.
It’s time we let them know that everyone deserves access to reproductive healthcare and the ability to make decisions about their own bodies without government interference.
Nashville deserves a pro-choice champion to represent us and fight against bigoted statewide leadership. Peter, will you help elect a pro-choice advocate with a contribution today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230422_em_fr_b1_HC_initial]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230422_em_fr_b1_HC_initial]
With gratitude,
Heidi
Heidi Campbell is a Nashville native, Mom, former music industry executive and the first female mayor of the city of Oak Hill.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230422_em_fr_b1_HC_initial [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230422_em_fr_b1_HC_initial]
As mayor, Heidi established a track record for fiscal discipline, balancing the budget every year of her Mayorship, eliminating my own salary, and returning $2M to my city’s reserves.
Heidi was elected in November of 2020 to represent District 20 in the Tennessee State Senate. Since then, she’s been an outspoken advocate for science, the LGBTQ community, public education, local control, women's and kids' issues, Medicaid expansion, and the environment.
Heidi sponsored or co-sponsored over 100 pieces of legislation in her first year in the senate, including legislation to allow cities to offer paid family leave, increase funding for school counselors and reading interventionists, and make it easier to cast a vote.
Heidi is focused on sustainable infrastructure, economic development and job creation, fully funding our public schools and supporting educators, expanding access to affordable healthcare, investing in suicide prevention, making certain that vulnerable children in state custody are not falling through the cracks, and ensuring that every Tennessean - regardless of ethnicity, gender, sexual orientation, age or ability - can achieve the American Dream.
Election Day is Thursday, August 3, 2023.
Prefer to donate via mail? Address a check to:
Campbell for Mayor
P.O. Box 330302
Nashville, Tennessee 37203
SUPPORT HEIDI [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230422_em_fr_b1_HC_initial]
Paid for by Campbell for Mayor
Chip Forrester, Treasurer
Paid for by Campbell for Mayor, Chip Forrester, Treasurer
Campbell for Mayor
PO Box 330302
Nashville, TN 37203
United States

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Ohio’s Sen. Sherrod Brown's one of the most progressive Senators in the country, while his state's gone from purple to light red. Brown, however, always a man of principle, hasn't changed. The jackal who just entered the race to challenge him will spend tens of millions of dollars smearing him, and Sen. Brown needs our help.
body:
We can’t lose this Ohio Senate seat
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T235fd26a-1d58-4a97-9e73-6725498bf74c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **_Not Again. We Can't Let Them Do This Again._** _**Sen. Sherrod Brown's a unicorn. One of the most progressive Senators in the country, while his state's gone from purple to light red. **__Senator Brown, however, always a man of principle, hasn't changed._ _In 2022, private polling had Tim Ryan basically tied with the ghastly J.D. Vance. Then billionaire Trumper Peter Thiel (Vance worked for Thiel) joined McConnell in dumping $50 MILLION dollars in the race, and we lost by 5-6%. _ **_Brown has advantages Ryan lacked, incumbency and statewide name recognition. Yet, they're trying again._** _From Brown's recent email:_ [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8ea8aa1a-c2fa-4bd9-bede-cf11c17eb9c8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _The jackal who just entered the race, Bernie Moreno, will spend tens of millions smearing Brown. We can't let him do it unanswered._ **_In fact, Moreno endorsed Trump for President--AFTER he was indicted, and Trump already offered Moreno support_**. **_Moreno will ban abortion, put AR-15s in teenagers' hands, attack our elections and deregulate trains even after that toxic crash caused a public health crisis in the Ohio region. He's JD Vance in a Bernie Moreno mask._** **_Folks, if we lose Sherrod Brown, we won't get another like him from Ohio. We're sick & tired of the Kyrsten Sinema's. Brown's been her polar opposite, never forgetting he represents us. Losing him would be a tragedy._** [**_If we dig harder this time, we can combat their tens of millions, get Brown the resources he needs. Will you join us RIGHT NOW, by giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to Sherrod Brown?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3a46751c-afe1-42f3-9120-01ee2345b72b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Thank you for keeping Moreno far away from Washington._ Cliff
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
|
---

| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5c0a7a10-abd0-4915-9ead-e59a2d56b754/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: 4 hours left and we are running short for Earth Day
body:
| | | | | [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e_s17_main_cobrandedemail_c3)
---|---|---

| | Friend, we have a problem and need your help to solve it: We thought donations would skyrocket when we announced our Earth Day giving opportunity given the dire state of our planet -- but we're falling short of our goal, and we're running out of time to protect our endangered species, the lands they rely on, and our only Earth before the clock strikes midnight. **There are only 73 Southern Resident orcas left in the world, 40% of our insect pollinators are on the brink of extinction, wolf pups are being dynamited in their dens \-- and they don't have much time. That's why a generous group of donors has agreed to match every gift, dollar for dollar, up to $180,000 -- but only until midnight TONIGHT. [Please, will you make your $27 gift right now while our Earth Day match opportunity is still available? We're a grassroots organization -- and we can't prepare for the hard fights ahead without you, Friend.](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1736198?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) ** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [$27 donation + $27 match = $54 impact](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1736199?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
| | [$50 donation + $50 match = $100 impact](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1736200?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
| | [$100 donation + $100 match = $200 impact](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1736201?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
| | [Double another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1736202?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
We hate having to ask, but remember what could be lost if we fall short -- it's the reason we set such an ambitious Earth Day goal. Already, Southern Resident orcas are struggling to survive -- **grieving, starving, and at greater risk every day.** Disastrous megaprojects are being planned in the lands where endangered species roam, **risking their very survival.** And wild pollinators are **disappearing rapidly,** with bee-toxic neonics being a key culprit -- and all this for the sake of private profit.
Friends of the Earth exists to STOP those outcomes before they happen, prevent existing dangers from getting any worse, and protect our planet -- and we're part of the world's largest grassroots environmental network because of it. But we can't continue our work unless you make your membership gift of $27 or more to help us raise what it takes to win -- because we're still falling dangerously short of our Earth Day goal, and there are only 14 hours left before it's over.
**Please, with time running out and everything on the line, we're counting on you to help us reach our goal before the clock strikes midnight. **
[**Our Earth has never needed a friend like you or us more: Please, before midnight tonight, give every dollar you can in honor of Earth Day while you can make double the impact to help Friends of the Earth continue fighting.**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1736203?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
[DONATE](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1736204?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Regards,
Erich Pica
President,
Friends of the Earth **
|
##### Contact Us:
Friends of the Earth U.S. Washington, D.C. | Berkeley, CA 1-877-843-8687 [Contact us](http://foe.org/about-us/contact/)
---
##### Email Preferences:
[Click here to unsubscribe](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/subscribe?campaignpageurl=https%3A%2F%2Faction.foe.org%2Fpage%2F2555%2Fsubscriptions%2F1%3Fea.broadcast.id%3D233182&ea.campaigner.email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC)
##### Learn more:
[www.foe.org/news](http://www.foe.org/news) [www.foe.org/about-us](http://www.foe.org/about-us) [www.foeaction.org](http://www.foeaction.org)
---
##### Connect:
[](https://www.facebook.com/foe.us?fref=ts) [](https://twitter.com/foe_us) [](https://www.flickr.com/photos/foeaction/)

name: BORDER WATCH
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida
body:
| | | Peter,
---
Last month, **1000 illegal migrants** rushed the El Paso border at once to storm through border patrol and break into our country.

_And what did Homeland Security Secretary Mayorkas do?__**Absolutely nothing.**_
It’s time for Secretary Mayorkas to resign and give the job to someone who _actually_ cares about securing our Southern border.

| | Dear Reader,
Are you sick and tired of trying to search through so many different news sites to figure out what is going on in the world? Spending too much time trying to figure out what is **ACTUALLY** important? Not sure if you can trust what you are reading? Today is your day to sign up for a **FREE** newsletter called _[The Flyover](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=aa16b54363ac440e90dc2e677a11b5fa&_e=4JEz7a_2NGidhrwlWFro4J3_jbGfFa_slTRUtk9pWmVdnEla56oFumo5BIp4eUns7dZpkty3btFtZkzIdysz8u7IXHS3Gx_iQqgyfrwAWX-Cvh4pqP55-Op1zRdiS7X-BMJ-47tjPAu3R774S5SnkH8SBo4yhIXLVTlBP04i5b_cD16Twt8pDCkmpHGP0PwWqhCnxHqnXXYOxBaA5OqsJg%3D%3D)_ where our talented team of editors will do all that work for you. Get informed on politics, business, world affairs, science, technology and many other topics with a single email directly to your inbox. **_[Click here to sign up now for FREE!](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=aa16b54363ac440e90dc2e677a11b5fa&_e=4JEz7a_2NGidhrwlWFro4J3_jbGfFa_slTRUtk9pWmVdnEla56oFumo5BIp4eUnsao0DdoLh9iIVEJUI1n7n1g6Z8XBXAKuy3a2WZniRExICNHh_4KDpbfDu0qRqvoAb5Q2HL2Xly4Ws-VqnN8sC021ttd2Zmp8AgBb_Xs2VUTsNYGFJjLAZNDfgt-O3_WD3WziXGYTWm0_SBjh7nF9aOA%3D%3D)_**
Finding quality news online is like sifting an avalanche. We dig through hundreds of sources and pull out the most important news of the day, so you don't have to. One email does truly have every relevant story. Friends – it’s Greg.

Last night, we found out that the _Supreme Court ruled to preserve full access to mifepristone, a safe and effective medication abortion pill_ , after a Trump-appointed federal judge tried to ban it.

This is an incredible victory for abortion access and the fight for reproductive freedom across America.

However, while last night’s Supreme Court ruling is a victory, let’s set the record straight: **The fight to defend reproductive rights is far from over.**

**Politicians and judges have no place in our medical decisions** – and the fate of bodily autonomy for women across the country should not fall to an ideologically-driven Court.

**That’s why it’s critical that we begin to build up the resources we need to take back the House Majority and codify _Roe_ , once and for all.**

[**With the extreme Republican national abortion ban still looming, I have to ask: Will you donate today to help pro-choice Democrats, like me, reclaim the Majority in 2024 and codify the right to choose for women across the country?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62179139/402558046/1921099384?refcode=em_fr_2023.04.22_b1_gl_all&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOWFhZGJhNS00OWUxLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=URDiRNedZ20dzuP913glJD6Ni_3iRlCiFC7UCkop5pA=)

clean_body: | = Friends – it’s Greg. Last night, we found out that the Supreme Court ruled to preserve full access to mifepristone, a safe and effective medication abortion pill , after a Trump-appointed federal judge tried to ban it. This is an incredible victory for abortion access and the fight for reproductive freedom across America. However, while last night’s Supreme Court ruling is a victory, let’s set the record straight: The fight to defend reproductive rights is far from over. Politicians and judges have no place in our medical decisions – and the fate of bodily autonomy for women across the country should not fall to an ideologically-driven Court. That’s why it’s critical that we begin to build up the resources we need to take back the House Majority and codify Roe , once and for all. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = = = = Appreciate you, Greg | | Paid for by Landsman for Congress P.O. body:
The Court just halted the ban on mifepristone, pending further appeals. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62179213/402558269/-2095412496?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_GEN_RES_NO_20230422_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTU1YzZjZTAtNGFlMS1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=FmnIheMYUCVqHNH6LENVSNxl5JCdIka1mZJ0s3lZ3r4=)

Breaking news, Peter: Moments ago, the Supreme Court ruled that the abortion pill mifepristone would remain widely available as the lawsuit works its way through the appeals court. This is a win, but let’s be clear: this is a **temporary** win. Mifepristone remains accessible *_for now*._ As we’ve seen over the past year, ever since Roe v. Wade was overturned, anti-choice extremists have been laser-focused on banning abortion nationwide. The conservatives won’t rest, so neither will we. We’re celebrating this win but keeping a close eye on all the attacks coming down the pipeline. [_**Can you chip in $3 right now to help us defend abortion rights nationwide? We’re not out of the woods yet, and we need to be ready.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62179214/402558270/-253429511?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_GEN_RES_NO_20230422_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTU1YzZjZTAtNGFlMS1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=FmnIheMYUCVqHNH6LENVSNxl5JCdIka1mZJ0s3lZ3r4=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $3 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62179215/402558271/-253429511?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=AU_HTP_FR_GEN_RES_NO_20230422_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTU1YzZjZTAtNGFlMS1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=FmnIheMYUCVqHNH6LENVSNxl5JCdIka1mZJ0s3lZ3r4=)

name: SURVEY (via Wexton for Congress)
subject: Your thoughts on this Earth Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wexton for Congress
body:
Jennifer remains committed to fighting for policies that will help preserve our planet and natural resources for future generations, and your voice matters to her.

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62179291/402558565/-772585877?refcode=EM_SURV_230422EarthDay_N_SV_6_NG_N_Logo&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YjI4N2RiZS00YmUxLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nnLkGz6CeqXJZC0xVWkxT6nhnuED_ZngyuHTFeToX8M=)
---
Today, on the 53rd anniversary of Earth Day, we find ourselves at a defining moment in the fight against climate change. We've continued to experience record temperatures and seen an increase in storms and destructive natural events. The scientific community has warned us that time is quickly running out to reverse the long-term effects of climate change.

[**Jennifer remains committed to fighting for policies that will help preserve our planet and natural resources for future generations, and your voice matters to her. When she was in the State Senate, she sponsored legislation that would expand consumers’ access to community solar energy, mandate quicker reporting on hazardous spills in Virginia waterways, and broaden the powers of the Department of Environmental Quality to go after polluters.

Jennifer's brought these principles to the U.S. House. clean_body: Jennifer remains committed to fighting for policies that will help preserve our planet and natural resources for future generations, and your voice matters to her. = Today, on the 53rd anniversary of Earth Day, we find ourselves at a defining moment in the fight against climate change. We've continued to experience record temperatures and seen an increase in storms and destructive natural events. The scientific community has warned us that time is quickly running out to reverse the long-term effects of climate change. Jennifer has always advocated for renewable energy and responsible environmental stewardship. When she was in the State Senate, she sponsored legislation that would expand consumers’ access to community solar energy, mandate quicker reporting on hazardous spills in Virginia waterways, and broaden the powers of the Department of Environmental Quality to go after polluters. Jennifer's brought these principles to the U.S. House. She fought hard against the climate denialism that came out of the Trump administration, and helped President Biden and Congressional Democrats pass a historic investment in climate protection, renewable energy, and electric vehicles last year. But she knows there's a lot more to be done, especially as far-right interests are working around the clock to weaponize the courts against environmental progress and pass anti-climate policies in state legislatures. body:
* * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * *

**“Biden campaign, Blinken orchestrated intel letter to discredit Hunter Biden laptop story, ex-CIA official says”**
[SOURCE: _FOX NEWS_]
Friend,
Former CIA Deputy Director Michael Morrell testified under oath that the Biden campaign asked him to lead the effort to cover up the Hunter Biden Laptop from Hell.
_Morrell organized 50 other former intelligence agents and spies to sign a letter FALSELY claiming that the Hunter Biden laptop was “Russian disinformation.”_
They knew it was a lie. But they didn’t care.
Morrell said he wanted to _**“help Vice President Biden... because [he] wanted him to win the election.”**_
Friend, these are the kinds of dirty tactics we’re going up against in the 2024 election. They will say and do ANYTHING and abandon any sense of honor to try and stop us.
**In fact, we’ve already gotten a preview of what’s to come...**
_**I’ve been arrested. I’ve been threatened with a possible 136 YEARS in prison. My own home has been raided.**_
_...And we’re still not even in 2024 yet._

clean_body: | | | “Biden campaign, Blinken orchestrated intel letter to discredit Hunter Biden laptop story, ex-CIA official says” [SOURCE: FOX NEWS] Friend, Former CIA Deputy Director Michael Morrell testified under oath that the Biden campaign asked him to lead the effort to cover up the Hunter Biden Laptop from Hell. Morrell organized 50 other former intelligence agents and spies to sign a letter FALSELY claiming that the Hunter Biden laptop was “Russian disinformation.” They knew it was a lie. But they didn’t care. Morrell said he wanted to “help Vice President Biden... because [he] wanted him to win the election.” Friend, these are the kinds of dirty tactics we’re going up against in the 2024 election. They will say and do ANYTHING and abandon any sense of honor to try and stop us. In fact, we’ve already gotten a preview of what’s to come... I’ve been arrested. I’ve been threatened with a possible 136 YEARS in prison. My own home has been raided. ...And we’re still not even in 2024 yet. The Left doesn’t want YOU to have a voice in your own country, so they’re going to resort to the most despicable tactics straight out of the Soviet playbook to try and beat us. But we cannot let them win. Because this isn’t just an election. 2024 will decide whether America is still a Free Republic where YOUR vote decides YOUR future. | Thank you, | Donald J.
