subject: that didn’t take long
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brittany Pettersen for Colorado
body:
The same day I announced that I was running again in a rematch against Lauren Boebert, the smear campaign from her national Republican allies began.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62179786/402560712/-4707655?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDIyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZDNjODZiMy01MGUxLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZAVZ54ugHfC83pVGKTFDmsrn08sE1pLfhLMTLjLx_-E=&emci=521a4462-9bdf-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=8d3c86b3-50e1-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=19954364) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62179787/402560713/-562022761?refcode=email_042223_frisch-pettersen-split&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDIyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZDNjODZiMy01MGUxLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZAVZ54ugHfC83pVGKTFDmsrn08sE1pLfhLMTLjLx_-E=) Hello, Well, it didn’t take long. **The same day I announced that I was running again in a rematch against Lauren Boebert, the smear campaign from her national Republican allies began.** It’s no mystery why: Last year, I lost to Boebert by only 546 votes. It was the closest race in the entire country. And unless they lie about me and smear my name on every TV across the district, they know we’re going to win in 2024. Here’s the thing, though. I’m not running to represent myself like Boebert. I’m not going to be a part of the circus in Washington. I’m running because the people of Western and Southern Colorado deserve someone in Congress who will wake up every day ready to work for them and their families – not corporate PAC donors. I’m ready to put forward a positive vision for our district and our country, but I need your help to make sure we don’t get drowned out by Boebert’s lies. **We’ve set a goal of getting 50,000 Founding Donors to our campaign so we have the resources we need to win, but right now we’re still short. I’m not taking money from corporate PACs, so I’m counting on you to chip in now:** **[Please, if you’re able to, will you give $20 or more right now – any amount you can afford – to help us hit our goal and defeat Lauren Boebert?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62179788/402560714/-665207148?refcode=email_042223_frisch-pettersen-split&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDIyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZDNjODZiMy01MGUxLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZAVZ54ugHfC83pVGKTFDmsrn08sE1pLfhLMTLjLx_-E=)** _Your donation will be split evenly between Adam Frisch's campaign for CO-03 and Brittany Pettersen's campaign for CO-07. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | | [Donate $10 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62179789/402560715/-665207148?refcode=email_042223_frisch-pettersen-split&express_lane=true&amounts=10,25,50,100,250&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDIyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZDNjODZiMy01MGUxLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZAVZ54ugHfC83pVGKTFDmsrn08sE1pLfhLMTLjLx_-E=)

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Please. Don’t let orphaned bear cubs starve to death. (2X match live now)
body:
| | | | [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e_s17_main_cobrandedemail_c3)
---
| | | Friend,

After giving birth during the winter months, and staying close to their fragile cubs, mama bears emerge from their dens lethargic and underfed. They summon their last energy reserves to search for food for their cubs and start the slow process of rebuilding their own strength. ** But now while they’re at their weakest, mama bears in the Northern Rockies could be caught in the crosshairs of brutal trophy hunters. **
---
**That’s why we urgently need your help to save them before it’s too late.** **[_Please, make a membership gift now – before Earth Day ends – to help Friends of the Earth fight back to protect vulnerable species and the vital ecosystems they need to thrive. Every dollar will be DOUBLED up to our $180,000 Earth Day goal so your impact can go twice as far for our planet and its inhabitants. But hurry, this is only available until midnight tonight._](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1736395?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [$27 donation + $27 match = $54 impact](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1736396?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
| | [$50 donation + $50 match = $100 impact](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1736397?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
| | [$100 donation + $100 match = $200 impact](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1736398?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
| | [Double another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1736395?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
It’s bad enough that bloodthirsty trophy hunters want to MURDER struggling mama bears for fun, but their cruelty means extreme danger for the next generation of cubs. **Bear cubs rely on their mothers for at least two full years. If these mama bears are killed, their babies will be ORPHANED, left to starve, freeze or be easy prey for other predators ****– and the future of this iconic species will be lost.**
Grizzly bears and their vital habitats are in a dire situation. By 1975, reckless human activity, like hunting and trapping, and habitat loss already decimated bear populations to as little as 1,000 individuals in the lower 48 states. **Now, they occupy just 2% of their original range! **
Despite these worryingly low numbers, the pro-hunting lobby and their anti-environment allies are working overtime to strip these endangered animals of essential legal protections. The Endangered Species Act provides critical protection for America’s iconic animal species. These protections are some of our most effective safeguards in the fight to protect our public lands and curb catastrophic climate change.

Without these protections in place, trophy hunters can brutally kill bears without consequence – **and destructive industries like Big Oil, logging and factory farming can swoop in and wreak havoc on endangered species’ habitats**** in some of the last pristine wilderness we have left. **
[](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1736395?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
| | [MATCH MY GIFT](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1736395?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
The fact is that bears are intelligent creatures, friend, and they hold a critical place in our ecosystems. They enhance biodiversity, enrich soils, regulate prey populations and transport nutrients through vast swaths of wilderness. And now, by simply existing, **they’re standing between us and massive corporate pollution that could imperil the future of our planet.** **We must protect our bears for all our sakes, but there’s not a minute to lose. **
**Please, join the fight for our precious bears before they’re hunted down for sport and profit. ** **[_Make your membership gift of $27 or more – while your impact can go TWICE AS FAR – so we can hit our $180,000 goal in service of Earth Day to protect our planet and all of its inhabitants._](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1736399?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)**
Standing with you,

Nicole Ghio
Senior Fossil Fuels Program Manager
Friends of the Earth
|
##### Contact Us:
Friends of the Earth U.S. Washington, D.C. | Berkeley, CA 1-877-843-8687 [Contact us](https://foe.org/about-us/contact/)

clean_body: | | | | | | | Friend, After giving birth during the winter months, and staying close to their fragile cubs, mama bears emerge from their dens lethargic and underfed. They summon their last energy reserves to search for food for their cubs and start the slow process of rebuilding their own strength. But now while they’re at their weakest, mama bears in the Northern Rockies could be caught in the crosshairs of brutal trophy hunters. That’s why we urgently need your help to save them before it’s too late. == If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | == | | == | | == | | == It’s bad enough that bloodthirsty trophy hunters want to MURDER struggling mama bears for fun, but their cruelty means extreme danger for the next generation of cubs. Bear cubs rely on their mothers for at least two full years. If these mama bears are killed, their babies will be ORPHANED, left to starve, freeze or be easy prey for other predators – and the future of this iconic species will be lost. Grizzly bears and their vital habitats are in a dire situation. By 1975, reckless human activity, like hunting and trapping, and habitat loss already decimated bear populations to as little as 1,000 individuals in the lower 48 states. Now, they occupy just 2% of their original range! Despite these worryingly low numbers, the pro-hunting lobby and their anti-environment allies are working overtime to strip these endangered animals of essential legal protections. The Endangered Species Act provides critical protection for America’s iconic animal species. These protections are some of our most effective safeguards in the fight to protect our public lands and curb catastrophic climate change. Without these protections in place, trophy hunters can brutally kill bears without consequence – and destructive industries like Big Oil, logging and factory farming can swoop in and wreak havoc on endangered species’ habitats in some of the last pristine wilderness we have left. == | | == The fact is that bears are intelligent creatures, friend, and they hold a critical place in our ecosystems. They enhance biodiversity, enrich soils, regulate prey populations and transport nutrients through vast swaths of wilderness. And now, by simply existing, they’re standing between us and massive corporate pollution that could imperil the future of our planet. We must protect our bears for all our sakes, but there’s not a minute to lose. Please, join the fight for our precious bears before they’re hunted down for sport and profit. == Standing with you, Nicole Ghio Senior Fossil Fuels Program Manager Friends of the Earth | Contact Us: Friends of the Earth U.S. Washington, D.C. | Berkeley, CA 1-877-843-8687

subject: Legislative Update for Week Ending April 22, 2023
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY]( "PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY")
body:
A momentum of historical legislative accomplishments! | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/80a8061d232f/n41kepo7ku-475731?e=25844e23a8)
---
| | [ ](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=260201a6eb&e=25844e23a8)
---
| | Peter,
---
|
* Legislative Update for Week Ending April 21st
* Transparency Improved
* Agriculture; The Ethanol Debate
* Law and Order
* Biological Men in Women’s Sports
* “Other” Business
* Status Update on NEGOP Priority Legislation

---
|
---
|
## Legislative Update for Week Ending April 21st
---
| Senators, the 2nd House (YOU), and the NEGOP fought for the Constitution this week at the Unicameral and WON! Constitutional Carry Passed! Senator Brewer has been engaging in diplomacy for this bill his entire tenure. His work became reality in 2023 after 7 years of legislative service. Well Done! Every patriotic American understands that if a government is willing to take away your Constitutional right to bear arms, the next right that will be taken is speech, peaceable assembly (they already tried that), religion, and on and on. Nebraska becomes the 26th state to WIN Constitutional Carry. A win for one Constitutional right is a win for all rights! We thank the 2nd Amendment supporters for coming to state headquarters each step of the way to lead the charge for Constitutional victory.

On a separate observation from watching hours of debate, the NEGOP encourages you to counter the word "Democracy" every chance you get. We are a Constitutional Republic. Democracy creates mob rule. History teaches us mob rule is very dangerous to a free people. These forms of government always collapse (usually in a violent and chaotic way). A Republic protects the rights of individuals from majority rule. When inalienable rights are observed by the government (regardless of majority opinion), we settle differences on the issues “inside the walls of the Constitution” with a Democratic vote. Don’t buy into the “Democracy” narrative.

Let’s get to the rest of the week...
---
|
## Transparency Improved
---
| In addition to Constitutional Carry, Senator Brewer’s LB 253 passed General File! This bill aligns with the NEGOP’s Legislative plan that called for recordings of legislative proceedings. The NEGOP has been promoting bills that will give Nebraskans more visibility into the legislative body. The bill was amended from its original version, but we believe the bill is a big step in the right direction. At the end of the day, the archive needs to exist for citizens to refer to what was put on the record. The 2nd House deserves to AND SHOULD be able to refer and cite the items on the record in legislative proceedings.
---
|
---
|
## Agriculture; The Ethanol Debate
---
| Senator Myron Dorn’s LB 562 bill came to the floor. LB 562 is designed to bring higher blends of corn-based fuel to the market. The bill would require all gas stations that replace 80% of their gas pumps or more, to now install pumps (at least 50%) to carry 15% ethanol blends. Ethanol is an economic driver for corn and cattle feed markets in Nebraska. Debate is ongoing...stay tuned.
---
|
---
|
## Law and Order
---
| The state settled with the Nebraska State Troopers for $19 million on a pension issue that stems back from 2011. It was time to move forward and return the focus on public safety. Nebraskans need the focus on law and order as well as recruitment for long term safety and security. In addition to supporting our State Patrol, the NEGOP would like to see more issues resolved with our National Guard personnel (primarily caused by President Biden’s mandates). Their service is appreciated and necessary to this state and country in a time of need. The disruption to the Guard staff was uncalled for, unnecessary, and out of line. Nebraskans would like to see this force restored (still hampered by the Feds) for the benefit of our citizens should the Guard need to be called upon.
---
|
---
|
## Biological Men in Women’s Sports
---
| The US House approved a bill to ban biological men from playing in women’s sports. The bill may not pass the Senate, but will clearly fail with a veto by the President. LB 575, Nebraska’s version of this bill, remains at the committee level. The NEGOP fully supports this bill for honest competition and the preservation of opportunities (especially sports scholarships) for Nebraska’s women.

Kearney Public Schools passed this measure at the school board to protect Nebraska women. The US House of Representatives passed the bill. We can and should do the same at the Unicameral. Time and effort on this issue will chew up hours of debate at the local level if it remains unaddressed by the Nebraska legislature.
---
|
---
|
## “Other” Business
---
| We want Nebraska to know that there are many important bills that need to be passed that have little to no public fanfare. As we discussed last week, many bills were being combined into bigger bills to tackle multiple issues. This week a business and labor bill package was passed. There were 8 bills combined into one in this action. Unicameral Update put together a nice description of this package.
---
| [Read here for more...](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=1428b22c15&e=25844e23a8 "Read here for more...")
---
| If you thought 8 bills combined into one was amazing, the banking and commerce committee had elements of 18 bills compiled into one bill! Health and Human Services combined elements of 16 bills to advance legislation forward! This “Bundling” is caused by the disaster of the Democrats and the filibuster. The NEGOP fully SUPPORTS Senator Erdman in changing the rules sooner rather than later so we can end the “Amendment Happy Hour”. To learn more about the 18 bills in banking and commerce and the 16 bills in HHS being bundled, you can read the Unicameral Update summary on the Nebraska Legislature home page. Thanks to Unicameral Update for writing comprehensive stories and bill citations out for the benefit of the public.
---
| [Read here for more...](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=8e20eb00c0&e=25844e23a8 "Read here for more...")
---
| In the end, the writing is on the wall. Many bills are being combined to get work done and avoid the Filibuster Party attempts at slowing the common sense agenda of 90% of Nebraska. However, we have one bill that is a constitutional mandate in the Photo Voter ID requirement. 65.45% of Nebraskans voted specifically for... __"Shall the Nebraska Constitution be amended to require that, before casting a ballot in any election, a qualified voter shall present valid photographic identification in a manner specified by the Legislature."__ The process begs the question...why can’t an election security package be put together when it is clear numerous bills are being combined in one bill? We need a stronger and specific election infrastructure.
---
|
---
|
## Status Update on NEGOP Priority Legislation
---
| The NEGOP has been busy executing the broad based legislative plan we wrote and passed last August. Many citizens have been frustrated that we have drifted from being Social Media warriors (old way) to focus on all the planning and hard work that needed to be done. Winning elections with the right candidates and advancing our values via laws have been the primary focus of the last 9 months. As the Political Director, my priority with the team has never waivered.

The Legislative plan was confirmed in August by the State Central Committee. The direction was clear...get something done on our core issues. Republicans were tired of another year with no accomplishments on pro-life, no tax lowering or reductions, and the erosion of Constitutional rights (whether that be from COVID, or Constitutional Carry, or others). The Republican citizens of Nebraska were ready for a plan to win.

The first step was establishing what we, as Republicans, stand for. Too many Nebraska values have been lost because many have lost the true understanding of rights and conservative principles. Last year, it was overwhelmingly evident that Republicans do not support suppressing voices and infringement of the duly elected delegates to vote at our own convention. We needed a recommitment to Constitutional principles and an idea of allowing all Republicans to be heard and included in the affairs of their state and party. Second, we needed to prove we will listen to all the voices in the party and give credence to new ideas outside of the status quo. So, we listened to all those voices before we developed the action plan. Thirdly, we needed to promote candidates that can win on all the issues from A to Z (not one or the other). We need to elect Constitutional and Platform Republicans. The fourth part of the plan was to set out legislative goals. Those goals were adopted in August and can still be found on the recently improved website for your review (Check it out...nice work Administrative Team!). It was imperative that the elected leaders on the Central Committee and Executive Committee had a say in the direction of the party. Our Unicameral Senators saw the benefit of having a network of locally elected party leaders, who respond to the LOCAL citizens. The final piece of the Action Plan was to build, promote, or advocate for legislation that aligned with our approved plan and values.

This brings us to today. Below is a list of Republican bills THAT HAVE ADVANCED PAST THE COMMITTEE stage we support. Full disclosure...we are still processing all the amendments (changes) to bills to see if we still support the legislation. To be clear, the list of laws below were approved by our subcommittees BEFORE NEW AMENDMENTS WERE RECENTLY ADOPTED. The Yellow bills are bills that have been put in the General File for legislative consideration. They are past the committee stage (1st Step). The bills in Blue have advanced to Select File (2nd Step). The bills in Red have advanced to Final Reading (3rd Step). The final step is in Green (Passed Laws). Our areas of emphasis this year, in no particular order were; Public Safety, Constitutional Rights, Economy, Government Reform, Agriculture, and Education.

The Senators, their staff, the NEGOP Office team, and the 2nd House have worked tirelessly to coordinate efforts so that the Citizens of Nebraska can advance the Good Life. The movement has been aided by numerous “Para Conservative Groups” passionate about specific issues to overall good government. A little planning and listening to all Republicans has us on the verge of a HISTORICAL session. Well done Republicans of Nebraska. However, stay the course. We are not at the goal line yet.
---
|
---
| [View the table here...](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=d8b2ddd035&e=25844e23a8 "View the table here...")
---
| Until next week....Keep your head bowed. We still have a lot of work to do. Pray, work, donate, volunteer, and give.

Todd Watson
Political Director
---
| | | | | | | [](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=5b3e38488a&e=25844e23a8)

| Peter,

As we get ready for the heated election cycle, our team is relying on grassroots support to help us build a strong foundation for the road ahead.

[_**If you haven’t already, will you chip in $5 or more today to become a Founding Donor of Kurt’s campaign? We have until tonight to reach our $2,500 fundraising goal, and your grassroots contribution will make a big difference!**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62180098/402562062/215821870?refcode=BLU-KKFC-20230422-1-EM&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU0MDEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjJmMDRhNGQtNTNlMS1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=MsOtbt-_zHgawNp5nkg1bTk9Y1yFF9px8FwNk26BniE=)

Early investments from folks like you will make the biggest difference in a campaign like ours. While David Schweikert’s campaigns have been driven by money from corporations and special interest groups, Kurt isn’t accepting any money from corporate PACs. So, we’re counting on your support to power our success.

clean_body: | | | Team Ruiz hopes that you and your family are safe and healthy. Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, And if you have a moment, please read our message below. Friend, We hate to bother you on a Saturday, but we needed to reach out with an important update. We now officially have an opponent in this race. As expected, National Republicans are running an extreme far-right opponent against me in an effort to flip this seat to Republican hands. Like other Republicans in Congress, she’s more focused on gutting reproductive healthcare protections, banning books, and amplifying fringe ideas than fighting for the working families of our district. And look, that should come as no surprise since she doesn’t even live in the district. So we're asking you to step up right now to show National Republicans that our grassroots team won’t stand for out-of-district candidates and their extreme agenda. | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: Thank you for taking a moment to read this brief message. We can’t thank you enough for your support. Enjoy your weekend! Team Ruiz | | Paid for by Dr. Raul Ruiz For Congress Committee P.O. Box 1566, Indio, CA 92202 Please, consider making a . ---
[](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1736432?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
Everywhere we look, **vital ecosystems are struggling under the burden of massive pollution, and greedy corporations are largely to blame.** But from doubling down on fossil fuel extraction to ramping up production on single-use plastics, these mega-polluters continue to put short-term profits over the health of our planet and its inhabitants. **We can’t stand aside and allow corporate greed to destroy the fragile ecosystems that sustain us.**
As part of the world’s largest grassroots environmental network, Friends of the Earth is fighting back for a just and sustainable world right here and right now. That’s why today only, a group of generous donors will **match every gift – dollar for dollar – up to our $180,000 Earth Day goal and only until midnight tonight**. But we need your help to make the most of this once-in-a-year opportunity,**so we pulled your supporter record, and here’s what we found: **
| | [ ](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1736432?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)

With time running our for our planet, we just can’t afford to miss this goal. Every dollar has a role to play in our fight to stop Big Polluters and to protect our only Earth in our lifetime and for future generations. **But our rare Earth Day match expires at midnight tonight, and we’re still falling short of our goal. That’s why we’re counting on your gift to come through now before it’s too late. **
We plan for every dollar in our fight against greedy corporations, so we can protect our public lands from being stripped and gouged for profit and keep toxic pollution out of our essential waterways. It's the only way to protect vital habitats for threatened species – from our majestic wolves to our hardworking bees – that have crucial roles to play in sustaining the health of our planet.
**Our ecosystems, from our wilderness to our farm fields, depend on the action we take now. The stakes are too high to stand aside, and we can’t keep fighting without you. [So please, don’t waste this opportunity today: Rush your membership contribution of $27 or more now – before our Earth Day match expires at midnight – to DOUBLE YOUR IMPACT in the fight for our only Earth.](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1736433?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)**

As part of the world’s largest grassroots environmental network, Friends of the Earth is fighting back for a just and sustainable world right here and right now. That’s why today only, a group of generous donors will match every gift – dollar for dollar – up to our $180,000 Earth Day goal and only until midnight tonight. But we need your help to make the most of this once-in-a-year opportunity,so we pulled your supporter record, and here’s what we found: | | == EMAIL: dpwillis67@gmail.com MATCH EXPIRING: 11:59 p.m. YOUR EARTH DAY DONATION: NOT YET. == DONORS NEEDED FROM your area: 5 | | == Records reflect most recent available data for dpwillis67@gmail.com . Match expires 11:59 p.m. With time running our for our planet, we just can’t afford to miss this goal. Every dollar has a role to play in our fight to stop Big Polluters and to protect our only Earth in our lifetime and for future generations. But our rare Earth Day match expires at midnight tonight, and we’re still falling short of our goal. That’s why we’re counting on your gift to come through now before it’s too late. We plan for every dollar in our fight against greedy corporations, so we can protect our public lands from being stripped and gouged for profit and keep toxic pollution out of our essential waterways. It's the only way to protect vital habitats for threatened species – from our majestic wolves to our hardworking bees – that have crucial roles to play in sustaining the health of our planet. Our ecosystems, from our wilderness to our farm fields, depend on the action we take now. The stakes are too high to stand aside, and we can’t keep fighting without you. == If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | == | | == | | == | | == Thank you for your urgent support, Erich Pica President Friends of the Earth | Contact Us: Friends of the Earth U.S. Washington, D.C. | Berkeley, CA 1-877-843-8687

Friend:

Americans have been paying into Social Security for _generations, _knowing they could rely on it to support their retirement and help them pay their bills.

**But GOP leaders are scheming to cut funding for Social Security and raise the age for eligibility, leaving millions of Americans in the lurch. **
You read that right, friend. The same party that pushes tax cuts for the megarich ALSO wants to slash everyday Americans' retirement. **Make no mistake:****This is no ordinary budget cut. This is the GOP stealing from those who have paid into the program for _years._**
We can't let this stand – and we won't. **We launched an urgent petition to call on Democrats to PROTECT this vital program from GOP attacks, but we're just hours away from our midnight deadline, and we're still missing your name. Please, will you take a stand for Social Security and sign now?**

name: Patty Acomb
subject: Happy Earth Day!
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hdfl-april23?refcode=042223 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hdfl-april23?refcode=042223]
Hi friend,
Happy Earth Day! I hope you’re able to enjoy spending some time outside today and in the coming weeks as the weather warms and we’re reminded how beautiful Minnesota weather can be. I know you understand how important our planet is, and how important it is that we protect it. I, along with other Minnesota DFLers, am working hard to pass legislation that fights the climate crisis we’re facing and hold large corporations accountable for their part in it. Already, we’ve enacted a nation-leading 100% clean energy standard [https://www.cbsnews.com/minnesota/news/gov-walz-signs-100-percent-by-2040-energy-bill-into-law/] , and there’s lots more to do.
Will you make a contribution today and help us protect our House DFL majority so we can continue protecting our planet? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hdfl-april23?refcode=042223]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
Contribute $15 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hdfl-april23?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=042223]
Contribute $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hdfl-april23?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=042223]

Or, another amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hdfl-april23?express_lane_other=true&refcode=042223]
We appreciate you making your generous gift online to support our efforts to go green and save paper. Thank you for doing your part!
Sincerely,
Patty Acomb
Representative, District 45B
Minnesota House of Representatives

name: Adam Schiff
subject: 🌱Happy Earth Day🌎
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
| I hope you will give me a chance to explain the stakes of the climate fight, what we’ve done, and where we need to go from here.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=2129%2E5257348%2EO4aihz)
Derek, this Earth Day, I hope you will give me a chance to explain the stakes of the climate fight, what we’ve done, and where we need to go from here.
**First, the stakes** — the United Nations’ Intergovernmental Panel on Climate Change issued a report last month that said that if we do not cut our emissions in half this decade, the Earth will warm to catastrophic levels by the 2030s, and we will fail the mission set forth in the 2015 Paris Climate Agreement.
**Now, what we’ve done:** Thanks to Democrats’ _Inflation Reduction Act_ that President Biden signed last summer, the United States has made the single largest investment in clean energy in our history. The investments are projected to cut our carbon emissions by 40 percent relative to 2005 levels. It’s a good start, and also helps make clean energy more affordable for folks like you — like with the $7,500 electric vehicle tax credit.
**But we still must do more.** The United States must be a global leader in the climate fight. Donald Trump and the Republican Party have squandered precious time that we should have spent accelerating our transition to clean energy and ending our destructive reliance on fossil fuels. In 2024, we need to protect the White House, our Senate majority, and retake the House.
**The _Inflation Reduction Act_ is the first step toward passing a Green New Deal, of which I am a proud cosponsor and which was re-introduced this week.**
We must abolish the Senate filibuster. Pass more bold climate legislation. And defeat any MAGA Republican and dark money efforts to stand in our way.
Nothing less than the future of life on Earth is at stake.
**[Derek, this Earth Day, will you join me in supporting the Green New Deal by adding your name today as a citizen cosponsor?](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-20230422-gnd-earth-day.vRd7gP&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC30_20230422_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=2129%2E5257348%2EO4aihz)**
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-20230422-gnd-earth-day.vRd7gP&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC30_20230422_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=5&akid=2129%2E5257348%2EO4aihz)
---
Californians are demanding that our next Senator be a bold leader who will do everything possible to ensure future generations can inherit a livable planet. Thanks for joining me by adding your name today.
— Adam
[](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-20230422-gnd-earth-day.vRd7gP&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC30_20230422_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=6&akid=2129%2E5257348%2EO4aihz)
P.S. This week, I introduced my own piece of legislation cosponsored by Rep. Ocasio-Cortez, _The Climate Change Relief for Urban Areas Act_ , which would open the door to planting more trees in urban areas and cities to combat climate injustices, including urban heat islands and stormwater runoff that adversely impact those communities.
| | [DONATE MONTHLY](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1807?refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC30_20230422_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=7&akid=2129%2E5257348%2EO4aihz)
---
150 E. Olive Ave., Suite 208 Burbank CA, 91502

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: TOXIC pesticides sprayed on your food?
body:
| | | | | [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e_s17_main_cobrandedemail_c3)
---|---|---

| | **Dear Friend, ** | **Act now before we lose vulnerable pollinators forever: Donate $27 before midnight and help us reach our $180,000 Earth Day goal! ** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [$27 donation](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1736457?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[$50 donation](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1736458?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[$100 donation ](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1736459?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1736460?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
An "insect apocalypse."
A "second Silent Spring."
A "catastrophic collapse of nature's ecosystems."
This is how scientists are describing the loss of bees and other insects. **[The time to act is now: Donate $27 or more and help us meet our $180,000 Earth Day goal for pollinators and the planet! When you do, your gift will be matched, dollar for dollar -- but only until midnight TONIGHT.](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1736461?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)**
Neonicotinoid pesticides are a key driver of this crisis. They can impact bees' ability to navigate and reproduce and even kill bees on contact. But they're also the most widely used insecticides in agriculture.
The EPA has a chance to ban neonics once and for all. Instead, it might **_approve these pesticides for another 15 years._** But there's still hope, Friend. Because of supporters like you, we have the chance to make real change -- change that would help protect bees, people, and the planet. Will you join us in this fight?
**Help get bee-killing pesticides out of our food system. Donate $27 immediately and help us reach our $180,000 goal before midnight TONIGHT! **
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[$27 donation](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1736457?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[$50 donation](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1736458?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[$100 donation ](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1736459?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1736460?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Bees play a crucial role in their ecosystems. From fields of blooming wildflowers to rows of veggies on organic farms, these insects and others aid in plant reproduction. Many of these plants support an entire web of life by offering habitat and food for countless other species.
We rely on bees and other pollinators for 75% of the world's food crops, including the most nutritious -- so when we lose bees,**we also lose some of the foods that keep us healthy!** In fact, the decline in bees and other pollinators has already harmed global fruit, vegetable, and nut production. Without access to these vital crops and a healthy diet, people could be at higher risk of _**heart disease, stroke, diabetes, and even cancer, according to a recent study.**_
There's no mystery here. Study after study has found that the massive use of pesticides, like Bayer-Monsanto's bee-toxic neonicotinoids, are key drivers in the decimation of pollinators.
But pollinator-killers like Bayer-Monsanto are sweeping their lethal impact under the rug -- and the United States EPA is giving them a free pass, allowing widespread use of toxic pesticides instead of shifting away from chemicals we KNOW are killing massive numbers of bees.
**Stop the downward spiral of vulnerable pollinator populations. Donate $27 or more to Friends of the Earth today! **
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[$27 donation](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1736457?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[$50 donation](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1736458?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[$100 donation ](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1736459?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1736460?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Bees are a canary in the coal mine, signaling that the toxic way we produce food is on a deadly track. We must act NOW to protect our health and ensure that we are not among the last generations to share the planet with countless species of wild bees.
At Friends of the Earth, we are doing everything we can to help save pollinators, protect our health, and stop the destruction of our planet. We're working to ban toxic pesticides that are driving the decline of bees and butterflies. At the same time, we're pushing major grocery companies like Kroger to stop selling food grown with these chemicals. With your help and membership support today, we can win.
But the bees are running out of time -- **and they need you. **
If we don't stand up to Big Ag now, we could stand to lose _hundreds_ of wild bee species in North America alone. It's up to you to help prevent a world without these vulnerable pollinators. Please, Friend, we need you by our side as we ramp up our efforts to save wild bees from extinction and protect our planet.
**Act now to give pollinators a fighting chance. Rush your $27 donation while it can still be matched, and help us reach our $180,000 Earth Day goal before the clock strikes midnight.**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[$27 donation](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1736457?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[$50 donation](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1736458?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[$100 donation ](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1736459?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1736460?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Standing with you,
Kendra Klein
Deputy director of science,
Friends of the Earth **
|

Friends of the Earth U.S. Washington, D.C. | Berkeley, CA 1-877-843-8687 [Contact us](http://foe.org/about-us/contact/)

subject: Maxwell Frost is what gives the GOP cold sweats in the dark of night: They know from the midterms & WI Supreme Court race they can't beat him--or those like him--in a fair fight.
body:
An answer to Ron DeSantis
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T93b0d6cf-e282-4962-a00b-b3d27f8f6759/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **It's been quite an awful week for awful, sloppy autocrat Ron DeSantis. ** **_While Ft. Lauderdale was under water--due to policies worsened by his willful ignorance on climate change--gas lines in numerous areas of the Sunshine State began to form that looked like something out of the oil crisis in the 1970s._**_ Even right-wing soulmate Marco Rubio is complaining and calling for action._ [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta6ded181-38ea-4a6b-8529-4a98712e9549/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Meanwhile, permitless-carry shootings are also occurring at a frightening pace and DeSantis is ignoring it all because he's a power-craving ghoul who won't leave his book tour to launch a presidential bid._**_ DeSantis did fly back in the dead of night when he hoped nobody was looking, however, to sign a cruel and dangerous abortion ban._** **__On the latter point, we got the perfect contrast to DeSantis. In response to his evil act signing the abortion ban, Florida Congressman, Maxwell Frost, got up and gave both an inspiring and blistering response.__** [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6263e41d-c648-494d-aa1c-d66694a0158a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Frost's only 26, the youngest Congress member. He's the future; part Latino, part Lebanese, part Black, wholly passionate equality and opportunity for all. Frost is what gives the GOP cold sweats in the dark of night: They know from the midterms & WI Supreme Court race they can't beat him--or those like him--in a fair fight._ [**_We need Frost and many more like him to run for public office. To be the face of opposition to greedy, gross DeSantis-ites. For his incredible speech--and for our future--will you give Rep. Maxwell Frost $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T78b67beb-8a7a-47eb-9fd5-082668c88392/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Thank you for ensuring our future is democratic. And Democratic._ Cliff
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
|
---

1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212
513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com

---
| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb76bf76b-1ca2-411c-a933-fb756796715b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Earth Day is coming to an end
body:
| | | | | [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e_s17_main_cobrandedemail_c3)
---|---|---

| | Friend, we have a problem and need your help to solve it: We thought donations would skyrocket when we announced our Earth Day giving opportunity given the dire state of our planet -- but we're falling short of our goal, and we're running out of time to protect our endangered species, the lands they rely on, and our only Earth before the clock strikes midnight. **There are only 73 Southern Resident orcas left in the world, 40% of our insect pollinators are on the brink of extinction, wolf pups are being dynamited in their dens \-- and they don't have much time. That's why a generous group of donors has agreed to match every gift, dollar for dollar, up to $180,000 -- but only until midnight TONIGHT. [Please, will you make your $27 gift right now while our Earth Day match opportunity is still available? We're a grassroots organization -- and we can't prepare for the hard fights ahead without you, Friend.](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1736484?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) ** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [$27 donation + $27 match = $54 impact](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1736485?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
| | [$50 donation + $50 match = $100 impact](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1736486?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
| | [$100 donation + $100 match = $200 impact](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1736487?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
| | [Double another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1736488?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
We hate having to ask, but remember what could be lost if we fall short -- it's the reason we set such an ambitious Earth Day goal. Already, Southern Resident orcas are struggling to survive -- **grieving, starving, and at greater risk every day.** Disastrous megaprojects are being planned in the lands where endangered species roam, **risking their very survival.** And wild pollinators are **disappearing rapidly,** with bee-toxic neonics being a key culprit -- and all this for the sake of private profit.
Friends of the Earth exists to STOP those outcomes before they happen, prevent existing dangers from getting any worse, and protect our planet -- and we're part of the world's largest grassroots environmental network because of it. But we can't continue our work unless you make your membership gift of $27 or more to help us raise what it takes to win -- because we're still falling dangerously short of our Earth Day goal, and there are only 2 hours left before it's over.
**Please, with time running out and everything on the line, we're counting on you to help us reach our goal before the clock strikes midnight. **
[**Our Earth has never needed a friend like you or us more: Please, before midnight tonight, give every dollar you can in honor of Earth Day while you can make double the impact to help Friends of the Earth continue fighting.**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1736489?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
[DONATE](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1736490?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Regards,
Erich Pica
President,
Friends of the Earth **
|

Friends of the Earth U.S. Washington, D.C. | Berkeley, CA 1-877-843-8687 [Contact us](http://foe.org/about-us/contact/)

[www.foe.org/news](http://www.foe.org/news) [www.foe.org/about-us](http://www.foe.org/about-us) [www.foeaction.org](http://www.foeaction.org)

name: CaucusRoom
subject: ☀️ CaucusRoom Weekend Edition
body:
Help us name our faith-based app! No images? [Click here](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-e-quiiiut-trhiujldw-jr/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quiiiut-trhiujldw-r/)
### ** Welcome to the Weekend Wrap Up! **
CaucusRoom's parent company, Ouray Digital Inc., is about to launch an online space for faith-based groups to meet, share, and learn. **[Help us name our Faith-based App!](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quiiiut-trhiujldw-y/)**
### ** Here are the top articles that CaucusRoom members shared:**
* **[Teenage Mob](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quiiiut-trhiujldw-j/)** in Chicago! Outgoing Mayor offers **[reason for mayhem](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quiiiut-trhiujldw-t/)**.
* This **[conservative college](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quiiiut-trhiujldw-i/)** is booming!
* Musk says government had **[access to Twitter DMs](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quiiiut-trhiujldw-d/)**.
* GOP asks for an **[end to Bud Light boycott](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quiiiut-trhiujldw-h/).**
* **[AOC concealed thousands](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quiiiut-trhiujldw-k/) **in campaign spending.
* Buttigieg says **[roads are racist.](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quiiiut-trhiujldw-u/)**
* Tax refunds are smaller this year.**[Did you get one](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quiiiut-trhiujldw-o/)?**
* Biden official that stole luggage was**[still getting a paycheck](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quiiiut-trhiujldw-x/).**
* DeSantis has some ideas for the**[land next to Disney](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quiiiut-trhiujldw-m/).**
* Can China blight**[our food supply](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quiiiut-trhiujldw-c/)?**
* Hundreds of Chinese men are**[headed for the southern border.](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quiiiut-trhiujldw-q/)**
* Biden's**[campaign played a role in the intel letter](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quiiiut-trhiujldw-a/)** to discredit laptop.
* Biden to **[punish people with good credit](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quiiiut-trhiujldw-f/).**
* EVs are**[accident waiting to happen](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quiiiut-trhiujldw-z/).**
* April CaucusRoom**[Council Meeting](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quiiiut-trhiujldw-v/).**

### **Wouldn't Wigs Be Cheaper?**
Democrat Rep. DeLauro praised Pete Buttigieg **[for solving the 'gender inequity' by allocating taxpayer funds to provide female crash test dummies.](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quiiiut-trhiujldw-e/)**
### **May Not Be Detained**
Dozens of Democrats [**introduced legislation this week that would make it harder to hold illegal aliens in custody if they qualify as a "vulnerable person,**"](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quiiiut-trhiujldw-s/) such as those who are gay, lesbian, or transgender, who don't speak English **Her Lies Don't Make Sense** White House Press Secretary **[continues to lie to the American people](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quiiiut-trhiujldw-g/)**. This time, it's about the Florida Parental Rights in Education law. [**Here For The Laughs**](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quiiiut-trhiujldw-w/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quiiiut-trhiujldw-yd/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quiiiut-trhiujldw-yh/)[](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quiiiut-trhiujldw-yk/)[](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quiiiut-trhiujldw-yu/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quiiiut-trhiujldw-jl/) | CaucusRoom, LLC

name: Rand Paul
subject: Politicians will not save us
body:
[](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJxckT2PnDAQhn-N6UB4jIErKC4hJMpJqZLi0qBZe9h14g_O2Frt_foItJviOuvx6Bm_r9Gt1iy3gXWfGMDF6I0BMPHMAN5ery7mP-7la_n8G8u39oeT-yV8ZgDpttL_ybukIofG7rQbCz1giwvpggbe9gB1I7ksLgPJp1PXEJdApwU0x1YB50qj6GrikgozQA2ibgBA1LyRVdv1rZZCq6d-qaXuWFMfiyrkV4wxBFep4Ao7XFJat-NFE4NpI5UjVehJh7RPMJiWkL3GZIIvlxBLUsEHZ1RJOqsDM5iCK1EdZzHl5OYt5KiIifG-jEG7Y0faZMfEeA99QIVuRXP2TIx7BN6XC9Gsgz_kc1iTcead5rtqjuj1itnOa7AmGWXQb_Mphr8U8Uzzo4iHPfhEPjExemVL9f399it_ezkvDNrZW6OZGD_A4z_F2ED_84t8bYo46PVqrDVbu9d4PmpUwf0LAAD__w68qRw)

Friend,

I came to Washington, D.C. just over a decade ago with one overarching mission: to support and defend our Constitution and the political and personal freedoms it upholds. **Do you want to know something important I 've learned? **

Politicians will not save us.

The Swamp will not save the economy, abide by our Constitution, nor will they restore our Republic. _Politics is downstream from culture_. Restoring our Republic requires a citizenry who understands the principles of the Founding Fathers, capitalism, and our Constitution.

**Which is why I am supporting the Foundation for Economic Education (FEE):** FEE is educating both high school and college students about the true principles of free markets, entrepreneurship, individual liberties, and personal responsibility.

In fact, the Foundation for Economic Education has launched "FEE In the Classroom."

It is a unique program held in brick-and-mortar and virtual classrooms across the country that teach young Americans the principles of free markets, individual liberty, and limited government.

As thousands of young Americans come to understand the positive impact freedom has on their lives, their communities, and our country through FEE in the Classroom workshops, their most frequently asked question afterwards is : "_why haven 't I heard these ideas before_?"

You and I both know why these students have never heard the ideas of liberty before: _America 's public schools don't teach our nation's founding principles anymore_. But FEE is changing this--and they are doing it in classrooms and virtual classrooms across the country.

clean_body: Friend, I came to Washington, D.C. just over a decade ago with one overarching mission: to support and defend our Constitution and the political and personal freedoms it upholds. Do you want to know something important I 've learned? Politicians will not save us. The Swamp will not save the economy, abide by our Constitution, nor will they restore our Republic. Politics is downstream from culture. Restoring our Republic requires a citizenry who understands the principles of the Founding Fathers, capitalism, and our Constitution. Which is why I am supporting the Foundation for Economic Education (FEE): FEE is educating both high school and college students about the true principles of free markets, entrepreneurship, individual liberties, and personal responsibility. In fact, the Foundation for Economic Education has launched "FEE In the Classroom." It is a unique program held in brick-and-mortar and virtual classrooms across the country that teach young Americans the principles of free markets, individual liberty, and limited government. As thousands of young Americans come to understand the positive impact freedom has on their lives, their communities, and our country through FEE in the Classroom workshops, their most frequently asked question afterwards is : "why haven 't I heard these ideas before?" You and I both know why these students have never heard the ideas of liberty before: America 's public schools don't teach our nation's founding principles anymore. But FEE is changing this--and they are doing it in classrooms and virtual classrooms across the country. Let me tell you more about FEE In the Classroom and why you should support this essential program and FEE 's efforts to defeat socialism in the classroom. It's no secret the Radical Left, Cancel Culture, and big government have teamed up to indoctrinate our nation's youth into embracing socialism. The sad truth is that free market capitalism, the history of our Founding Fathers, entrepreneurship, and are NOT being taught in high schools or college campuses across the country. FEE's President, Zilvinas Silenas, knows this more than anyone... Zilvinas once lived under the Soviet Union's Communist rule in Lithuania. He's now made it his life's mission to educate young people about the dangers of socialism and how free markets and free people solve problems. Trust me... if some of my colleagues in the U.S. Senate attended a FEE In the Classroom teaching, we would not be the same mess we are in today. I hope I can count on your support and see your name on the list of FEE's newest supporters. Thank you for everything, Senator Rand Paul

Friend,
Someone recently asked me...
_...Why are you still running for president after everything the Left has done to you? Why don’t you just go to a tropical island and live a very nice life?_
I get asked that question a lot.
**But no matter how tough this battle gets, I could _NEVER_ abandon America.**
America has given me everything I could ever have dreamed of. I truly love our country.
**And after seeing what the most incompetent and corrupt politicians have done to the greatest nation in history, I’m going to keep fighting to save our country.**
_I didn’t “have” to run for president, but I truly believe that this is my calling. The idea of giving up on America doesn’t even cross my mind._
And the more our enemies viciously try to stop me, the more I _**KNOW**_ that we MUST keep fighting to complete our mission to SAVE AMERICA.
I know you’ve already done a lot for this movement. History will forever remember the role you played in saving our country.

clean_body: This is a question I get a lot. | | | Friend, Someone recently asked me... ...Why are you still running for president after everything the Left has done to you? Why don’t you just go to a tropical island and live a very nice life? I get asked that question a lot. But no matter how tough this battle gets, I could NEVER abandon America. America has given me everything I could ever have dreamed of. I truly love our country. And after seeing what the most incompetent and corrupt politicians have done to the greatest nation in history, I’m going to keep fighting to save our country. I didn’t “have” to run for president, but I truly believe that this is my calling. The idea of giving up on America doesn’t even cross my mind. And the more our enemies viciously try to stop me, the more I KNOW that we MUST keep fighting to complete our mission to SAVE AMERICA. I know you’ve already done a lot for this movement. History will forever remember the role you played in saving our country. But, if times aren’t too tough for you right now, even $1 could truly help our movement as the attacks against us get more and more vicious by the day. Thank you, | Donald J. Trump 45th President of the United States Contributions to Trump Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Stop the Big Oil and shipping industries from killing endangered orcas and destroying our planet
body:
| | | | | [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e_s17_main_cobrandedemail_c3)
---|---|---

| | **Dear Friend,** | **Only 73 orcas remain. Stop them from being driven to extinction, protect our planet, and donate $27 or more to help us hit our $180,000 Earth Day goal! ** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [$27 donation + $27 match = $54 impact](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1736506?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[$50 donation + $50 match = $100 impact](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1736507?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[$100 donation + $100 match = $200 impact](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1736508?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1736509?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**There are only 73 Southern Resident orcas left in the world, and they’re slowly starving to death.** Big Oil and shipping megaprojects are threatening the LAST living Southern Resident orcas -- all in the interest of corporate profit. These orcas are the only endangered species of killer whales in the United States, and they are starving and growing weaker by the day. But two proposed megaprojects threaten to seal their death sentence. **[Help protect these 73 remaining orcas and our planet by standing up to corporate greed and donate $27 or more today and help us reach our Earth Day goal of $180,000 before midnight tonight!](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1736510?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)**
These Southern Resident orcas are a struggling family who have suffered devastating blows recently. **Three beloved members of their pods -- Cappuccino, Marina, and now Ripple -- already died from starvation.** Losing Cappuccino’s playfulness, Marina’s wisdom, and the hope that young Ripple brought for future of the family, has plunged their surviving family members deep into grief and stress, worsening the impact of persistent starvation for all three of the Southern Resident pods. In this state, these precious creatures are even more vulnerable to the destructive impact of commercial megaprojects.
Each Southern Resident killer whale is an integral member of their family. Every loss is felt by the entire pod. But Big Oil and the shipping industry are threatening them all with proposed megaprojects that would directly impact their habitats and drive them to EXTINCTION.
**Big Oil and the shipping industry are threatening orcas with starvation. Help us fight for their protection and the future of our planet with your $27 donation before the clock strikes midnight on Earth Day! **
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[$27 donation + $27 match = $54 impact](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1736506?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[$50 donation + $50 match = $100 impact](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1736507?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[$100 donation + $100 match = $200 impact](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1736508?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1736509?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Southern Resident killer whale populations have been declining since at least 2006. Key drivers to their extinction are tied to toxic water pollution and food availability. Their main food source is Chinook salmon, which were once abundant in their ecosystems, but have substantially declined in the last decade -- **leading these orcas to starvation, stress, and miscarriages. **
The two proposed megaprojects would drastically magnify these threats to orcas. The Roberts Bank T2 shipping terminal project would increase cargo ship traffic and disrupt Chinook salmon migration patterns -- driving them further away from the orcas’ habitat. The resulting noise from the ships will also disrupt the killer whales’ sonar hunting methods, preventing them from finding the few salmon left in the region.
The proposed Trans Mountain Pipeline expansion would also significantly increase oil tanker traffic in Southern Resident critical habitat SEVEN-FOLD -- from one tanker a week to one per day! Worst of all, it will also be pushing out millions of gallons per day of toxic tar sands oil -- **the dirtiest kind** \-- in oil tankers through this already delicate orca habitat.
**The threatened Southern Resident orca population is just one big oil spill away from extinction.** And we know that with oil transportation projects, oil spills are not a matter of “if,” but rather of “when.” This is why we need to raise our voices and stand up to Big Oil and the shipping industry, showing them that we will not allow them to put private profit over the lives of precious wildlife and the ecosystems that rely on them.
**Southern Resident orcas are one big oil spill away from EXTINCTION. Fight the megaprojects that threaten their existence and our planet with your contribution of $27 or more now. **
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[$27 donation + $27 match = $54 impact](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1736506?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[$50 donation + $50 match = $100 impact](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1736507?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[$100 donation + $100 match = $200 impact](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1736508?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1736509?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Orcas are crucial to a thriving ocean habitat and our own health. They release vital nutrients for phytoplankton, which in turn provide half of the oxygen we breathe while absorbing hundreds of thousands of tons of carbon each year. We depend on this flow of nutrients for healthy ecosystems and a functioning planet, which is why we must protect these orcas at all costs.
Each tragic death in these pods reduces the chances of the remaining orcas’ survival. With Marina’s death, her children are now three times more likely to die, while her grandchildren are **SIX TIMES less likely to survive.** With these 73 precious lives at stake and at increased risk, we need to step up our fight to protect them.
Southern Resident killer whales are in perilous danger. You and I may be some of the last people to share the planet with these magnificent creatures if these disastrous megaprojects are allowed to move forward. That is why we need you by our side, Friend.
Your membership gift of $27 or more to Friends of the Earth in honor of Earth Day will allow us to fight these projects and the threats to our planet. Make your contribution now, while orcas still have a fighting chance and you can make double the impact!
**Cappuccino and Marina are dead. Don’t let their surviving family members meet the same fate. Make your contribution of $27 or more to Friends of the Earth before the clock strikes midnight on Earth Day! **
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[$27 donation + $27 match = $54 impact](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1736506?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[$50 donation + $50 match = $100 impact](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1736507?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[$100 donation + $100 match = $200 impact](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1736508?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1736509?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Standing with you,
Marcie Keever
Oceans & vessels program director,
Friends of the Earth**
|
##### Contact Us:
Friends of the Earth U.S. Washington, D.C. | Berkeley, CA 1-877-843-8687 [Contact us](http://foe.org/about-us/contact/)

[Click here to unsubscribe](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/subscribe?campaignpageurl=https%3A%2F%2Faction.foe.org%2Fpage%2F2555%2Fsubscriptions%2F1%3Fea.broadcast.id%3D233208&ea.campaigner.email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC)

body:
| George Santos’ list of lies is growing EVERY DAY – so when we reached out to top Democrats to sign our letter demanding his resignation, we thought signatures would POUR IN. **__Butwe couldn’t have been more wrong.__** We’re sending our letter to Santos tomorrow morning at 9am sharp, and we need a SURGE of signatures before we do!

_If we don’t, Santos will think nobody cares about his lies and he’ll get away scot-free!_ [We’re asking one last time: Chip in $3 to add your name to our letter demanding George Santos resigns from Congress »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/43893?t=6&akid=7266%2E878179%2EQoE43w) | [**DONATE $3 AND ADD YOUR NAME TO OUR LETTER »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/43893?t=7&akid=7266%2E878179%2EQoE43w)
---
[](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/43894?t=8&akid=7266%2E878179%2EQoE43w)
* * *
**TO: Rep. George Santos**
**FROM: Add your name**
Dear Rep. George Santos,

I’m SICK and TIRED of your misinformation, lies, and constant scandals.

American working families need REAL support, but you’re too busy playing politics and covering up your potential crimes!!

[That’s why I’m calling on you to RESIGN NOW and gladly chipping in $3 to Voter Protection Project to remove MAGA extremists like YOU from public office »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/43893?t=9&akid=7266%2E878179%2EQoE43w)
[**DONATE $3 AND SIGN MY NAME »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/43893?t=10&akid=7266%2E878179%2EQoE43w)
---
We deserve genuine, honest Representatives that care about healthcare, voting rights, LGBTQ rights, accountability in our Democracy...

NOT an ultra MAGA fan who lied about his entire identity while running for office!!

[That’s why I’m signing this letter calling on you to RESIGN immediately and pitching in $3 to Voter Protection Project to ensure far-right Republicans like you never hold office again »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/43893?t=11&akid=7266%2E878179%2EQoE43w)

With conviction,

_**_X Add your name_**_
[**DONATE $3 AND SIGN MY NAME »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/43893?t=12&akid=7266%2E878179%2EQoE43w)
---
***SIGNATURE PENDING DONATION***
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=7266%2E878179%2EQoE43w). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=7266%2E878179%2EQoE43w).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=7266%2E878179%2EQoE43w) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=13&akid=7266%2E878179%2EQoE43w). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=7266%2E878179%2EQoE43w)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=7266%2E878179%2EQoE43w)

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your gift missing: Double your impact before the clock strikes midnight
body:
| | | | [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e_s17_main_cobrandedemail_c3)
---
| | please, don’t waste this opportunity today | Today is Earth Day, and right now, you have the chance to make a powerful difference in the fight for our planet and our future.**But our rare match opportunity is expiring soon, and we haven’t heard from you yet. **
---
[](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1736526?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
Everywhere we look, **vital ecosystems are struggling under the burden of massive pollution, and greedy corporations are largely to blame.** But from doubling down on fossil fuel extraction to ramping up production on single-use plastics, these mega-polluters continue to put short-term profits over the health of our planet and its inhabitants. **We can’t stand aside and allow corporate greed to destroy the fragile ecosystems that sustain us.**
As part of the world’s largest grassroots environmental network, Friends of the Earth is fighting back for a just and sustainable world right here and right now. That’s why today only, a group of generous donors will **match every gift – dollar for dollar – up to our $180,000 Earth Day goal and only until midnight tonight**. But we need your help to make the most of this once-in-a-year opportunity,**so we pulled your supporter record, and here’s what we found: **
| | [ ](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1736526?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
